(C3) ORI's operating envelope is topology-conditional: semantically neutral in dedicated-shard workloads; harmful in single-shard collaborative writing because preservation propagates concurrent contradictions.
  Source code: https://github.com/sajjadanwar0/sbus

</details>


### [433] [Scale Determines Whether Language Models Organize Representation Geometry for Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17084)
*Weilun Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出Subspace PGA指标，用于评估语言模型表示空间几何结构是否与预测目标对齐，发现模型规模决定了表示几何的组织方式：小模型在训练后期会逐渐失去预测对齐，而大模型能保持这种对齐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工具主要关注表示空间的几何形状，但未探究这种几何形状的组织目的。作者希望理解语言模型表示空间几何结构是否专门为预测任务而组织，以及这种组织方式如何随模型规模变化。

Method: 引入Subspace PGA（主几何对齐）指标，通过比较表示空间距离结构与解嵌入矩阵W_U的读出子空间之间的对齐程度，以及与同等大小的随机子空间的对齐程度，来量化表示几何的预测组织性。

Result: 在七个Pythia模型（70M-6.9B）和三个跨家族模型中，中间层几何结构显著为预测任务而组织（峰值z分数=9-24）。但组织程度具有规模依赖性：小模型（d≤1024）在训练后期逐渐失去这种对齐，而大模型（d≥2048）在整个训练过程中都能保持。这是由于容量权衡：少数主导方向偏离W_U读出，掩盖了底层的预测结构，移除这些方向可以恢复对齐。

Conclusion: 模型规模不仅决定了预测性能的好坏，还决定了表示几何如何为预测任务而组织。现有的谱度量和损失曲线无法捕捉这种差异，需要专门的几何对齐指标来理解模型内部表示的组织方式。

Abstract: In language models, what a representation encodes is determined by the geometry of its representation space: distances, not activations, carry meaning. Existing tools characterize the shape of this geometry but do not ask what that shape is organized for. We introduce Subspace PGA, a metric that tests whether a layer's distance structure aligns with the readout subspace of the unembedding matrix $W_U$ more than with random subspaces of equal size. Across seven Pythia models (70M--6.9B) and three cross-family models, intermediate geometry is significantly organized for prediction (peak $z = 9$--$24$), but the degree is scale-dependent: small models ($d \leq 1024$) progressively lose it at late layers during training -- even as loss keeps improving -- while large models ($d \geq 2048$) preserve it throughout. We trace this to a capacity trade-off: a few dominant directions migrate away from $W_U$'s readout, masking rather than destroying the predictive structure beneath, and removing them restores alignment. Neither spectral metrics nor loss curves capture this distinction. Scale thus determines not only how well a model predicts, but how its representation geometry is organized to do so.

</details>


### [434] [Mechanism Learning: Prototype-Anchored Mechanism Inference for Scientific Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17091)
*Qian Jiang,Liping Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了机制学习框架，通过估计当前活跃的局部机制来预测未来状态，而不是直接预测状态，以应对数据稀缺、长时预测、非平稳动态和高维复杂性等脆弱场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的基于直接状态预测的科学预测方法在数据稀缺、长时预测、非平稳动态和高维复杂性等脆弱场景下表现不佳。虽然原始状态轨迹在这些场景下高度敏感，但底层局部演化规则通常表现出鲁棒的可重用性。

Method: 提出了机制学习框架：将局部时空片段压缩为机制描述符，形成数据驱动的结构化机制空间（空间中的邻近性反映相似的局部演化规则）。使用原型锚点（一组代表性机制）来稀疏覆盖局部规则空间，并将估计结果锚定在观测数据中。

Result: 在Burgers动力学、WeatherBench2和Lorenz96上评估，学习到的机制空间能够抵抗崩溃并保持强局部一致性。相比直接预测方法和其他模型（包括FNO、NODE、LSTM和储层方法），该框架在脆弱场景下表现更优：显著提高了Burgers动力学中的切换稳定性，在稀缺数据固定时长的WeatherBench2协议下达到最先进性能，在中等复杂度的Lorenz96中也表现出色。

Conclusion: 机制学习作为直接状态预测的原则性、鲁棒替代方案，能够有效预测复杂系统。消融研究和漂移诊断证实这些改进源于有限原型锚定而非单纯潜在容量。

Abstract: Scientific forecasting typically relies on direct state prediction, an approach that grows brittle under data scarcity, extended horizons, non-stationary dynamics, or high-dimensional complexity. While raw state trajectories are highly sensitive in these regimes, underlying local evolution rules often exhibit robust reusability. We introduce mechanism learning, a framework that forecasts future states by estimating the currently active local mechanism. Our method compresses local spatiotemporal fragments into mechanism descriptors, forming a data-driven, structured mechanism space where proximity reflects similar local evolution rules. To ground these estimates in observed data, we utilize prototype anchors, a set of representative mechanisms that sparsely cover the space of local rules. We evaluate this approach on Burgers dynamics, WeatherBench2, and Lorenz96. Empirically, the learned mechanism spaces resist collapse and maintain strong local consistency. Compared to direct prediction and other models including FNO, NODE, LSTM, and reservoir-family methods, our framework demonstrates predictive gains in fragile regimes: it significantly improves switching stability in Burgers dynamics and achieves state-of-the-art performance both under the scarce-data fixed-horizon WeatherBench2 protocol and in intermediate-complexity Lorenz96. Ablation studies and drift diagnostics confirm that these improvements are driven by finite prototype anchoring rather than sheer latent capacity. Together, these results establish mechanism learning as a principled, robust alternative to direct state prediction in forecasting complex systems.

</details>


### [435] [Parallel Recursive LSTM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17108)
*Tristan Gaudreault,Yongyi Mao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PR-LSTM是一种并行递归LSTM架构，通过计算树的递归非线性状态组合替代传统的从左到右循环，在保持非线性门控状态表示的同时，将循环并行深度从线性降低到对数级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformers的自注意力机制在长上下文场景下存在二次时间和内存成本问题，而传统循环模型如LSTM虽然具有非线性状态更新和状态跟踪能力，但其严格顺序计算限制了并行性。需要一种既能保持循环模型优势又能提高并行性的架构。

Method: 提出并行递归LSTM（PR-LSTM），采用分层循环架构：首先将token独立映射到潜在状态，然后通过学习的门控组合块在平衡计算树上递归合并这些状态。该结构使用并行扫描中的归约模式作为固定执行计划，而不是假设关联性循环。

Result: PR-LSTM在形式语言基准测试中实现了强大的序列长度泛化能力，比标准RNN、LSTM和Transformer基线解决了更多任务，同时避免了注意力的二次缩放问题。

Conclusion: 循环计算可以通过分层重组来暴露并行性，而无需将转换动态限制为线性或关联形式，这为高效序列建模提供了新方向。

Abstract: Transformers have become the dominant architecture for sequence modeling by using self-attention to enable expressive and highly parallel processing. However, the resulting quadratic time and memory costs limit efficiency in long-context settings. Recurrent models such as LSTMs provide explicit nonlinear state updates and strong state-tracking capabilities, yet their strictly sequential computation limits parallelism. We introduce the Parallel Recursive LSTM (PR-LSTM), a hierarchical recurrent architecture that replaces left-to-right recurrence with recursive nonlinear state composition over a balanced computation tree. Tokens are first mapped independently to latent states, which are then recursively merged by a learned gated composition block. This structure uses the reduction pattern underlying parallel scans as a fixed execution schedule, rather than assuming an associative recurrence. As a result, PR-LSTM retains nonlinear gated state representations while reducing recurrent parallel depth from linear to logarithmic. Empirically, PR-LSTM achieves strong sequence-length generalization on formal-language benchmarks, solving more tasks than standard RNN, LSTM, and Transformer baselines, while avoiding the quadratic scaling of attention. These results suggest that recurrent computation can be reorganized hierarchically to expose parallelism without restricting the transition dynamics to linear or associative forms.

</details>


### [436] [DynMuon: A Dynamic Spectral Shaping View of Muon](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17109)
*Fangzhou Wu,Rikhav Shah,Sandeep Silwal,Qiuyi Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种动态谱整形方法DynMuon，通过调整更新矩阵的奇异值指数p来优化训练过程，相比Muon方法能减少10.6-26.5%的训练步数并达到更低的验证损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Muon方法已成为训练大语言模型的主导方法，但其固定的极分解更新可能不是最优的。作者观察到不同训练阶段需要不同的奇异值调整策略，这启发他们开发动态谱整形方法。

Method: 提出"谱整形"操作，将更新矩阵M=UΣV^⊤替换为UΣ^p V^⊤，其中p是可调参数。开发理论框架根据局部曲率、随机梯度噪声和训练阶段选择最优p值。基于此提出DynMuon方法，在训练过程中动态调度p值从正到轻微负值。

Result: 实验表明，正p值在训练早期有助于强调高曲率方向并加速信号收缩，而轻微负p值在训练后期有助于将更新强度重新分配到仍包含有用训练信号的低曲率方向。DynMuon在不同模型规模、架构和训练设置下都能达到比Muon更低的验证损失，且减少10.6-26.5%的训练步数。

Conclusion: 动态谱整形是优化Muon类训练方法的关键技术，DynMuon通过智能调度奇异值指数p，在训练不同阶段采用不同策略，显著提高了训练效率和模型性能。

Abstract: In recent years, Muon has emerged as the dominant method for training large language models, and transformers more broadly. The essential difference, when compared to standard gradient descent methods, is to replace the usual update matrix $M=UΣV^\top$ with its polar factor $UV^\top$. In this work, we consider a class of Muon-like updates, where we replace the update $M$ with $UΣ^p V^\top$ for some parameter $p$. We call this a "spectral-shaping" operation, and develop a theory of how to pick $p$ which depends on (a) local curvature of the loss function, (b) noise stemming from stochastic gradients and label noise, and (c) training stage. Our theory and experimentation reveal a previously overlooked behavior: positive $p$ helps early by emphasizing high-curvature directions and accelerating signal contraction, while mildly negative $p$ helps later by reallocating update strength toward low-curvature directions that still contain useful training signals. Building on the insight, we propose DynMuon, an efficient dynamic spectral shaping method that schedules $p$ from positive to mildly negative over training. Extensive experiments across model sizes, architectures, and training settings show that DynMuon consistently achieves lower validation loss than Muon, while requiring 10.6-26.5% fewer steps to reach the same target loss.

</details>


### [437] [Differentiable Optimization Layers for Guaranteed Fairness in Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17118)
*David Troxell,Noah Roemer,Guido Montúfar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出"公平层"概念，将公平约束作为可微优化层集成到神经网络中，保证输出公平性，并开发在线原对偶推理算法实现流式预测的聚合公平保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统预测-优化框架中，神经模型估计的参数作为下游优化问题的固定输入，缺乏对公平性约束的直接集成。现有方法通常采用批量约束，在流式预测和小批量场景下过于严格。

Method: 1. 提出"公平层"：作为可微优化层附加到模型输出层，确保满足选定的输出公平性概念；2. 开发在线原对偶推理算法：为流式预测提供可证明的聚合公平保证，支持任意小批量大小。

Result: 数值实验验证了公平层和相关算法的有效性，理论分析表征了该层在模型训练和反向传播中的可微性和稳定性特性。代码已在GitHub公开。

Conclusion: 公平层为神经网络集成公平约束提供了一种可微的端到端解决方案，在线算法解决了流式预测中的公平保证问题，为公平机器学习提供了新的技术框架。

Abstract: Differentiable optimization layers are traditionally integrated in predict-then-optimize frameworks where a neural model estimates parameters that subsequently serve as fixed inputs to downstream decision-making optimization problems. In this work, we introduce the concept of a "fairness layer": a differentiable optimization layer appended to a model's output layer that guarantees a chosen notion of output parity is satisfied when integrated into a neural network. Additionally, we introduce an online primal-dual inference algorithm that provides provable aggregate fairness guarantees for streaming predictions with arbitrarily small batch sizes, where traditional per-batch constraints become overly restrictive. Numerical experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the fairness layer and associated algorithm, and theoretical analysis characterizes the layer's differentiability and stability properties during model training and backpropagation. Our code for these experiments is publicly available on GitHub (https://github.com/dtroxell19/FairDL-ICML-2026.git) and our public Python package documentation can be found online: https://dtroxell19.github.io/fairness_training/.

</details>


### [438] [An Analytical Multiple Criteria Framework for Temporal and Dynamic Business-to-Business Customer Segmentation in Manufacturing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17151)
*Muhammad Raees,Konstantinos Papangelis,Vassilis Javed Khan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种动态多准则决策方法用于B2B客户细分，扩展RFM模型并整合自适应层次分析，在真实制造企业数据上验证了方法的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统客户细分方法（如RFM模型）依赖有限标准，难以捕捉复杂的业务交互，特别是在B2B制造环境中需要更全面的客户分析。

Method: 1) 将RFM扩展到稳定性和增长维度；2) 整合自适应层次分析匹配业务目标；3) 评估多元时间序列聚类模型；4) 应用基于图的共识模型加强分析。

Result: 在真实制造企业超过3000个B2B客户数据上测试，方法展现出强时间稳定性，能够有效跟踪客户段间转换和波动性。

Conclusion: 该方法为B2B客户细分提供有效的决策支持，使领域专家能够通过偏好分析制定策略，增强了传统细分方法的稳健性和实用性。

Abstract: In sales and marketing, customer segmentation is an important tool for formulating strategies for customer treatment and supply chain management. Most segmentation implementations rely on limited criteria, such as recency, frequency, and monetary (RFM) modeling, which often fail to capture complex business interactions. In this work, we design and evaluate a dynamic multi-criteria decision-making (MCDM) method in a business-to-business (B2B) manufacturing context by 1) extending RFM to dimensions of stability and growth, 2) integrating an adaptive and analytical hierarchical process to match business objectives, and 3) evaluating multivariate time-series clustering models. We then measure customer stability, tracking between-segment transitions, and volatility over time, and apply a graph-based consensus model to further strengthen the analysis. We test the efficacy of the proposed method using a real-world manufacturing company dataset to segment more than 3,000 B2B customers, showing strong robustness to temporal shifts. The implementation enables domain experts with preferential analytics to devise their strategies, providing effective decision support for B2B customer segmentation.

</details>


### [439] [Stress-Testing Neural Network Verifiers with Provably Robust Instances](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17153)
*David Troxell,Yulia Alexandr,Sofia Hunt,Stephanie Lei,Guido Montúfar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种可重复使用的验证实例生成框架，通过分析构造获得先验的ground-truth鲁棒性标签，解决了现有验证基准缺乏真实标签的问题，并发现了流行验证器中的数值容错问题和实现bug。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经网络验证器评估基准缺乏ground-truth标签，导致验证器评估只能依赖间接启发式方法，无法进行精确评分和系统研究验证器失效模式。

Method: 提出了一个可重复使用的验证实例生成框架，通过分析构造获得先验的ground-truth鲁棒性标签；引入验证难度剖面（Difficulty Profile），包含可估计的量化指标来捕捉不同的实例难度来源。

Result: 发现了多个流行验证器中的数值容错问题和实现bug；评估了五个最先进的验证器，显示不同实例会强调验证流程的不同方面；验证难度剖面能够为改进数值可靠性、松弛质量和搜索行为提供可操作目标。

Conclusion: ground-truth标签对于验证器评估至关重要，提出的框架和难度剖面能够系统研究验证器失效模式，为未来验证器开发提供指导，特别是在数值可靠性、松弛质量和搜索行为方面的改进。

Abstract: Neural network verifiers aim to provide formal guarantees on model behavior, but existing verification benchmarks are fundamentally limited by their lack of ground-truth labels. As a result, verifier evaluation relies on indirect heuristics, which prevents exact scoring and systematic study of verifier failure modes. We address this gap by introducing a reusable framework for generating verification instances whose ground-truth robustness labels are known a priori through analytic construction. Our framework led to the discovery of multiple numeric tolerance concerns and an implementation bug in popular verifiers, highlighting the need for ground-truth labels. Additionally, to systematically study verifier failure modes, we introduce the verification Difficulty Profile, a collection of estimable quantities capturing distinct sources of instance hardness. Using our framework and these profiles, we evaluate five state-of-the-art verifiers and show that different instances stress distinct aspects of the verification pipeline. We show that these results can aid the future development of verifiers as they provide actionable targets for improving numerical reliability, relaxation quality, and search behavior. Our code is publicly available: https://github.com/dtroxell19/VeriStressGT.git.

</details>


### [440] [When Bits Break Recourse: Counterfactual-Faithful Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17160)
*Chaymae Yahyati,Ismail Lamaakal,Khalid El Makkaoui,Ibrahim Ouahbi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 量化技术在保持预测准确性的同时可能破坏算法追索权，本文提出Counterfactual-Faithful Quantization (CFQ)方法来量化过程中保持反事实行为


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量化技术虽然能在低比特部署中保持预测准确性，但会悄无声息地破坏算法追索权：量化前能够改变决策的可行动作可能在量化后失效，或成本大幅增加

Method: 提出Counterfactual-Faithful Quantization (CFQ)，通过训练量化器参数和混合精度比特分配，在全局比特预算下强制教师模型追索点处达到目标结果，从而保持反事实行为

Result: 在Adult、German Credit和COMPAS数据集上的实验表明，与准确性匹配的基线相比，CFQ在保持准确性的同时显著改善了有效性下降(VD)和反事实追索差距(CRG)指标

Conclusion: CFQ方法能够在量化过程中保持算法追索权，而传统的准确性匹配基线可能显著降低追索稳定性，基于边界的分析为有界量化扰动下的追索转移提供了充分条件

Abstract: Quantization can preserve predictive accuracy under low-bit deployment while silently breaking algorithmic recourse: an actionable change that flips a decision before quantization may fail after quantization, or become substantially more costly. We formalize counterfactual sensitivity under quantization through validity, cost, and direction stability, and introduce two metrics: Validity Drop (VD) and Counterfactual Recourse Gap (CRG) that reveal recourse failures invisible to accuracy. We propose Counterfactual-Faithful Quantization (CFQ), which trains quantizer parameters and mixed-precision bit allocation to preserve counterfactual behavior by enforcing the target outcome at teacher recourse points under a global bit budget. A margin-based analysis gives a sufficient condition for recourse transfer under bounded quantization perturbations. Experiments on Adult, German Credit, and COMPAS show that accuracy-matched baselines can significantly degrade recourse stability, while CFQ maintains accuracy and substantially improves VD and CRG across bit budgets.

</details>


### [441] [TriAxialKV: Toward Extreme Low-Precision KV-Cache Quantization for Agentic Inference Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17170)
*Hanzhang Shen,Haoran Wu,Yiren Zhao,Robert Mullins*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TriAxialKV：针对智能体工作负载的新型KV缓存混合精度量化方案，通过三轴标签分配、敏感度校准和INT2/INT4位宽分配，在固定内存预算下实现高效推理


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 智能体工作负载与纯聊天工作负载有显著差异，需要长上下文处理、多模态输入和结构化多轮工具调用。现有KV缓存量化方法通常是同质的或仅利用单一维度（如时间邻近性或模态）的异质性，忽略了多个维度之间的相互作用。

Method: 提出TriAxialKV方案：1）为每个token分配三轴标签（时间新近性、模态、语义角色）；2）校准每个标签的敏感度；3）在固定内存预算下分配INT2/INT4位宽；实现为端到端服务系统，包括校准、混合精度量化和内存管理，以及自定义融合Triton解码内核。

Result: 使用Qwen3-VL-32B-Thinking作为计算机使用智能体操作OSWorld时，TriAxialKV在保持与SGLang（使用BF16 KV缓存）相同准确性的同时，支持4.5倍KV缓存大小，并实现30%更高的端到端吞吐量。

Conclusion: TriAxialKV通过考虑智能体工作负载中KV缓存的三轴异质性，实现了高效的混合精度量化，显著提升了智能体推理的性能和效率。

Abstract: Agentic workloads have emerged as a major workload for LLM inference. They differ significantly from chat-only workloads, requiring long-context processing, the ability to handle multimodal inputs, and structured multi-turn interactions with tool calling capabilities. As a result, their context exhibits structure that can carry different importance along three key axes: temporal recency to the current turn, modality such as text or image tokens, and semantic role such as user queries, tool calls, observations, or reasoning. These axes capture distinct token behaviors and lead to different sensitivities to KV-cache compression. However, existing KV-cache quantization methods are typically homogeneous or exploit only heterogeneity on a single dimension, such as temporal proximity or modality, overlooking the interactions among them. To this end, we introduce TriAxialKV, a novel mixed-precision KV-cache quantization scheme that assigns each token a triaxial tag, calibrates per-tag sensitivity, and allocates INT2/INT4 bitwidths under a fixed memory budget. We implement TriAxialKV as an end-to-end serving system, comprising calibration, mixed-precision quantization and memory management, and custom fused Triton decode kernels. When using Qwen3-VL-32B-Thinking as a computer-use agent operating the OSWorld, TriAxialKV matches the accuracy of SGLang with BF16 KV cache while supporting 4.5$\times$ KV cache size and achieving 30% higher end-to-end throughput, when running on real GPU systems.

</details>


### [442] [OpenJarvis: Personal AI, On Personal Devices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17172)
*Jon Saad-Falcon,Avanika Narayan,Robby Manihani,Tanvir Bhathal,Herumb Shandilya,Hakki Orhun Akengin,Gabriel Bo,Andrew Park,Matthew Hart,Caia Costello,Chuan Li,Christopher Ré,Azalia Mirhoseini*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: OpenJarvis提出可分解的个人AI堆栈架构，将系统表示为五个可独立优化的原语，通过LLM引导的规范搜索实现本地模型在保持隐私、低成本的同时达到接近云端前沿模型的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有个人AI堆栈（如OpenClaw、Hermes Agent）严重依赖云端前沿模型处理敏感本地数据，存在隐私和成本问题。但简单将云端模型替换为本地模型会导致准确率大幅下降（25-39个百分点），因为现有堆栈围绕特定云端模型设计，只有提示可调优，而现有提示优化器仅能缩小5个百分点的本地-云端差距。

Method: 提出OpenJarvis架构，将个人AI系统表示为五个类型化原语的规范：智能（Intelligence）、引擎（Engine）、智能体（Agents）、工具与内存（Tools & Memory）、学习（Learning）。每个原语都是独立可编辑字段，使整个堆栈可端到端优化。引入LLM引导的规范搜索：云端前沿模型在搜索时提出跨规范的编辑建议，只接受不降低性能的编辑，最终规范在推理时完全在设备上运行。

Result: 使用LLM引导的规范搜索，设备端规范在8个基准测试中的4个上匹配或超过云端准确率，平均仅比最佳云端基线低3.2个百分点。同时将边际API成本降低约800倍，端到端延迟降低4倍。

Conclusion: OpenJarvis通过可分解的堆栈架构和LLM引导的规范搜索，实现了在保持本地模型隐私、低成本优势的同时，显著缩小了与云端前沿模型的性能差距，为个人AI系统提供了可行的本地化解决方案。

Abstract: Personal AI stacks, like OpenClaw and Hermes Agent, are becoming central to daily work, yet they route nearly every query (often over sensitive local data) to cloud-hosted frontier models. Replacing frontier models with local models inside existing stacks does not work: swapping Claude Opus 4.6 for Qwen3.5-9B drops accuracy by 25-39 pp across personal AI tasks like PinchBench and GAIA. Existing stacks bundle agentic prompts, tool descriptions, memory configuration, and runtime settings around a specific cloud model. Only the prompts can be tuned, and state-of-the-art prompt optimizers close just 5 pp of the local-cloud gap on their own. This motivates a decomposed personal AI stack: one that exposes individual primitives which can be optimized individually or jointly to close the local-cloud gap. We present OpenJarvis, an architecture that represents a personal AI system as a typed spec over five primitives: Intelligence, Engine, Agents, Tools & Memory, and Learning. Each primitive is an independently editable field, making the stack end-to-end optimizable and measurable against accuracy, cost, and latency. Towards closing the local-cloud gap without surrendering local-model properties, OpenJarvis introduces LLM-guided spec search, a local-cloud collaboration in which frontier cloud models propose edits across the spec at search time, only non-regressing edits are accepted, and the resulting spec runs entirely on-device at inference time. With LLM-guided spec search, on-device specs match or exceed cloud accuracy on 4 of 8 benchmarks and land within 3.2 pp of the best cloud baseline on average. They also reduce marginal API cost by ~800x and end-to-end latency by 4x.

</details>


### [443] [The Geometry of Projection Heads: Conditioning, Invariance, and Collapse](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17180)
*Faris Chaudhry*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种自监督学习中投影头的几何理论，将其建模为骨干表示流形上的可训练黎曼度量，揭示了投影头作为几何缓冲器的作用，解耦了语义骨干与预训练目标的刚性约束。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对自监督学习中投影头的理解有限，不清楚其具体作用机制。本文旨在建立投影头的几何理论框架，解释其在优化过程中的角色，特别是如何防止维度崩溃以及为何最终需要丢弃。

Method: 将投影头建模为骨干表示流形上的可训练黎曼度量，通过几何分析研究线性与非线性头的差异。理论分析证明平滑非线性头在崩溃平衡点处产生Hessian负特征值，并通过实验连续追踪训练过程中的优化几何来验证。

Result: 线性头执行隐式子空间白化，非线性头通过局部度量适应损失函数的拓扑约束。平滑非线性头（如Swish）能产生显式负曲率逃离维度崩溃，而线性头和ReLU头在连续时间梯度流中无法做到，需依赖离散时间优化动态和BatchNorm。

Conclusion: 投影头作为通用几何缓冲器，解耦了语义骨干与预训练目标的刚性、破坏性约束。度量退化程度控制着信息-不变性的权衡，这解释了为何投影头最终必须被丢弃。

Abstract: We develop a geometric theory of projection heads in self-supervised learning by modeling the head as a trainable Riemannian metric on the backbone representation manifold. We show that linear heads perform implicit subspace whitening, while nonlinear heads adapt local metrics to satisfy the specific topological constraints of the loss, with head depth empirically dictating this capacity. Analyzing dimensional collapse, we prove that smooth nonlinear heads natively induce negative eigenvalues in the Hessian at collapsed equilibria, making them unstable. We empirically validate this by continuously tracking the optimization geometry during training, which reveals that smooth activations like Swish can generate explicit negative curvature to escape collapse, whereas linear and ReLU heads under continuous-time gradient flow cannot, relying instead on discrete-time optimization dynamics and BatchNorm. Finally, we geometrically characterize how metric degeneracy governs the information-invariance trade-off, explaining why the head must be discarded. Evaluated across contrastive and decorrelation-based objectives on foundation models, our results demonstrate that the projection head acts as a universal geometric buffer, decoupling the semantic backbone from the rigid, destructive constraints of the pretraining objective.

</details>


### [444] [OPTNet: Ordering Point Transformer Network for Post-disaster 3D Semantic Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17197)
*Nhut Le,Ehsan Karimi,Maryam Rahnemoonfar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: OPTNet提出了一种可学习的点排序模块，通过自监督排序损失动态预测最优排列，以提高点云Transformer在灾后场景中的语义分割效率和准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 灾后损伤评估需要快速准确的三维点云语义分割来识别关键基础设施。现有的点Transformer方法（如PTv3）采用静态序列化方法（如Hilbert曲线或Z-order）来组织无序点云以进行基于窗口的注意力计算，但这些固定排序无法有效捕捉灾害场景的复杂几何特征，限制了模型性能。

Method: 提出OPTNet（Ordering Point Transformer Network），引入可学习的点排序模块，通过自监督排序损失动态预测最优排列，最大化注意力机制的局部性，从而更有效地组织点云数据。

Result: 在3DAeroRelief数据集上评估，OPTNet显著优于现有最先进的基线方法，证明了其有效性。

Conclusion: 可学习的点排序方法能够更好地适应灾害场景的复杂几何特征，比静态排序方法在点云语义分割任务上表现更优，为灾后损伤评估提供了更有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Post-disaster damage assessment requires rapid and accurate semantic segmentation of 3D point clouds to identify critical infrastructure such as damaged buildings and roads. Early Point Transformers (e.g., PTv1, PTv2) relied on computationally expensive neighbor searching (k-NN) and Farthest Point Sampling (FPS). To improve efficiency, recent architectures like Point Transformer V3 (PTv3) adopted static serialization methods, such as Hilbert curves or Z-order, to organize unstructured points for window-based attention. However, these fixed orderings are not optimal for capturing the complex geometry of disaster scenes. In this paper, we propose OPTNet (Ordering Point Transformer Network), which introduces a learnable Point Sorter module. OPTNet utilizes a self-supervised ordering loss to dynamically predict an optimal permutation that maximizes the locality of the attention mechanism. We evaluate our method on the 3DAeroRelief dataset, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art baselines.

</details>


### [445] [Anytime and Difficulty-Adaptive PAC-Bayes for Constrained Density-Ratio Network with Continual Learning Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17212)
*Paulo Akira F. Enabe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个统一的协变量偏移学习框架，通过约束密度比网络近似Radon-Nikodym导数，支持重要性加权经验风险，并提供随时PAC-Bayes泛化保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在机器学习中，协变量偏移（训练和测试分布不同）是常见问题。传统方法缺乏统一的框架来同时处理密度比估计、重要性加权和泛化保证，需要一种能提供理论保证的实用方法。

Method: 1. 使用约束密度比网络近似源分布到目标分布的Radon-Nikodym导数
2. 通过增广拉格朗日方法施加三个硬积分约束：归一化、矩匹配、控制有效样本量的二阶矩惩罚
3. 在固定时间机制中实例化PAC-Bayes，得到Bernoulli-KL界和KL正则化目标
4. 在随时机制中通过几何剥离构建时间均匀证书
5. 采用预注册的两阶段协议：解析真值补丁测试+真实数据部署

Result: 1. 网络在真实数据上产生校准的协变量比
2. 相对于未加权经验风险最小化和经典直接比率估计基线，降低了目标0/1损失
3. 实现了随时证书的构建承诺
4. 记录了一次固定时间覆盖声明的失败，覆盖程度与标签偏移大小一一对应，证实协变量假设在操作上是紧的而非证书缺陷

Conclusion: 该框架为协变量偏移下的学习提供了统一的解决方案，结合了密度比估计、重要性加权和PAC-Bayes泛化保证，在理论和实践上都得到了验证，证明了协变量假设的操作紧性。

Abstract: A unified framework for learning under covariate shift is presented, in which a constrained density-ratio network approximates the Radon-Nikodym derivative $r^\star = dP/dQ$ from source $Q$ to target $P$, supports an importance-weighted empirical risk, and feeds an anytime PAC-Bayes generalization certificate. A change-of-measure identity decomposes the gap between target risk and importance-weighted source risk into a ratio-bias term, controlled by the $L^2(Q)$ closeness of the learned ratio to $r^\star$, and a generalization-gap term, controlled by the variability of the weighted loss. Three structural identities of a Radon-Nikodym derivative, normalization, moment matching, and a second-moment penalty controlling the effective sample size, are imposed as hard integral constraints through an augmented-Lagrangian scheme. PAC-Bayes is then instantiated on the weighted risk in a fixed-time regime that yields Bernoulli-KL bounds, a KL-regularized objective whose minimizer is the network-weighted Gibbs posterior, and a stability statement on $L^2(Q)$ perturbations of the learned ratio, and in an anytime regime that builds a time-uniform certificate by geometric peeling across epochs. A pre-registered two-campaign protocol combining a patch test against analytic ground truth with a real-data deployment under intrinsic distribution shift validates the framework. The network produces a calibrated covariate ratio on real data, reduces the target $0/1$ loss relative to unweighted empirical risk minimization and to classical direct ratio-estimation baselines, and attains the anytime certificate as the construction promises. A single pre-registered failure of the fixed-time coverage claim is recorded, with per-split coverage aligning one-to-one with the magnitude of the label shift, confirming that the covariate-only assumption is operationally tight rather than a defect of the certificate.

</details>


### [446] [FishBack: Pullback Fisher Geometry for Optimal Activation Steering in Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17231)
*Sihan Wang,Jiayi Zhao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出FishBack框架，通过引入Pullback Fisher度量来纠正激活空间欧几里得假设的缺陷，推导出最小失真方向的闭式解，在GPT-2上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有激活引导方法普遍假设语言模型的激活空间是欧几里得的，但作者发现这种假设存在严重缺陷：模型自身输出行为所诱导的局部几何（softmax层的Fisher信息度量通过后续层Jacobian拉回）与欧几里得度量偏差超过97%，有效维度仅为环境空间的2-17%。

Method: 从Pullback Fisher度量推导出闭式引导方程，识别任何目标概念的最小失真方向，得到每个点的闭式最优方向，可迭代应用而无需流形拟合或数据驱动的几何估计。该度量允许层间递归分解，揭示现有方法（CAA、ActAdd、ITI等）各自隐含采用特定近似度量。

Result: 在GPT-2上，迭代Pullback引导在三个动词形态概念和四个层上始终优于所有欧几里得基线，非目标KL减少相对于欧几里得梯度上升达到1.3-2.5倍，相对于CAA在匹配概念概率下达到1.5倍。单个光谱诊断可定量预测现有方法的性能差距。

Conclusion: 激活空间的非欧几里得几何至关重要，Pullback Fisher度量提供了理论基础和实用框架，FishBack方法在概念引导任务中显著优于现有技术，为激活引导方法提供了统一的几何视角。

Abstract: Activation steering methods modify intermediate representations of language models to control output behavior, but universally assume the activation space is Euclidean. We show this assumption fails drastically: the local geometry induced by the model's own output behavior -- the Fisher information metric of the softmax layer, pulled back through the Jacobian of subsequent layers -- deviates from the Euclidean metric by over 97% in relative spectral norm on GPT-2, with an effective dimensionality of only 2--17% of the ambient space. From this pullback Fisher metric, we derive a closed-form steering equation that identifies the minimum-distortion direction for any target concept, yielding a closed-form optimal direction at each point that can be applied iteratively without manifold fitting or data-driven geometry estimation. We call the resulting framework FishBack. The metric admits a layer-wise recursive decomposition, which reveals that existing methods -- CAA, ActAdd, ITI, and others -- each implicitly adopt a particular approximate metric, and that their performance gaps are quantitatively predicted by a single spectral diagnostic: the ratio of their implicit metric's cost to the Fisher-optimal cost. On GPT-2, iterative pullback steering consistently outperforms all Euclidean baselines across three verb-morphology concepts and four layers, with off-target KL reductions of $1.3\times$--$2.5\times$ relative to Euclidean gradient ascent and $1.5\times$ relative to CAA at matched concept probability.

</details>


### [447] [Dimension-Free Convergence of Discrete Diffusion Models: Adjoint Equations Induce the Right Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17232)
*Kelvin Kan,Xingjian Li,Benjamin J. Zhang,Tuhin Sahai,Stanley Osher,Markos A. Katsoulakis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个基于伴随方程的统一框架，为离散扩散模型建立了维度无关的收敛性保证，适用于任意积分概率度量，解决了现有KL散度和总变差分析在掩码先验和大词汇量下的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散扩散模型的收敛理论存在根本性限制：基于KL散度的分析在掩码分布等奇异先验下会发散，而基于总变差(TV)的边界依赖于状态空间大小S，对于包含数十万token的现代语言任务变得无效。需要建立维度无关的收敛性保证。

Method: 提出了基于伴随方程的统一框架，包含四个关键技术：1) 通过伴随方程在可观测空间而非概率测度空间工作；2) 正则性分析，为任意积分概率度量(IPM)提供边界；3) 耦合论证，消除均匀转移下的S依赖；4) 分数边际抵消技术，消除掩码转移下的S依赖。

Result: 建立了完全独立于状态空间大小S的维度无关收敛保证，适用于掩码和均匀先验，仅依赖于单个标准速率矩阵正则性假设，且兼容时间非均匀调度。这是第一个完全消除S依赖性的理论框架。

Conclusion: 该框架显著区别于先前分析，避免了路径空间KL和现有TV方法的缺点，不仅提供了收敛性边界，还为离散扩散模型的进一步理论研究提供了多功能工具包。

Abstract: Discrete diffusion has become a leading framework for generative modeling in various applications including language, vision, and biology. Existing convergence theory, however, exhibits fundamental limitations. KL-based analyses diverge under singular priors such as the masked distribution, while bounds in total variation (TV) depend on the state space size $S$ and become vacuous for modern language tasks, where vocabularies contain hundreds of thousands of tokens. We develop a unified adjoint-equation-based framework that establishes dimension-free convergence guarantees in any integral probability metric (IPM). To the best of our knowledge, our bounds are the first to be entirely free of $S$ and applicable to both masked and uniform priors. Importantly, our theory relies only on a single standard rate-matrix regularity assumption and is compatible with time-inhomogeneous schedules.
  Four novel techniques drive our improvements: working in the space of observables via adjoint equations rather than directly with probability measures, a regularity analysis that yields bounds on any IPM, a coupling argument that removes $S$-dependence under uniform transitions, and a score-marginal cancellation technique that removes $S$-dependence under masked transitions. Our framework thus sharply departs from prior analyses and avoids the shortcomings of pathspace-KL and existing TV-based approaches. Beyond convergence bounds, our framework provides a versatile toolkit for further theoretical study of discrete diffusion models.

</details>


### [448] [Active Budget Allocation for Efficient Scaling Law Estimation via Surrogate-Guided Pruning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17234)
*Viktoria Schram,Markus Hiller,Daniel Beck,Trevor Cohn*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究如何通过战略资源分配（特别是Successive Halving算法结合代理模型）来降低缩放定律研究的计算成本，同时获得更准确的损失-计算关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经验缩放定律研究需要大量计算资源，目前资源分配策略研究不足，需要更高效的方法来预测模型在大规模训练时的性能。

Method: 探索Successive Halving（SH）算法，结合参数化和非参数化代理模型，实现更系统的计算预算分配。

Result: SH结合代理模型能获得比传统均匀分配或纯SH方法更低的损失-计算值，在真实和合成学习曲线数据集上分别实现平均2.84%和5.47%的相对改进，计算成本降低高达98.7%。

Conclusion: 战略资源分配方法能显著降低缩放定律研究的计算成本，同时获得更准确的损失-计算关系，为模型训练策略和架构设计提供有效支持。

Abstract: Predicting model performance at larger scales enables the design of training strategies and architectures tailored to specific performance targets. Empirical scaling law research identifies functional forms to aid this prediction task. These describe the relationship between loss and compute using a loss-compute frontier defined by learning curves. Due to the empirical nature of this approach, the computational burden is substantial, making strategic resource allocation essential - yet it remains surprisingly underexplored. In this work, we address this shortcoming by exploring the suitability of Successive Halving (SH) and SH combined with parametric and non-parametric surrogate models. In addition to enabling a more systematic allocation of a given compute budget, our findings show that SH paired with surrogate models yields a set of learning curves that includes one with a lower loss-compute value than what naive uniform allocation or an SH-only approach can obtain. Our experiments demonstrate mean relative improvements of up to 2.84% and 5.47% on real-world and synthetic learning curve datasets. This strategic resource allocation enables us to obtain accurate scaling laws at significantly reduced computational costs, saving up to 98.7% over the traditional exhaustive approach.

</details>


### [449] [Learning in Position-Aware Multinomial Logit Bandits: From Multiplicative to General Position Effects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17238)
*Xi Chen,Shibo Dai,Jiameng Lyu,Yuan Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究动态联合商品选择与位置优化问题，在MNL选择框架下考虑商品吸引力受内在吸引力和展示位置的影响，提出了首个达到最优遗憾界的轮式学习算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代电商平台需要动态调整商品展示和位置布局以最大化收益，但现有研究要么假设固定位置效应，要么使用基于epoch的学习算法导致遗憾界不最优且响应速度慢。

Method: 针对乘法位置效应模型提出P2MLE-UCB算法，使用跨位置配对最大似然估计和截断机制；针对一般位置效应模型提出GP2-UCB算法；基于Dinkelbach方法和最大权二分图匹配设计每轮优化子程序。

Result: P2MLE-UCB达到$\tilde{O}(\sqrt{NT})$遗憾，匹配下界并填补了先前研究$\sqrt{K}$的差距；GP2-UCB达到最小最大最优遗憾界；实验验证在合成数据和Expedia数据集上优于现有基准。

Conclusion: 该研究首次为动态联合商品选择与位置优化问题提供了最优遗憾界算法，同时满足了现代平台对快速响应的需求，具有理论和实践双重贡献。

Abstract: We study the dynamic joint assortment selection and positioning problem, where the attraction of each product depends on both its intrinsic appeal and its display position under a Multinomial Logit (MNL) choice framework. Our study ranges from the multiplicative position effects model, in which each product's attraction is scaled by a position-specific factor, to a general position effects model assigning independent attraction parameters to every product--position pair to capture heterogeneous synergies. For both models, we design round-based learning algorithms that update decisions after every single feedback, and establish the first regret-optimal characterization. Besides, our round-based algorithms provide the prompt operations needed by modern platforms. For the multiplicative model, we develop a cross-position pairwise maximum likelihood estimator with a clipping mechanism, and prove that our algorithm P2MLE-UCB attains a regret of $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{NT})$, matching the lower bound and closing the $\sqrt{K}$ gap left by prior epoch-based analyses. For the general model, we establish a minimax lower bound and propose GP2-UCB with a matching upper bound. Moreover, we design an efficient subroutine for the per-round joint assortment and positioning optimization based on Dinkelbach's method and maximum-weight bipartite matching. Numerical experiments on synthetic data and the Expedia dataset show that our algorithms consistently outperform state-of-the-art benchmarks.

</details>


### [450] [Drift Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17244)
*Chenrui Ma,Xi Xiao,Lin Zhao,Tianyang Wang,Ferdinando Fioretto,Yanning Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DFM框架将漂移模型的高效单步生成与流匹配的多步迭代生成相结合，提供可调节的计算-质量权衡


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 漂移模型虽然能高效实现单步生成，但缺乏流匹配和扩散模型那样的推理时计算扩展能力；而流匹配方法需要多步迭代，计算成本较高。需要一种既能保持单步生成效率，又能在需要时通过多步迭代提升质量的灵活框架。

Method: 提出Drift Flow Matching (DFM)框架，将漂移生成建模与基于流的迭代生成相结合。该方法保留了直接传输映射的效率，同时允许在需要时通过多个推理步骤来细化生成结果。

Result: 在不同任务和数据集上的广泛实验证明了DFM框架的有效性和通用性。该框架成功桥接了单步漂移模型和多步流匹配方法之间的差距。

Conclusion: DFM提供了一种新颖的生成范式，可以根据不同的质量-效率需求自适应地调整采样计算，为生成模型提供了灵活的计算-质量权衡方案。

Abstract: Iterative generative models such as Flow Matching and Diffusion models have demonstrated strong test-time scaling behavior, where additional inference computation can improve generation quality. In contrast, Drift Models offer efficient one-step generation, but their direct generation paradigm limits such flexibility. In this work, we propose Drift Flow Matching (DFM), a framework that connects drifting generative modeling with flow-based iterative generation. DFM preserves the efficiency of direct transport maps while enabling generation to be refined through multiple inference steps when desired. This bridges the gap between one-step Drift Models and multi-step Flow Matching methods, and provides a novel generative paradigm that can adapt sampling computation to different quality--efficiency requirements. Extensive experiments across different tasks and datasets demonstrate the effectiveness and generality of the proposed framework.

</details>


### [451] [Fidelity Probes for Specification--Code Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17246)
*Ferhat Erata,Hao Zhou,Luke Huan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种通过"保真度探针"来评估和提升软件规范与代码一致性的方法，使用自然语言问题生成和回答来量化规范与代码的匹配程度，并在COBOL基准测试中验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在软件开发中，确保规范（specification）与代码实现的一致性至关重要。传统方法难以量化这种一致性，且缺乏系统化的迭代改进机制。作者旨在解决如何客观评估和提升规范与代码之间的保真度问题。

Method: 提出"保真度探针"方法：从参考工件（代码）生成自然语言问题，并基于规范生成答案。通过计算"保真度"（一致探针的比例）来量化一致性。该方法将保真度分解为矛盾率和覆盖缺口率，指导针对性规范编辑。使用LLM读取代码或静态分析管道（控制流、数据流、系统依赖图）生成探针，并采用探针重采样协议防止过拟合。

Result: 在15个程序、约12k行COBOL代码的AWS CardDemo基准测试中，通过8次迭代将冻结测试规范的保真度从0.63提升到0.94。使用四轮迭代数据即可通过两状态马尔可夫固定点预测平台位置。图基混合方法提升保真度16-30个百分点。交叉分布评估显示LLM和符号通道具有互补性。跨五个LLM家族的生成器扫描验证了收敛行为不依赖于单一模型家族。

Conclusion: 保真度探针方法为评估和提升规范与代码一致性提供了有效框架。该方法能够量化一致性、指导迭代改进、防止过拟合，并且适用于任何描述相同行为的工件对。收敛行为具有跨模型家族的普适性，为软件工程中的规范验证提供了新工具。

Abstract: We introduce fidelity probes: natural-language questions generated from a reference artifact with code-derived ground-truth answers, answered from a candidate specification. The fraction of agreeing probes, which we call the fidelity, decomposes into contradiction and coverage-gap rates that drive targeted spec edits to convergence. On a 15-program, roughly 12k-line COBOL benchmark (AWS CardDemo), we raise frozen-test specification fidelity from 0.63 to 0.94 over eight iterations, with the plateau location predicted by a two-state Markov fixed point $F^\dagger$ from just four iterations of rate data. Probes come from an LLM reading the code or from a static-analysis pipeline over its control-flow, data-flow, and system-dependence graphs, with a tunable mixture. A probe-resampling protocol with a frozen held-out set gives a Hoeffding-bounded overfitting discriminant; our measured train/test gap stays more than an order of magnitude below this envelope. Three graph-grounded mixtures lift fidelity by +16 to +30 points; cross-distribution evaluation shows the LLM and symbolic channels are empirically complementary. A cross-family generator sweep on five independent LLM lineages (Anthropic, DeepSeek, Google, Alibaba, OpenAI) confirms the convergence behaviour is not tied to any single model family: three of five non-Claude generators produce trajectories consistent with the Markov fixed-point prediction, and the frozen-test protocol actively falsifies the two generators whose probe distributions drift across iterations. The method applies to any pair of artifacts that are supposed to describe the same behaviour.

</details>


### [452] [Towards Principled Test-Time Adaptation for Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17250)
*Haochun Wang,Ruichen Xu,Georgios Kementzidis,Karen Cho,Sebastian Ramirez Villarreal,Yuefan Deng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从协议清洁度角度重新审视时间序列预测的测试时适应（TSF-TTA），提出基于成熟真实值的适应协议，并设计频率感知校准（FAC）方法，在频域直接参数化预测修正，实现高效且一致的性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有TSF-TTA方法在利用已揭示目标方面存在差异，导致适应协议异质且缺乏统一表述。本文旨在解决这一问题，从协议清洁度角度重新审视TSF-TTA，为适应提供更原则性的设置。

Method: 提出基于成熟真实值的适应协议，并在该协议下诊断现有适配器在频域的表现。基于诊断结果，设计频率感知校准（FAC）方法，直接在频域参数化预测修正。

Result: FAC在多样化数据集、预测视野和源预测器上实现了竞争性且一致的性能，同时相比其他TSF-TTA适配器需要更少的可训练参数。

Conclusion: 本文提出的基于成熟真实值的适应协议为TSF-TTA提供了更清洁的设置，而FAC方法通过频域直接校准实现了高效且有效的预测修正，为时间序列预测的测试时适应提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: Test-time adaptation (TTA) has recently emerged as a promising approach for improving time series forecasting (TSF) under distribution shift. Existing TSF-TTA methods differ in how they utilize revealed targets, yet the resulting adaptation protocols remain heterogeneous and lack a clearly unified formulation. To address this issue, we revisit TSF-TTA from the perspective of protocol cleanliness and propose an adaptation protocol based solely on matured ground truth, yielding a more principled setting for adaptation. Under this protocol, we further diagnose existing adapters in the frequency domain and find that their prediction corrections often exhibit limited and weakly structured spectral modifications. Motivated by this diagnosis, we propose Frequency-Aware Calibration (FAC), a lightweight calibration method that directly parameterizes prediction corrections in the frequency domain. Across diverse datasets, forecasting horizons, and source forecasters, FAC achieves competitive and consistent performance while requiring substantially fewer trainable parameters than the compared TSF-TTA adapters.

</details>


### [453] [When Molecular Similarity Works: Property Cliffs Reveal Hidden Errors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17265)
*Di Hu,Kun Li,Haojie Rao,Longtao Hu,Jiameng Chen,Wenbin Hu,Yizhen Zheng,Jiajun Yu,Duanhua Cao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出CliffSplit评估协议和CliffLoss训练机制，以检测和缓解分子机器学习中分子相似性失效问题，特别是在性质悬崖区域


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前分子性质预测模型虽然整体性能良好，但在局部失效模式（特别是性质悬崖区域）存在严重问题，而标准的整体评估指标无法检测这些局部失效

Method: 提出CliffSplit：一种悬崖感知的评估协议，构建局部支持、悬崖暴露的测试用例；CliffLoss：一种模型无关的训练机制，专门针对悬崖敏感错误进行缓解

Result: 在三个QM9目标和三个MoleculeNet任务上实验表明：CliffSplit在悬崖密集的QM9区域揭示至少15%更高的误差；CliffLoss在Lipophilicity任务上将悬崖-平滑误差差距减少30%，整体MAE提升9.7%

Conclusion: 该研究将分子相似性失效从描述性异常转变为分子机器学习的基准评估问题，提供了检测和缓解局部失效模式的有效方法

Abstract: Accurate prediction of molecular properties underpins drug discovery and material design, yet even state-of-the-art models remain vulnerable to localized failure modes that aggregate metrics cannot detect. The places where molecular similarity should be most helpful are also places where standard evaluation can be most misleading. Property cliffs expose this gap: structurally similar molecules can still differ sharply in target property, so models with competitive overall performance may fail in high-risk local neighborhoods. To expose and mitigate this failure mode, CliffSplit, a cliff-aware evaluation protocol that constructs locally supported, cliff-exposed test cases, and CliffLoss, a model-agnostic train-only mitigation mechanism for cliff-sensitive errors, are introduced. Experiments on three QM9 targets and three MoleculeNet tasks across five backbones show that CliffSplit reveals at least 15% higher error in cliff-heavy QM9 regions, while CliffLoss reduces the cliff-to-smooth error gap by up to 30% on Lipophilicity and improves overall MAE by 9.7%. Together, these results turn molecular similarity failure from a descriptive anomaly into a benchmarked evaluation problem for molecular machine learning. The code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Cliff_Loss.

</details>


### [454] [Calibeating for general proper losses: A Bregman divergence approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17269)
*Maximilian Fichtl,Cristóbal Guzmán,Nishant A. Mehta*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个基于遗憾最小化的通用校准框架，扩展了Foster和Hart的校准工作，涵盖了α-Tsallis损失（α∈[1,2]）和Lipschitz损失等一大类适当损失函数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Foster和Hart的校准工作主要针对Brier评分（平方损失）和对数损失，缺乏对更广泛损失函数族的统一处理。本文旨在建立一个更通用的校准框架，能够同时处理包括α-Tsallis损失和Lipschitz损失在内的一大类适当损失函数。

Method: 采用基于Bregman散度的适当损失视角，提出了一个基于遗憾最小化的通用校准框架。技术分析围绕U-校准结果展开，同时为所有Tsallis损失函数族获得对数遗憾，并且相比先前结果具有更弱的维度依赖性。还展示了"Be The Regularized Leader"的遗憾等式，该等式基于广义方差（基于Bregman散度的方差泛化）的在线更新公式。

Result: 为所考虑的Tsallis损失函数族获得了U-校准结果，同时为所有该族损失函数获得了对数遗憾，且维度依赖性比先前结果更弱。还证明了"Be The Regularized Leader"的新遗憾等式，该等式适用于一般适当损失函数。

Conclusion: 本文建立了一个基于遗憾最小化的通用校准框架，扩展了现有校准理论的范围。通过Bregman散度视角，能够统一处理包括α-Tsallis损失和Lipschitz损失在内的一大类适当损失函数，同时获得了改进的理论结果。新提出的遗憾等式也为在线学习算法分析提供了有用的工具。

Abstract: This work introduces a general framework for calibeating based on regret minimization. As compared to Foster and Hart's seminal calibeating work which had specialized treatments of Brier score (squared loss) and log loss, we consider a large family of proper losses that includes $α$-Tsallis losses (for $α\in [1, 2]$) and Lipschitz losses. Our results for Tsallis losses also hold for an unscaled version of Tsallis loss that recovers log loss. Our analysis is oriented around the Bregman divergence view of a proper loss. Technically, our results for the family of Tsallis losses that we consider are U-calibration results, simultaneously obtaining logarithmic regret for all losses in this family while having a weaker dependence on the dimension compared to previous results. Of potential independent interest, we also show a new regret equality for the regret of Be The Regularized Leader. This regret equality holds for general proper losses and itself is based on two results related to online updating formulas for the generalized variance, the latter being a previously introduced generalization of variance based on Bregman divergences.

</details>


### [455] [State-of-the-Art Claims Require State-of-the-Art Evidence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17273)
*YongKyung Oh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文指出AI领域广泛存在的SOTA声明与证据之间的差距，发现基于平均分提升的SOTA声明往往无法支持模型真正优越性的隐含假设，因为提升可能仅由个别数据集驱动而非整体性能优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI/ML研究中普遍存在基于基准测试平均分的SOTA声明，但这些最小化证据往往无法支持"模型在大多数任务上真正优于替代方案"的强声明，存在声明与证据之间的系统性差距。

Method: 分析十个跨领域基准测试的公共排行榜数据，检验SOTA声明隐含的假设：有意义的效应大小、跨任务一致性、数据集移除的鲁棒性。通过实证分析揭示平均分提升的实际驱动因素。

Result: 超过一半的顶级模型比较中，至少一个通常假定的优越性属性不成立。聚合增益通常由离群数据集驱动，即使在多任务基准测试中这种脆弱性依然存在。

Conclusion: 声明语言应反映底层证据的强度，无需额外实验，只需诚实地报告结果实际显示的内容，从而实现更精确和可解释的模型比较。

Abstract: State-of-the-Art (SOTA) claims pervade Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) research. These claims rest on benchmark evaluations, where models are ranked by aggregate scores across tasks. Public benchmarks or leaderboards are the most visible instance, but the same structure appears in paper tables throughout the literature. However, such minimal evidence often cannot support these strong claims. We identify a widespread claim-evidence gap in AI benchmarking. Claiming SOTA carries implicit assumptions beyond mean score superiority, suggesting that a model meaningfully outperforms alternatives across most tasks. However, a marginal improvement in the mean score merely indicates a top average rank rather than true superiority. Analyzing ten cross-domain benchmarks from public leaderboards, we found that in more than half of top-model comparisons, at least one commonly assumed property of superiority does not hold. These properties include meaningful effect size, consistency across tasks, or robustness to dataset removal. Instead, aggregate gains are frequently driven by outlier datasets. This fragility persists even in benchmarks with many tasks. We argue that claim language should reflect the strength of the underlying evidence. This requires no additional experiments, only honest reporting of what results actually show, enabling more precise and interpretable comparisons across models.

</details>


### [456] [How Do Electrocardiogram Models Scale?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17276)
*Jiawei Li,Fabio Bonassi,Ming Jin,Stefan Gustafsson,Johan Sundström,Thomas B. Schön,Antônio H. Ribeiro*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究系统探索了心电图（ECG）领域的扩展规律，比较了ResNet与Transformer架构以及监督学习与自监督学习预训练范式，发现自监督学习在数据效率和迁移效率上显著优于监督学习，ResNet在分布外泛化上比Transformer更参数高效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩展规律在自然语言处理的基础模型研究中已建立基本框架，但在心电图模型中的应用仍不明确。近期研究显示增加模型规模或预训练数据量并不总能带来一致的下游性能提升，因此需要系统研究架构归纳偏差、预训练范式以及规模扩展对ECG模型的影响。

Method: 在CODE数据集（230万条记录）上预训练了超过120个模型（参数范围从2万到2亿），解耦了模型架构（ResNet vs Transformer）和预训练范式（监督学习 vs 自监督学习）的影响，系统研究了ECG领域的神经扩展和损失扩展规律。

Result: 1) 监督学习模型在分布内受数据瓶颈限制，而自监督学习模型在模型和数据规模上都能稳健扩展；2) 在分布外泛化方面，ResNet比Transformer参数效率高1.3-2.5倍，自监督学习比监督学习数据效率高16倍，在未见临床任务上迁移效率高7.6倍；3) 在观察到的规模范围内，ResNet模型通常获得最低的分布外损失，自监督学习在未见临床任务上占优，自监督Transformer在非常大模型规模时超越。

Conclusion: 构建有效的ECG基础模型需要策略性地对齐架构和范式，而非单纯依赖暴力扩展。研究结果为ECG基础模型的发展提供了重要指导。

Abstract: While scaling laws have established a fundamental framework for foundation models in natural language processing, their applicability to electrocardiogram (ECG) models remains poorly characterized. Indeed, recent studies do not always yield consistent downstream gains as one increases the model size or pre-training dataset size of ECG models, leaving the exact roles of architectural inductive biases, pre-training paradigms, and expected improvements with size largely unanswered. In this work, we systematically investigate neural and loss-to-loss scaling laws within the ECG domain. By pre-training over $120$ models (ranging from $20$K to $200$M parameters) on the large-scale CODE dataset ($2.3$M records), we decouple the effects of model architecture (ResNet vs. Transformer) and pre-training paradigm, namely supervised learning (SL) versus self-supervised learning (SSL). We found that (i) SL models are data-bottlenecked in-distribution, whereas SSL models scale robustly across both model and data sizes; (ii) for out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization, ResNets are $1.3$ to $2.5$ times more parameter-efficient than Transformers, while SSL is up to $16$ times more data-efficient and achieves up to $7.6$ times higher transfer efficiency than SL on unseen clinical tasks; (iii) across the observed scales, ResNet-based models generally achieve the lowest OOD loss, with SSL dominating on unseen clinical tasks and self-supervised Transformers overtaking at very large model sizes. Our results suggest that the path to effective ECG foundation models lies in the strategic alignment of architecture and paradigm rather than brute-force scaling.

</details>


### [457] [UNR-Explainer: Counterfactual Explanations for Unsupervised Node Representation Learning Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17285)
*Hyunju Kang,Geonhee Han,Hogun Park*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出UNR-Explainer方法，为无监督节点表示学习生成反事实解释，通过蒙特卡洛树搜索识别关键子图，解释基于k近邻的下游任务


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图神经网络等节点表示学习方法在机器学习中日益重要，但无监督模型的解释生成需求尚未得到充分探索。现有方法缺乏对无监督学习场景的解释能力，需要填补这一空白。

Method: 提出UNR-Explainer方法，基于蒙特卡洛树搜索生成反事实解释。通过扰动节点并观察其在嵌入空间中k近邻的显著变化，识别导致这种变化的最重要子图。

Result: 在多种数据集上对无监督GraphSAGE和DGI方法进行测试，UNR-Explainer表现出优越性能，能够为top-k链接预测和聚类等无监督下游任务提供关键解释信息。

Conclusion: 该方法填补了无监督节点表示学习解释方法的空白，为理解基于k近邻的下游任务提供了简单而关键的洞察，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Node representation learning, such as Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), has emerged as a pivotal method in machine learning. The demand for reliable explanation generation surges, yet unsupervised models remain underexplored. To bridge this gap, we introduce a method for generating counterfactual (CF) explanations in unsupervised node representation learning. We identify the most important subgraphs that cause a significant change in the k-nearest neighbors of a node of interest in the learned embedding space upon perturbation. The k-nearest neighbor-based CF explanation method provides simple, yet pivotal, information for understanding unsupervised downstream tasks, such as top-k link prediction and clustering. Consequently, we introduce UNR-Explainer for generating expressive CF explanations for Unsupervised Node Representation learning methods based on a Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS). The proposed method demonstrates superior performance on diverse datasets for unsupervised GraphSAGE and DGI.

</details>


### [458] [LEAP: Learnable End-to-End Adaptive Pruning of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17289)
*Mohammad Mozaffari,Younes Hourri,Mohammad Rastegari,Mahyar Najibi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LEAP提出了一种用于LLM无结构化稀疏化的端到端掩码学习方法，通过伯努利分布的Gumbel-sigmoid松弛取代了传统的基于模式的分类参数化，显著提升了高稀疏度下的精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着GPU硬件对无结构化稀疏的原生支持，推理执行不再是瓶颈，剪枝算法成为关键。现有的无结构化LLM剪枝方法基于层级的代理方法，在激进稀疏度下会牺牲端到端精度，而现有的端到端方法（如MaskLLM和PATCH）的参数化方式无法扩展到无结构化设置

Method: LEAP使用基于每个权重的伯努利分布的Gumbel-sigmoid松弛来参数化掩码，取代了传统基于模式分类的参数化方法，使得端到端的无结构化掩码学习变得可行

Result: 在5个LLM家族（0.5B到8B参数）上，在50%和60%稀疏度下，LEAP相比最佳层级基线ADMM，将六任务平均零样本准确率平均提升了2.59个百分点

Conclusion: LEAP通过新颖的伯努利- Gumbel-sigmoid松弛参数化，实现了端到端的无结构化掩码学习，在高稀疏度下显著提升了LLM的精度，解决了现有方法在无结构化设置下的可扩展性问题

Abstract: Unstructured sparsity is now natively accelerated by recent GPU kernels and dataflow hardware, shifting the bottleneck from inference execution to the pruning algorithm. State-of-the-art methods for unstructured LLM pruning are layer-wise surrogates derived from the Optimal Brain Surgeon principle, and they sacrifice end-to-end accuracy, especially under aggressive sparsity. End-to-end alternatives such as MaskLLM and PATCH show that learnable masks can close this gap, but their categorical-over-patterns parameterization scales with the number of valid masks per row and does not port to the unstructured setting. We introduce LEAP, which replaces this intractable parameterization with a per-weight Bernoulli-via-Gumbel- sigmoid relaxation that makes end-to-end unstructured mask learning tractable. Across five LLM families from 0.5B to 8B parameters at 50% and 60% sparsity, LEAP improves six-task average zero-shot accuracy by +2.59 points on average over ADMM, the best layer-wise baseline in our sweep.

</details>


### [459] [Step-wise Rubric Rewards for LLM Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17291)
*Weichu Xie,Haozhe Zhao,Wenpu Liu,Yongfu Zhu,Liang Chen,Minghao Ye,Zirong Chen,Yuqi Xu,Shuai Dong,Ziyue Wang,Xinbo Xu,Kean Shi,Ruoyu Wu,Xiaoying Zhang,Wenqi Shao,Baobao Chang,Nan Duan,Jiaqi Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SRaR（Step-wise Rubrics as Rewards）是一种改进的强化学习框架，通过将评分标准细粒度分配到每个推理步骤，解决了传统方法在中间步骤监督不足的问题，提高了数学推理的准确性和忠实推理率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLVR方法只奖励最终答案正确性，缺乏对中间步骤的监督。Rubric-based方法（如RaR）虽然引入结构化评分标准，但仍将多个评分项聚合为单一标量，导致三个问题：1）丢失多标准结构信息；2）对正确和错误步骤给予统一监督；3）通过无限制自我修正导致奖励黑客攻击。研究发现，在正确答案的响应中，18.2%的步骤是错误的却得到正向奖励；在错误答案的响应中，49.9%的步骤是正确的却受到惩罚。

Method: SRaR框架包含三个关键创新：1）使用LLM法官将每个评分标准项归因到特定的推理步骤；2）在多个rollout中归一化每个步骤的评分，使得只有质量变化的步骤产生学习信号；3）通过解耦的优势估计器将每步奖励与结果奖励结合，保持结果基线的稳定性。此外，通过从强模型中采样正确和有缺陷的推理路径，对比性蒸馏出评分标准项，构建了包含16K问题的评分标准数据集。

Result: 在六个数学推理基准测试中，SRaR相比RaR在Qwen3-8B上平均准确率提高了3.57分，在Qwen3-32B上提高了2.75分。在AIME 2025上，忠实推理率从34.5%提升到46.7%，自我修正循环从48.1%降低到26.5%。

Conclusion: SRaR通过细粒度的步骤级监督有效改进了推理质量，减少了奖励黑客攻击，提高了模型的忠实推理能力和整体性能。该方法为解决RLVR中的中间步骤监督问题提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) is widely used to improve reasoning in large language models, but rewards only final-answer correctness with no supervision over intermediate steps. Rubric-based methods such as Rubrics as Rewards (RaR) introduce finer-grained supervision by scoring rollouts against structured criteria, yet the rubric scores are still aggregated into a single scalar applied to the entire response, causing three weaknesses: loss of multi-criterion structure, uniform supervision of correct and incorrect steps, and reward hacking through unbounded self-correction. On 1,000 problems, we find 18.2% of steps in correct-answer responses are wrong yet positively rewarded, while 49.9% of steps in incorrect-answer responses are correct yet penalized. We introduce Step-wise Rubrics as Rewards (SRaR), an RLVR framework that (i) uses an LLM judge to attribute each rubric item to a specific reasoning step, (ii) normalizes per-step rubric scores across rollouts so only steps whose quality varies produce a learning signal, and (iii) combines the per-step reward with the outcome reward through a decoupled advantage estimator that keeps the outcome baseline stable. We further build a 16K-problem rubric dataset by contrastively distilling rubric items from correct and flawed reasoning paths sampled from a strong model. Across six mathematical reasoning benchmarks, SRaR improves average accuracy over RaR by 3.57 points on Qwen3-8B and 2.75 points on Qwen3-32B, raises the Faithful Reasoning Rate on AIME 2025 from 34.5% to 46.7%, and reduces self-correction looping from 48.1% to 26.5%.

</details>


### [460] [DISA: Offline Importance Sampling for Distribution-Matching LLM-RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17295)
*Shaobo Wang,Yujie Chen,Yafeng Sun,Wenjie Qiu,Zhihui Xie,Sihang Li,Yucheng Li,Huiqiang Jiang,Xingzhang Ren,Xuming Hu,Dayiheng Liu,Linfeng Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DISA是一种新的分布匹配RL方法，通过离线估计分区函数并将其与策略优化解耦，解决了在线分布匹配方法中分区函数校准误差直接影响策略更新的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代推理代理需要为给定输入生成多个有效解决方案路径，但标准RL倾向于收敛到最容易强化的高奖励模式。现有分布匹配方法在线学习分区函数，其校准误差会直接扭曲策略更新且无法独立诊断。

Method: DISA（解耦重要性采样锚定）将分区函数校准移出RL循环：1）离线抽取提议轨迹；2）通过重要性采样估计分区函数；3）冻结分区函数估计后开始策略优化。这种方法在数据、梯度、损失和诊断方面严格分离了分区函数估计和策略学习。

Result: 在6个数学和3个代码基准测试中，DISA匹配或超越了在线耦合分布匹配基线FlowRL，在数学平均上优于奖励最大化基线GRPO和GSPO，在相同离线轨迹上超过LoRASFT蒸馏最多13.8 Mean@8分。LLM作为法官的评估显示DISA比奖励最大化基线保留了更多策略级多样性。

Conclusion: DISA通过解耦分区函数估计和策略优化，解决了在线分布匹配方法的校准问题，在保持分布匹配目标的同时实现了更好的性能和多样性保留。

Abstract: Modern reasoning agents are increasingly evaluated on their ability to generate multiple valid solution paths, plans, or tool-use traces for a given input. Standard reward-maximizing RL tends to collapse onto the most easily reinforced high-reward mode, whereas distribution-matching RL aims to allocate probability mass across the entire reward-shaped solution set. Achieving this objective requires computing a prompt-dependent partition function over the trajectory space. Because existing distribution-matching methods learn this partition function online alongside the policy, calibration errors in the partition function directly distort policy updates and remain impossible to diagnose independently. We introduce DISA, short for Decoupled Importance-Sampled Anchoring, which moves this calibration problem outside the RL loop. DISA draws proposal trajectories offline, estimates the partition function via importance sampling, and freezes the resulting partition-function estimate before policy optimization begins. This decoupling preserves the distribution-matching objective while strictly separating partition-function estimation from policy learning in data, gradients, loss, and diagnostics. Empirically, on two open-weight backbones across six math and three code benchmarks, DISA matches or exceeds the online-coupled distribution-matching baseline FlowRL, outperforms rewardmaximization baselines GRPO and GSPO on math averages, and exceeds LoRASFT distillation by up to 13.8 Mean@8 points on the same offline trajectories. An LLM-as-judge evaluation further shows that DISA retains substantially more strategy-level diversity than reward-maximization baselines, and sensitivity studies on the proposal strength and inverse temperature follow the bias-variance pattern predicted by the analysis.

</details>


### [461] [Compress the Context, Keep the Commitments: A Formal Framework for Verifiable LLM Context Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17304)
*Natalia Trukhina,Vadim Vashkelis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出Context Codec框架，将LLM上下文视为承诺而非单纯token，通过语义原子表示对话状态，实现可验证的上下文压缩


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有上下文管理方法（截断、检索、摘要等）主要关注token级压缩，但忽略了对话中积累的目标、约束、决策、偏好等语义承诺必须被保留。需要能明确指定哪些语义承诺必须被保留以及如何衡量其保留程度的框架。

Method: 提出Context Codec框架，将对话状态表示为类型化、有来源依据的语义原子，具有规范身份、等价性、冲突、置信度、风险和证据跨度。分离五个关注点：提取、规范化、表示、渲染和验证，并引入关键原子召回率、加权原子召回率、承诺密度和往返可恢复性等指标。还定义了语义压缩错误分类、具体规范化过程、低置信度和安全关键原子的保守回退规则，以及Context Compression Language（CCL）紧凑渲染格式。

Result: 在小型诊断研究中，CCL-Core在结构化散文和JSON之间找到了有用的中间地带：比散文更明确和可审计，通常比JSON更紧凑，比高度压缩的表示法风险更小。框架使上下文压缩可验证，实现了"压缩对话，保留承诺"的目标。

Conclusion: Context Codec提供了一个可验证的上下文压缩框架，将对话视为承诺集合而非token序列，通过语义原子表示和系统化方法确保关键承诺在压缩过程中得以保留，为解决LLM长对话上下文管理问题提供了新思路。

Abstract: LLM context is not just tokens; it is a set of commitments. Long-running conversations accumulate goals, constraints, decisions, preferences, tool results, retrieved evidence, artifacts, and safety boundaries that future responses must preserve. Existing context-management methods reduce length through truncation, retrieval, summarization, memory systems, or token-level prompt compression, but they rarely specify which semantic commitments must survive compression or how their preservation should be measured. We propose Context Codec, a commitment-level framework for compressing prompts and chat histories.
  Context Codec represents dialogue state as typed, source-grounded semantic atoms with canonical identity, equivalence, conflict, confidence, risk, and evidence spans. It separates five concerns - extraction, normalization, representation, rendering, and verification - and introduces metrics for Critical Atom Recall, Weighted Atom Recall, Commitment Density, and round-trip recoverability. It also defines a taxonomy of semantic compression errors, a concrete normalization procedure, conservative fallback rules for low-confidence and safety-critical atoms, and Context Compression Language (CCL), an ASCII-first compact rendering of canonical JSON atoms. In a small diagnostic study, CCL-Core occupies a useful middle ground between structured prose and JSON: more explicit and auditable than prose, usually more compact than JSON, and less risky than heavily minified notation. The result is not a claim that shorthand solves compression, but a framework for making context compression verifiable: compress the conversation, keep the commitments.

</details>


### [462] [Learning Higher-Order Structure from Incomplete Spatiotemporal Data: Multi-Scale Hypergraph Laplacians with Neural Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17316)
*Keshu Wu,Sixu Li,Zihao Li,Zhiwen Fan,Xiaopeng Li,Yang Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MSHL框架通过多尺度超图学习高阶结构，处理传感器网络中结构化缺失数据，相比传统方法在多种缺失模式下表现更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传感器网络数据缺失通常不是均匀随机模式，而是结构化缺失（如校准期间离线、集群传感器同时失效等），传统基于低秩或图的方法无法有效捕捉这种高阶关系结构。

Method: 提出两阶段框架：1) 发现阶段：从拓扑和残差相关证据构建多尺度超图，使用仅观测选择器适应交互尺度；2) 精炼阶段：添加小型超图条件残差网络，安全地学习非线性修正。

Result: 在真实交通网络上评估五种缺失率下的分散单元缺失、连续块中断和全传感器中断，MSHL在可识别高阶结构时优于成对图基线，否则在采样噪声内匹配基线性能。

Conclusion: 缺失数据应被视为待发现的结构证据而非孤立填充条目，MSHL证明了高阶结构学习对基础设施可靠学习的重要性。

Abstract: Sensor networks increasingly govern modern infrastructure, yet the data they lose are rarely missing in the uniform-random patterns assumed by standard imputation benchmarks. Loop detectors go offline during calibration, roadside cabinets silence clusters of nearby sensors, and newly installed instruments provide no history. Such failures create structured absences whose values are constrained by higher-order relations among groups of sensors, not merely by pairwise proximity. Existing low-rank and graph-based methods often miss this collective structure and can fail when missingness becomes coherent. We introduce Multi-Scale Hypergraph Laplacians (MSHL), a two-stage framework for learning higher-order structure from incomplete spatiotemporal observations. The Discovery stage builds a multi-scale hypergraph from complementary topology and residual-correlation evidence, with an observation-only selector that adapts to the supported interaction scale. The Refinement stage adds a small hypergraph-conditioned residual network that is safe by construction: it learns nonlinear corrections where informative residual features exist and defers to the linear estimate where they do not. We prove that MSHL represents group-conservation patterns inaccessible to pairwise graph priors, adapts to the best fixed scale up to a logarithmic factor, transfers this advantage to held-out imputation error, and admits a one-sided refinement guarantee. On two real traffic networks evaluated across scattered cell missingness, contiguous block outages, and whole-sensor blackouts at five rates, MSHL improves over a pairwise-graph baseline whenever higher-order structure is identifiable and otherwise matches it within sampling noise. The results point to a broader principle for reliable infrastructure learning: missing data should be treated not as isolated entries to fill, but as evidence of structure to discover.

</details>


### [463] [Leveraging Error Diversity in Group Rollouts for Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17333)
*Wenpu Liu,Yuqi Xu,Weichu Xie,Yongfu Zhu,Shuai Dong,Ziyue Wang,Wenqi Shao,Xiaoying Zhang,Tong Yang,Nan Duan,Jiaqi Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EDAS是一种通过利用错误多样性来增强RLVR性能的轻量级技术，它根据组内错误多样性调整错误响应的优势信号，从而鼓励多样化的推理路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RLVR方法在采样多个响应时，只关注单个响应的正确性，而忽略了组内错误分布的结构信息。研究发现错误多样性是训练成功的重要预测因子，具有多样化错误的问题比产生同质错误的问题从RLVR中获益更多。

Method: 提出错误多样性优势塑造（EDAS）技术，这是一种轻量级、算法无关的方法。它根据组内错误多样性调整错误响应的优势信号：对主导的、重复的错误施加更强的惩罚，对罕见的、探索性的错误减轻惩罚。EDAS可以作为简单的后处理调整无缝集成到任何RLVR算法中。

Result: 在多个主流RLVR方法和七个具有挑战性的数学基准测试中，EDAS都表现出一致的改进。特别是在Qwen3-8B模型上，EDAS在七个基准测试中平均比DAPO提高了6.29分。

Conclusion: 利用组内rollouts中的潜在信息是增强RLVR效果的有效策略。EDAS通过关注错误多样性，能够鼓励模型保持多样化的推理路径，防止错误固化，从而显著提升RLVR的性能。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) typically samples multiple responses per prompt and assigns binary rewards based on individual correctness, yet the collective structure of the group output, specifically the distribution of errors, is largely discarded. We identify this as a missed opportunity: empirical analysis reveals that error diversity within a group is a strong predictor of training success, with problems eliciting diverse wrong answers benefiting substantially more from RLVR than those producing homogeneous failures. Motivated by this observation, we propose Error Diversity Advantage Shaping (EDAS), a lightweight, algorithm-agnostic technique that modulates the advantage signal for incorrect rollouts based on intra-group error diversity. EDAS amplifies penalties for dominant, repeated errors and attenuates penalties for rare, exploratory ones, thereby encouraging the model to maintain diverse reasoning paths and discouraging error perseveration. Crucially, EDAS operates as a simple post-hoc adjustment that can be seamlessly integrated into any RLVR algorithm. We validate EDAS on top of several mainstream RLVR methods across a series of models and seven challenging math benchmarks, demonstrating consistent improvements. Notably, EDAS yields an average improvement of 6.29 points over DAPO on Qwen3-8B across seven benchmarks, confirming that exploiting the latent information in group rollouts is a broadly effective strategy for strengthening RLVR.

</details>


### [464] [Bridging the Gap between Sparse Matrix Reordering and Factorization: A Deep Learning Framework for Fill-in Reduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17339)
*Ziwei Li,Tao Yuan,Shuzi Niu,Huiyuan Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于深度学习的最小化填充替代函数的框架，通过谱嵌入和多层GNN架构来减少稀疏矩阵分解中的填充量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏矩阵重排序能显著减少矩阵分解中的填充量，从而降低计算和存储需求。但最小填充排序是NP难问题，且存在一个悖论：重排序在分解前进行，但填充量却是在分解过程中产生的。为了弥合重排序与分解之间的差距，需要新的方法。

Method: 提出深度学习框架：1) 使用多层GNN架构学习图拉普拉斯矩阵最小特征向量的近似（谱嵌入），捕捉矩阵的全局结构信息；2) 使用另一个多层GNN架构基于秩分布最小化可能发生填充的潜在空间。

Result: 实验结果表明，该方法相比传统图论算法和深度学习方法取得了有竞争力的性能。

Conclusion: 通过深度学习框架结合谱嵌入，能够有效减少稀疏矩阵分解中的填充量，为解决重排序与分解之间的悖论提供了新思路。

Abstract: Sparse matrix reordering can significantly reduce the fill-in during matrix factorization, thereby decreasing the computational and storage requirements in sparse matrix computations. Finding a minimal fill-in ordering is known to be an NP-hard problem. Moreover, there is a paradox: matrix reordering is applied before matrix factorization, but fill-ins that matrix reordering methods aim at are generated from matrix factorization. To bridge the gap between reordering and factorization, we propose a deep learning framework to minimize a fill-in surrogate function based on spectral embedding. First, we employ a multi-grid-like GNN architecture to learn to approximate the smallest eigenvectors of its graph Laplacian matrix, i.e. spectral embedding, and capture the global structural information of the matrix. Then, another multi-grid-like GNN architecture is used to minimize the potential space where fill-in can occur based on the rank distribution. Experimental results indicate that our approach achieves competitive performance compared with traditional graph-theoretic algorithms and deep learning methods.

</details>


### [465] [Olivia: Harmonizing Time Series Foundation Models with Power Spectral Density](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17340)
*Jingru Fei,Kun Yi,Alex Xing Wang,Qingsong Wen,Xiangxiang Zhu,Wei Fan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了Harmonizer模块和Olivia时间序列基础模型，通过谱域归一化功率谱密度来协调不同数据集的时间模式差异，从而提高预训练效果和可迁移表示学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间序列基础模型在跨领域多样数据集上进行大规模预训练时，时间模式的异质性会阻碍训练效果和可迁移表示的学习。受信号处理中归一化功率谱密度概念的启发，作者认为在谱域通过PSD协调数据集可以减少不匹配并增强预训练。

Method: 提出了Harmonizer模块，通过重塑谱结构来隐式协调跨数据集的PSD，理论上对应二阶时间相关性的共享重参数化。理论分析表明token与Harmonizer的交互可以通过紧凑的谐振器集高效调节，从而设计了HarmonicAttention在低维交互空间执行自注意力。基于这些协调机制，构建了新的时间序列基础模型Olivia。

Result: 在两个大规模基准测试（TSLib和GIFT-Eval）以及GluonTS的额外6个数据集上的广泛实验表明，Olivia在零样本、少样本和全样本预测场景下都一致实现了最先进的性能。

Conclusion: 通过谱域协调机制，Olivia时间序列基础模型有效解决了跨领域数据集的时间模式异质性问题，在各种预测场景下都表现出优越性能，为时间序列预训练提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: Time series foundation models rely on large-scale pretraining over diverse datasets across domains, yet their heterogeneity in temporal patterns could hinder the effectiveness of training and learning transferable time series representations. Inspired a fundamental concept, normalized power spectral density (PSD) in signal processing, we assume harmonizing datasets via PSDs in the spectral domain could reduce mismatches and enhance pretraining. We then go beyond the direct intractable minimization optimization and innovatively reformulate it as a principled harmonization approach. Specifically, we propose Harmonizer, a module that reshapes spectral structures and implicitly harmonizing PSDs across datasets, which theoretically corresponds to a shared reparameterization of second-order temporal correlations. Our theoretical analysis further reveals token interactions with Harmonizer can be efficiently mediated by a compact set of resonators, motivating a HarmonicAttention design that performs self-attention in a low-dimensional interaction space. Then, we propose Olivia, a novel time series foundation model built upon these harmonization mechanisms. Extensive experiments on two large-scale benchmarks (TSLib and GIFT-Eval) and extra 6 datasets from GluonTS, demonstrate Olivia consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance under zero-shot, few-shot, and full-shot forecasting scenarios. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/aikunyi/Olivia}.

</details>


### [466] [\textsc{MasFACT}: Continual Multi-Agent Topology Learning via Geometry-Aware Posterior Transfer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17361)
*Xuefei Wang,Jialu Wang,Fengbo Zhang,Yihan Hu,Di Zhang,Yutong Ye,Yikun Ban,Jun Han,Ruijie Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出MasFACT框架，解决多智能体系统中因任务流变化导致的拓扑遗忘问题，通过几何感知后验转移保存历史协作知识，实现跨任务拓扑结构稳定与可塑性平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界多智能体系统面临连续演化的任务流，现有拓扑生成方法主要为孤立任务优化，无法有效保留和重用历史协作模式，导致"拓扑遗忘"问题 - 适应新任务时丢失先前任务所需的通信结构。

Method: 提出MasFACT框架：1) 将历史协作知识作为可转移拓扑先验保存；2) 通过Fused Gromov-Wasserstein最优传输在任务特定智能体空间间转移先验；3) 使用PAC-Bayes引导的保守后验适应，平衡任务特定可塑性与结构稳定性。

Result: 在类别、领域和任务级连续设置实验中，MasFACT相比强基线方法持续提高平均准确率，同时减少拓扑遗忘，并能与不同多智能体拓扑生成器无缝集成。

Conclusion: MasFACT通过几何感知后验转移框架有效解决了多智能体系统中的拓扑遗忘问题，实现了历史协作知识的保留与重用，为连续任务环境下的多智能体系统提供了稳健的拓扑生成方案。

Abstract: Multi-agent systems (MAS) powered by large language models (LLMs) have emerged as a powerful paradigm for complex problem solving, where performance critically depends on the underlying inter-agent communication topology. However, existing topology generation methods mainly optimize for isolated tasks, while real-world deployments involve streams of evolving tasks, requiring previously effective collaboration patterns to be retained and reused rather than rediscovered or overwritten. We identify a previously underexplored failure mode, \emph{topology forgetting}, in which adapting to new tasks shifts the topology generator away from communication structures required by earlier tasks. This issue stems from cross-task misalignment in both agent-level functional semantics and relational communication structures. To address this challenge, we propose \textbf{\textsc{MasFACT}}, a geometry-aware posterior transfer framework that preserves and reuses historical collaboration knowledge as transferable topology priors. We transfer these priors across task-specific agent spaces through Fused Gromov-Wasserstein optimal transport and perform PAC-Bayes-guided conservative posterior adaptation to balance task-specific plasticity with structural stability. Experiments across class-, domain-, and task-level continual settings demonstrate that \textsc{MasFACT} consistently improves average accuracy while reducing topology forgetting compared to strong topology generation and replay-based baselines, and can be seamlessly integrated with different MAS topology generators.

</details>


### [467] [Learning Fill-in Reduction Ordering via Graph Policy Optimization for Sparse Matrices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17362)
*Ziwei Li,Shuzi Niu,Huiyuan Li,Tao Yuan,Wenjia Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种图策略优化方法，通过全局和局部视角建模填充：使用多跳图神经网络嵌入全局填充信息，结合符号分解提取局部步级填充反馈，并通过自适应饱和函数对齐值网络以提升收敛性。在SuiteSparse矩阵集合上相比现有最优方法平均减少29.3%的填充和31.3%的峰值内存使用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模稀疏求解器中的矩阵重排序旨在寻找最小化分解填充的置换以减少内存和计算。由于最小填充排序问题是NP完全的，且填充隐含在稀疏模式中，传统方法使用图论启发式方法。现有强化学习方法要么忽略稀疏模式（缺失全局填充信息），要么缺乏局部精确填充反馈。

Method: 提出图策略优化方法：1) 策略网络和价值网络使用多跳图神经网络嵌入全局填充信息；2) 策略网络与图上的符号分解交互提取局部步级填充；3) 通过自适应饱和函数将局部反馈与价值网络对齐以改进收敛性。

Result: 在SuiteSparse矩阵集合上，相比现有最优基线方法，平均减少29.3%的填充和31.3%的峰值内存使用。

Conclusion: 该方法通过结合全局和局部填充信息，有效解决了现有强化学习方法在稀疏矩阵重排序中的局限性，显著减少了填充和内存使用。

Abstract: Matrix reordering in large sparse solvers seeks a permutation that minimizes factorization fill-in to reduce memory and computation. Because the minimum fill-in ordering problem is NP-complete and fill-in is implicit in the sparsity pattern, graph-theoretic heuristics are used. Existing reinforcement learning methods either ignore sparsity patterns--missing the global fill-in--or lack local exact fill-in feedback. We propose a graph policy optimization method, modeling fill-ins from global and local views: both the policy and value networks use a multi-hop graph neural backbone to embed global fill-in; the policy further interacts with symbolic factorization over graphs to extract local, step-level fill-ins, and the resulting feedback is aligned with the value network via an adaptive saturation function to improve convergence. On the SuiteSparse Matrix Collection, our method achieves mean reductions of 29.3 in fill-ins and 31.3 in peak memory usage over state-of-the-art baselines.

</details>


### [468] [FML-bench: A Controlled Study of AI Research Agent Strategies from the Perspective of Search Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17373)
*Qiran Zou,Hou Hei Lam,Wenhao Zhao,Tingting Chen,Yiming Tang,Samson Yu,Yingtao Zhu,Srinivas Anumasa,Zufeng Zhang,Tianyi Zhang,Chang Liu,Zhengyao Jiang,Anirudh Goyal,Dianbo Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FML-Bench是一个评估AI研究代理策略的基准测试，包含18个基础ML任务和12个过程级行为指标，发现策略复杂度不等于性能，简单贪心算法与树搜索表现相当，并揭示了改进机会密度对策略选择的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI研究代理策略（如贪心爬山、树搜索、进化优化）的性能差异原因不明，需要能分离策略与基础设施的基准测试，并提供过程级指标来分析探索行为，而现有基准测试支持有限。

Method: 提出FML-Bench基准测试，包含18个基础ML研究任务覆盖10个领域，分离代理策略与执行基础设施，定义12个过程级行为指标，评估六个代表性代理。

Result: 1. 策略复杂度不等于性能：简单贪心爬山算法与最佳树搜索代理表现相当；2. 改进机会密度影响策略选择：贪心搜索在机会密集时更有效，树搜索和进化策略在机会稀疏时更有效；3. 过程级分析显示早期收敛和方向性探索与最终性能显著相关。

Conclusion: FML-Bench为AI研究代理策略评估提供了标准化基准，揭示了策略选择与问题特性的关系，并表明自适应策略（根据停滞检测切换探索广度）能提升性能。

Abstract: AI research agents accelerate ML research by automating hypothesis generation, experimentation, and empirical refinement. Existing agent strategies range from greedy hill-climbing to tree search and evolutionary optimization, yet which strategy choices drive performance remains unclear. Answering this question requires a benchmark that separates agent strategy (e.g., search topology) from execution infrastructure (e.g., code editor), so that performance differences are attributable to strategy rather than infrastructure, and that provides process-level metrics beyond final scores to analyze exploration behaviors. Existing benchmarks offer limited support. We propose FML-Bench, a benchmark of 18 fundamental ML research tasks across 10 domains that separates agent strategy from execution infrastructure and defines 12 process-level behavioral metrics. Evaluating six representative agents, we find that: (1) strategy complexity alone does not guarantee strong performance: a simple greedy hill-climber nearly matches the best-performing tree-search agent, both well above the remaining agents; (2) our analysis suggests this pattern relates to improvement opportunity structure: greedy search tends to be more effective when opportunities are dense, while tree-search and evolutionary strategies tend to be more effective when opportunities are sparse; an adaptive agent built on this insight switches to broader exploration upon detecting improvement stagnation and outperforms the other six agents, lending initial support to this observation; and (3) process-level analysis reveals that early convergence and directionally focused exploration are significantly associated with final performance, while solution diversity and compute cost are not. Our benchmark is available at: https://github.com/qrzou/FML-bench.

</details>


### [469] [Self-Supervised Learning for Sparse Matrix Reordering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17403)
*Ziwei Li,Tao Yuan,Fangfang Liu,Shuzi Niu,Huiyuan Li,Wenjia Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于填充路径定理的深度学习方法来减少稀疏矩阵LU分解中的填充元素，通过多网格图网络和三元组采样策略，在理论保证下优化矩阵排序。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏矩阵的行列重排序可以显著减少LU分解过程中的填充元素（新引入的非零元），从而降低内存使用和运行时间。然而，找到最小化填充的排序是NP完全问题，现有方法依赖代理目标且缺乏理论保证。
