Method: 1）使用多网格图网络捕获每个顶点的结构信息；2）基于不等式推导三元组采样策略；3）引入端最大链损失函数来减少预测分数满足不等式的三元组数量。

Result: 在公开的SuiteSparse矩阵集合上的实验评估表明，该方法在填充减少和LU分解时间加速方面均优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 通过填充路径定理揭示了填充生成与稀疏矩阵结构之间的内在关系，提出了一种有理论保证的深度学习方法来优化矩阵排序，有效减少了LU分解中的填充元素并提高了计算效率。

Abstract: Rearranging the rows or columns of a sparse matrix using an appropriate ordering can significantly reduce fill-ins, i.e., new nonzeros introduced during matrix factorization, decreasing memory usage and runtime. However, finding an ordering that minimizes fill-ins is NP-complete. Existing approaches, including graph-theoretic and deep learning methods, rely on surrogate objectives without theoretical guarantees. The Fill-Path Theorem reveals a direct and intrinsic relationship between fill-in generation and the sparse structure of the matrix as path triplet inequalities. Here we first employ a multigrid graph network to capture structural information for each vertex. We then derive a triplet sampling strategy based on inequalities. Finally, we introduce an end-max chain loss function to reduce the number of triplets whose predicted scores satisfy these inequalities. Experimental evaluations on the publicly available SuiteSparse matrix collection demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method in terms of both fill-in reduction and speedup in LU factorization time.

</details>


### [470] [IVF-TQ: Streaming-Robust Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search via a Codebook-Free Residual Layer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17415)
*Tarun Sharma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: IVF-TQ是一种基于IVF索引的近似最近邻搜索方法，采用无码本残差量化层，相比传统PQ方法在流式数据场景下具有更好的稳定性，无需码本重训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决传统基于训练码本的ANN索引（如PQ、OPQ、ScaNN）在流式数据摄入下的"陈旧性"问题，即数据分布变化导致索引性能下降。

Method: 提出IVF-TQ索引结构：使用固定随机旋转和预计算的Lloyd-Max标量量化（仅依赖b,d参数），仅训练IVF粗分区。基于TurboQuant设计，采用无码本残差量化层。

Result: 在流式Deep-10M数据集上，IVF-TQ性能从87.4%降至86.6%（仅下降0.80±0.10pp），而IVF-PQ下降3.23pp。在SIFT-1M的i.i.d.控制实验中，IVF-PQ无分布偏移下仍下降3.9pp。在高码率下，PQ有绝对召回优势，但IVF-TQ具有无需重训练码本的操作优势。

Conclusion: IVF-TQ在流式数据场景下比传统PQ方法更稳定，无需码本重训练，操作更简便。虽然在高码率下召回率略低，但其操作优势明显，适用于需要处理动态数据的实际应用。

Abstract: We propose IVF-TQ, an IVF index with a codebook-free residual layer: a fixed random rotation followed by precomputed Lloyd-Max scalar quantization depending only on (b, d). Only the IVF coarse partition is trained. Building on TurboQuant (Zandieh et al., 2025), the design substantially reduces a key failure mode of trained-codebook ANN indexes (PQ, OPQ, ScaNN): staleness under streaming ingestion.Empirical (3 seeds): Per-batch PQ retraining does not recover the streaming gap at any tested bit budget (paired-t p > 0.28 everywhere). On streaming Deep-10M, IVF-TQ holds at 87.4% -> 86.6% (Delta = -0.80 +/- 0.10pp) while IVF-PQ degrades -3.23pp. A shuffled-i.i.d. control on SIFT-1M shows IVF-PQ losing -3.9pp without distribution shift. At higher PQ bit budgets (~1.5x IVF-TQ memory), absolute recall favors PQ as expected from rate-distortion (+6.1pp Deep-10M; +2.0pp SIFT-10M); the durable IVF-TQ benefit is operational (no codebook to retrain), robust across memory regimes.Prior art: IVF around a codebook-free residual quantizer is architecturally not new -- IVF-RaBitQ ships in Milvus, cuVS, LanceDB, Weaviate; Shi et al. (2026) is concurrent GPU work. TurboQuant itself tests only flat-rotation ANN.Contributions: (i) A multi-seed streaming-operational story for codebook-free IVF: 10M-scale evidence across PQ memory budgets. (ii) A uniform-over-sphere IP-error bound for the TQ residual quantizer with one fixed rotation (proof sketch in v1; rigorous in v2). (iii) Adaptive IVF-TQ: a partition-only refresh recovering 67% -> 97.8% under worst-case rotation shift with re-ranking (90.3% without).Code, data: https://github.com/tarun-ks/turboquant_search

</details>


### [471] [Learning Displacement-Robust Representations for Landslide Early Warning under Rainfall Forecast Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17419)
*Ren Ozeki,Hamada Rizk,Hirozumi Yamaguchi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种对降雨场位移具有鲁棒性的滑坡预警系统，通过使用降雨-运动感知对比学习来学习稳定的潜在表示，从而提高短期滑坡预测的可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 气候变化加剧了极端降雨事件，导致降雨诱发滑坡风险增加。现有的滑坡预测方法大多假设准确的降雨输入，但在实际运行中依赖降雨预报，而预报中的空间位移会降低预测精度。

Method: 提出降雨-运动感知对比学习（RMCL），通过引入时间相关的降雨场扰动来模拟预报引起的位移，学习在降雨场运动下保持稳定的降雨和地形数据的潜在表示。

Result: 使用日本19个滑坡区域的两年降雨和地形数据进行实验，提出的系统比最先进的基线方法精度提高了37%。

Conclusion: 将降雨建模为移动空间场并在学习过程中处理降雨场位移，能显著提高运行预警系统中短期滑坡预测的可靠性。

Abstract: Rainfall-induced landslides pose a growing risk worldwide as climate change intensifies extreme rainfall events. To provide sufficient evacuation time, landslide early warning systems (LEWS) for real-time disaster monitoring must estimate near-future landslide risk by integrating observed rainfall with short-term rainfall forecasts from spatio-temporal environmental data streams. Although recent landslide prediction methods have improved predictive performance using statistical and deep learning approaches, most assume accurate rainfall inputs. In operational settings, however, landslide prediction relies on rainfall forecasts, which often contain spatial displacement of rainfall fields due to forecasting uncertainties. Such displacement can alter local accumulated rainfall and degrade prediction accuracy. To address this challenge, we propose a novel LEWS robust to rainfall field displacement. The key idea is to learn latent representations from rainfall and terrain data that remain stable under displacement in rainfall field motion, enabling reliable geospatial data integration for landslide risk estimation. The landslide prediction model is trained using Rainfall-Motion-Aware Contrastive Learning (RMCL), which introduces temporally correlated rainfall field perturbations to emulate forecast-induced displacement in rainfall-driven spatio-temporal environmental data streams. Experiments were conducted using two years of rainfall and terrain data across Japan, covering 19 regions with landslide events. The proposed system achieved up to 37% higher precision than state-of-the-art baselines. These results demonstrate that modeling rainfall as a moving spatial field and addressing rainfall field displacement during learning significantly improve the reliability of short-term landslide prediction in operational early warning systems.

</details>


### [472] [Progressive Generalization Augmentation with Deeply Coupled RND-PPO and Domain-Prioritized Noise Injection for Robust Crop Management Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17428)
*Wu Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文针对农业强化学习系统在温度噪声下的鲁棒性不足问题，提出了三项创新方法，显著提升了灌溉策略的产量、氮肥利用效率和对扰动的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有农业RL系统存在三大局限性：早期学习效率与后期泛化能力的权衡问题；探索增强PPO中内在与外在奖励的简单叠加组合；均匀测量噪声注入策略忽视农业状态变量的差异敏感性。实验发现温度噪声会导致PPO策略经济回报下降11.9%。

Method: 提出三项系统创新：1) 渐进泛化增强(PGA)的三阶段课程学习；2) 深度耦合的RND-PPO架构，包含双通道GAE归一化、进度衰减内在系数和语义离散化；3) 领域优先的层次激活噪声注入策略。

Result: 在佛罗里达实验中，相比SOTA BERT-DQN获得8.43%产量提升和16.42%氮肥利用效率提升；在萨拉戈萨获得5.61%产量提升（经济得分略低3.67%）；在综合扰动下性能保持率达94.4%（对比基准80.0%）。

Conclusion: 论文提出的系统方法有效解决了农业RL部署中的关键鲁棒性问题，通过课程学习、架构创新和针对性噪声注入，显著提升了策略在真实农业环境中的泛化能力和抗干扰性。

Abstract: Our preliminary experiments on gym-DSSAT maize irrigation tasks revealed that +/-2 degrees C temperature noise causes an 11.9% reduction in economic returns for PPO policies trained under clean conditions - a systematic robustness deficit that existing research has not adequately addressed.
  This paper tackles three interconnected limitations impeding practical deployment of agricultural RL systems: the trade-off between early-stage learning efficiency and late-stage generalization capability; the naive additive combination of intrinsic and extrinsic rewards in exploration-augmented PPO; and uniform measurement noise injection strategies that disregard empirically validated differential sensitivity across agricultural state variables.
  We introduce three systematic innovations: Progressive Generalization Augmentation (PGA) implementing a three-phase curriculum (clean training 0-800 episodes, progressive 800-1200, full augmentation 1200-2000); a deeply coupled RND-PPO architecture with dual-channel GAE normalization, progress-decayed intrinsic coefficients, and semantic discretization; and domain-prioritized noise injection with hierarchical activation.
  Our experimental evaluation demonstrates: 8.43% yield improvement and 16.42% nitrogen use efficiency improvement over SOTA BERT-DQN in Florida; 5.61% yield improvement in Zaragoza (though 3.67% lower economic score due to challenging Mediterranean climate); and 94.4% vs 80.0% performance retention under combined perturbations.
  All experiments used 5 random seeds on NVIDIA A100 GPUs with 4.2+/-0.3 hours per run (2000 episodes, 2048-step buffer, 64 mini-batch size).

</details>


### [473] [Radial-Angular Geometry for Reliable Update Diagnosis in Noisy-Label Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17429)
*Ningkang Peng,Jingyang Mao,Xiaoqian Peng,Weiguang Qu,Yanhui Gu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种新的噪声标签处理方法，通过分析样本梯度更新而非前向信号来评估样本可靠性，引入了相对几何冲突(RGC)指标来区分困难干净样本和错误标记样本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有噪声标签方法通常基于前向信号（如损失、置信度、熵）来估计样本可靠性，但这些信号只能表明样本是否难以预测，不能直接测试观察到的标签是否引发可靠的参数更新。困难干净样本和错误标记样本可能具有相似的损失，但引发的参数更新却不同，这一差距对模型训练至关重要。

Method: 提出将可靠性估计重新定义为对观察标签更新的诊断。首先使用样本级经验Fisher迹作为反向空间的更新能量度量，该度量可分解为预测残差项和特征敏感项。然后提出相对几何冲突(RGC)，通过比较观察标签梯度与EMA教师模型诱导的参考梯度，来区分大但对齐的困难干净更新和由错误标签引起的大冲突更新。

Result: 在合成和真实世界的噪声标签基准测试中，RGC方法在困难干净样本保留和准确率方面都有改进，验证了所提方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 通过分析梯度空间而非前向信号来评估样本可靠性是更有效的方法，相对几何冲突(RGC)能够更好地识别和区分困难干净样本与错误标记样本，从而提升噪声标签场景下的模型性能。

Abstract: Noisy-label methods often estimate sample reliability from forward-space signals such as loss, confidence, or entropy. These signals indicate whether a sample is difficult to predict, but they do not directly test whether its observed label induces a reliable parameter update. This gap matters because hard clean samples and mislabeled samples can have similar loss while inducing different updates. We recast reliability estimation as diagnosis of the observed-label update. The sample-wise empirical Fisher trace gives a backward-space measure of update energy: for the classifier layer, it factorizes into a prediction-residual term and a feature-sensitivity term, so it captures information beyond scalar loss. Trace, however, is still a radial magnitude signal and cannot decide whether a large update is useful or harmful. We therefore propose Relative Geometric Conflict (RGC), which compares the observed-label gradient with a reference gradient induced by an EMA teacher. The conflict term helps distinguish large but aligned hard-clean updates from large conflicting updates caused by corrupted labels. Across synthetic and real-world noisy-label benchmarks, RGC improves hard-clean preservation and accuracy under our evaluation protocol.

</details>


### [474] [MATE: Solving Contextual Markov Decision Processes with Memory of Accumulated Transition Embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17431)
*Himchan Hwang,Hyeokju Jeong,Gene Chung,Seungyeon Kim,Sangwoong Yoon,Frank Chongwoo Park*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MATE是一种用于解决上下文马尔可夫决策过程(CMDP)的简单有效的记忆架构，通过聚合求和机制替代难以处理的后验分布，在保持足够表达能力的同时提供计算优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在上下文MDP中，最优代理需要维护不可观测上下文的后验信念，但这一后验分布通常难以处理。现有记忆架构如Transformers有随步数增长的计算成本，RNNs存在梯度问题，需要更高效且稳定的解决方案。

Method: MATE采用求和聚合记忆架构，利用后验分布的置换不变性特性，替代传统难以处理的后验分布。这种设计避免了Transformers随步数增长的计算成本和RNNs常见的梯度问题。

Result: 在多个不同基准测试中，MATE展现出明显的计算优势，同时性能与标准的序列模型基线相当，实现了效率与性能的良好平衡。

Conclusion: MATE为上下文MDP提供了一种简单而有效的记忆架构，通过求和聚合机制在保持足够表达能力的同时，解决了现有记忆架构的计算效率和梯度稳定性问题。

Abstract: We propose MATE, a simple yet effective memory architecture for solving Contextual Markov Decision Processes (CMDPs), a family of MDPs parameterized by an unobserved context. In CMDPs, an optimal agent can adapt online by maintaining the posterior belief over contexts. MATE replaces this intractable posterior with a sum-aggregated memory, leveraging the posterior's permutation invariance to retain provably sufficient expressiveness. Compared to prior memory architectures, MATE avoids the growing per-step rollout cost of Transformers and the gradient issues commonly associated with Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs). Extensive evaluations across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that MATE provides clear computational advantages while achieving performance comparable to standard sequence-model baselines.

</details>


### [475] [DP-SelFT: Differentially Private Selective Fine-Tuning for Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17432)
*Haichao Sha,Zihao Wang,Yuncheng Wu,Hong Chen,Wei Dong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DP-SelFT：一种差分隐私选择性微调框架，通过选择性地微调特定层而非整个模型，在保持隐私保护的同时提升LLMs的实用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLMs微调数据常包含敏感信息，传统差分隐私微调方法会导致显著的效用下降。现有工作主要通过参数高效微调（如LoRA）来改善隐私-效用权衡，本文提出选择性微调作为补充方向。

Method: 1) 构建轻量级DP合成数据集，仅在该数据集上进行参数选择，避免额外隐私成本；2) 层级选择：在合成训练集上临时训练候选层子集，在合成验证集上评估；3) 临时训练采用与下游DP微调匹配的扰动机制，确保选择的层对噪声更新具有鲁棒性。

Result: 在基准任务上的实验表明，DP-SelFT在相同隐私保证下，相比现有DP微调基线方法，能持续改善隐私-效用权衡。

Conclusion: 选择性微调是改善DP微调隐私-效用权衡的有效补充方向，DP-SelFT框架通过创新的参数选择方法解决了DP特有的挑战，实现了更好的性能。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are commonly adapted to downstream tasks through fine-tuning, but fine-tuning data often contains sensitive information that may be leaked by the resulting model. Differential privacy (DP) offers formal protection against such leakage, yet DP fine-tuning of LLMs still suffers from substantial utility degradation due to gradient clipping and noise injection. Existing work improves this trade-off by combining DP with parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods such as LoRA, which constrain the form of updates. In this work, we study a complementary direction: selective fine-tuning, which constrains where updates are applied.
  We propose DP-SelFT, a framework for differentially private selective fine-tuning of LLMs. DP-SelFT addresses three DP-specific challenges in parameter selection: avoiding repeated privacy cost, improving stability under noisy estimates, and selecting parameters that remain useful under clipped and noisy updates. It first constructs a lightweight DP synthetic dataset and performs selection only on this synthetic data, so the selection stage incurs no additional privacy cost. It then conducts layer-level selection by temporarily training candidate layer subsets on a synthetic training split and evaluating them on a synthetic validation split. Crucially, this temporary training is performed under a perturbation regime matched to downstream DP fine-tuning, with worst-case perturbations of the same scale as DP noise. This favors layer subsets that are not only learnable but also robust to noisy private updates. Experiments on benchmark tasks show that DP-SelFT consistently improves the privacy--utility trade-off over existing DP fine-tuning baselines under the same privacy guarantees.

</details>


### [476] [ClaHF: A Human Feedback-inspired Reinforcement Learning Framework for Improving Classification Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17458)
*Tianxiang Xu,Xiaoyan Zhu,Xin Lai,Jiayin Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ClaHF是一个基于人类反馈的强化学习框架，用于文本分类，通过偏好建模和RL优化提升分类性能与置信度校准，无需额外人工标注。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统监督微调（SFT）本质上是行为克隆，无法充分捕捉样本间的相对偏好关系，限制了模型决策边界塑造和预测置信度校准的能力。

Method: 提出ClaHF框架，构建多个候选预测及其相对排序关系，在奖励模型中联合建模Top-1偏好和非最优候选的排序，将标签监督转换为适用于策略优化的偏好信号。

Result: 在8个分类任务（涵盖三类场景）的系统评估中，ClaHF在不同语言模型上持续提升分类性能和置信度校准。

Conclusion: ClaHF通过偏好建模和RL优化，有效解决了传统SFT在文本分类中的局限性，为分类任务提供了无需额外人工标注的强化学习解决方案。

Abstract: Text classification models are typically trained via supervised fine-tuning (SFT). However, SFT essentially performs behavior cloning from instance-wise labels and thus fails to adequately capture relative preference relations among samples, which limits the model's ability to shape decision boundaries and calibrate predictive confidence. In this paper, we propose ClaHF, a human feedback-inspired reinforcement learning (RL) framework for text classification that integrates preference modeling and RL optimization into the classification pipeline without requiring additional human annotations. Unlike prior work that relies solely on instance-wise supervision, ClaHF constructs multiple candidate predictions together with their relative ranking relations, and jointly models the Top-1 preference and the ordering among non-optimal candidates within a reward model (RM). This design converts conventional label supervision into preference signals that are directly applicable to policy optimization. We conduct systematic evaluations on eight classification tasks spanning three categories of scenarios. Results demonstrate that ClaHF consistently improves both classification performance and confidence calibration across diverse language models (LMs). The data and code are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ClaHF.

</details>


### [477] [TriOpt: A Scalable Algorithm for Linear Causal Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17465)
*Rafat Ashraf Joy,Elena Zheleva*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TriOpt：一种新的线性因果发现方法，通过结合排序方法和连续优化方法，在保持准确性的同时实现数量级的速度提升


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的因果发现方法面临可扩展性限制：基于排序的方法搜索空间随变量数量超指数增长，连续优化方法虽然将DAG学习转化为可微目标，但在高维设置下都面临显著的可扩展性问题

Method: TriOpt采用两阶段高效方法：1) 利用Sherman-Morrison秩1降阶和线性核的加性结构快速恢复拓扑排序；2) 在给定排序下，将结构学习重新表述为凸连续优化问题，完全避免昂贵的无环性约束

Result: 理论证明在真实排序下TriOpt能准确恢复底层线性DAG；实证表明在合成、半合成和真实数据集上，TriOpt在高维情况下比现有线性因果发现方法快数个数量级，同时保持相当或更优的准确性

Conclusion: TriOpt通过紧密整合排序和连续优化两种范式，在保持准确性的同时显著提高了线性因果发现的可扩展性，为高维因果发现提供了实用高效的解决方案

Abstract: Learning causal relations from observational data is challenging because the graph search space grows super-exponentially with the number of variables. Ordering-based methods reduce this space by first identifying the topological ordering, whereas continuous optimization methods explore most likely regions of the space by casting DAG learning as a differentiable objective with an acyclicity constraint. Despite their conceptual appeal, both paradigms face significant scalability limitations in high-dimensional settings, restricting their practical applicability. In this work, we introduce a new formulation for linear causal discovery that tightly integrates these two paradigms to achieve substantial gains in scalability without sacrificing accuracy. Our approach, TriOpt, decomposes the problem into two efficient stages. First, it recovers the topological ordering by exploiting the Sherman-Morrison rank-1 downdate together with the additive structure of linear kernels, enabling fast and scalable ordering estimation. Second, given this ordering, we reformulate structure learning as a convex continuous optimization problem that entirely avoids the need for enforcing costly acyclicity constraints. We theoretically show that, under the true ordering, TriOpt exactly recovers the underlying linear DAG. Empirically, across synthetic, semi-synthetic, and real-world datasets, TriOpt achieves orders-of-magnitude speedups over state-of-the-art linear causal discovery methods in high-dimensional regimes, while maintaining comparable or superior accuracy.

</details>


### [478] [WinQ: Accelerating Quantization-Aware Training of Language Models Around Saddle Points](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17471)
*Dongyue Li,Zechun Liu,Kai Yi,Zhenshuo Zhang,Changsheng Zhao,Raghuraman Krishnamoorthi,Harshit Khaitan,Hongyang R. Zhang,Steven Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: WinQ算法通过重置权重和噪声注入梯度，加速量化感知训练，在4比特以下量化中实现4倍加速和8.8%性能提升


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量化感知训练在4比特以下收敛缓慢且性能过早停滞，现有研究虽观察到该问题但原因不明，需要分析收敛机制并提出解决方案

Method: 通过分析损失曲面Hessian矩阵谱，发现权重收敛到鞍点附近的平坦区域；提出WinQ算法：1）周期性地将权重重置为全精度和量化权重的线性插值，减小到量化网格的距离并增加特征值幅度；2）计算噪声注入权重的梯度以正则化Hessian

Result: WinQ在各种量化方法和模型上将量化感知训练加速达4倍；相同训练成本下，将最先进的4比特以下量化性能提升达8.8%；在16种不同语言模型、量化方法和比特宽度的设置中结果一致

Conclusion: 量化感知训练收敛缓慢源于权重陷入Hessian特征值趋近零的平坦区域，WinQ通过权重重置和噪声梯度注入有效解决了这一问题，显著加速训练并提升低比特量化性能

Abstract: Quantization-aware training (QAT) is widely adopted to quantize language models by training full-precision weights using gradients from the quantized model. The main bottleneck is its slow convergence and early performance plateau, particularly below 4-bit-widths. While this problem has been observed in prior work, its precise cause remains unclear. In this paper, we analyze the convergence of QAT by estimating the spectrum of the loss-surface Hessians. We find that the weights converge to flat regions around saddle points, where a large fraction of the Hessian eigenvalues are both positive and negative. During training, an increasing fraction of Hessian eigenvalues concentrates around zero, whose magnitude decreases. At lower bit-widths, the magnitude of eigenvalues in the Hessian spectrum is significantly smaller. To mitigate these issues, we propose an algorithm called WinQ to accelerate QAT, which involves: (1) periodically resetting weights to the linear interpolation of full-precision and quantized weights, reducing the distance to the quantization grid and increasing eigenvalue magnitude, and (2) computing gradients of noise-injected weights to regularize the Hessian. Extensive experiments show that WinQ accelerates QAT by up to 4 times across various quantization methods and models. Under the same training cost, WinQ improves state-of-the-art sub-4-bit quantization by up to 8.8%. These results are consistent across 16 settings with different language models, quantization methods, and bit widths.

</details>


### [479] [Beyond Linear Superposition: Discovering Climate Features in AI Weather Models with KAN-SAE](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17493)
*Minjong Cheon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: KAN-SAE：一种非线性稀疏自编码器，通过可学习的B样条激活函数提升深度学习天气预测模型的可解释性，相比线性基线显著提高特征发现能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习天气预测模型预测性能出色但内部工作机制不透明，现有稀疏自编码器（SAEs）假设严格的线性特征叠加，不适合现代Transformer中高度非线性的天气动力学。

Method: 提出KAN-SAE，用Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks（KANs）中的可学习B样条激活函数替换标准ReLU，使每个潜在维度发展自己的非线性门控特性。

Result: 在Sonny模型上，KAN-SAE发现975个活跃特征（线性基线为566个，提升72%），特征间冗余降低20%，重建保真度相当。无需气候监督即识别出可解释的欧洲热浪特征和西太平洋台风追踪器。

Conclusion: 非线性激活对于深度学习天气预测模型的机制可解释性至关重要，能够恢复线性基线无法发现的天气特征。

Abstract: Deep learning weather prediction models achieve remarkable predictive skill yet remain largely opaque: we know little about how they represent physical climate phenomena internally. Mechanistic interpretability through Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) offers a principled route to decomposing these representations, but existing SAEs assume strictly linear feature superposition - a constraint ill-suited for the highly nonlinear atmospheric dynamics encoded in modern transformers. We introduce KAN-SAE, a sparse autoencoder whose encoder replaces the standard ReLU with learnable per-feature B-spline activations drawn from Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs), allowing each latent dimension to develop its own nonlinear gating profile. Applied to Sonny, KAN-SAE discovers 975 alive features (vs. 566 for a linear baseline, a 72% improvement) with 20% lower inter-feature redundancy and comparable reconstruction fidelity. Without any climate supervision, KAN-SAE identifies an interpretable European heatwave feature spatially concentrated over western Europe, and a western Pacific typhoon tracker confirmed by causal steering experiments. Our results demonstrate that nonlinear activations are essential for mechanistic interpretability of deep learning weather prediction models, recovering climate features that remain invisible to linear baselines.

</details>


### [480] [Self-Supervised On-Policy Distillation for Reasoning Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17497)
*Zhiquan Tan,Yinrong Hong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SSOPD是一种自监督策略蒸馏方法，通过利用同一提示下的正确与错误完成序列，将组内对比转化为密集的过程监督，无需外部解决方案轨迹。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统GRPO风格的RLVR仅使用终端奖励，但混合组包含更丰富的过程信号：正确完成展示了当前策略如何解决问题，错误完成则提供了需要修正的策略前缀。

Method: 提出自监督策略蒸馏(SSOPD)，将最短正确完成的条件教师分布蒸馏到最长错误完成的前缀中，通过最短正确/最长错误规则将组内对比转化为过程监督，并使用提示级前沿权重集中辅助损失。

Result: 在AIME 2024、AIME 2025和HMMT 2025的九个模型-基准设置中，SSOPD均优于GRPO。在Qwen3-8B上达到65.6的宏观平均@12，比GRPO高1.6分，比解决方案条件OPSD基线高0.8分。

Conclusion: SSOPD通过利用组内对比信号实现了有效的自监督过程监督，显著提升了推理模型的性能，无需外部解决方案轨迹。

Abstract: GRPO-style RLVR trains reasoning models from multiple on-policy attempts per prompt, but typically uses these attempts only through terminal rewards. We show that a mixed group contains a richer process signal: a correct completion is a self-generated witness of how the current policy can solve the problem, while a wrong completion provides on-policy prefixes where the policy needs correction. We introduce \emph{Self-Supervised On-Policy Distillation} (SSOPD), which distills a teacher distribution conditioned on the shortest correct completion into prefixes of the longest wrong completion. This converts intra-group correct--wrong contrast into dense process supervision without external solution traces. A stopping-time view motivates the shortest-correct / longest-wrong rule as a finite-group approximation to editing persistent failures toward fast-success actions, and a prompt-level frontier weight concentrates the auxiliary loss where correct and wrong branches coexist. Across AIME 2024, AIME 2025, and HMMT 2025, SSOPD improves over GRPO in all nine model-benchmark settings. On Qwen3-8B, it reaches a macro Avg@12 of 65.6, outperforming GRPO by 1.6 points and the solution-conditioned OPSD baseline by 0.8 points. Code will be released at https://github.com/tzq1999/SSOPD.

</details>


### [481] [t-gems: text-guided exit modules for decreasing clip image encoder](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17499)
*Alberto Presta,Grzegorz Stefanski,Michal Byra,Krzysztof Arendt*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究提出文本引导的提前退出模块（T-GEMs）和基于速率的正则化器，用于控制多模态编码器计算成本，同时保持跨模态理解性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态深度神经网络通过整合不同数据模态来增强深度理解，但将不同模态数据投影到共享潜在空间进行相似度计算的过程计算成本高，特别是大型图像编码器和对测试数据的平等处理。提前退出方法可以减少计算负载，但为图像-文本对等多模态数据开发此类方法具有挑战性。

Method: 研究调查了CLIP等编码器中间层的语义内容分布，这些分布可以从文本描述中推导。提出了文本引导的提前退出模块（T-GEMs）和基于速率的正则化器，以控制编码器使用成本，同时保持跨模态理解性能。

Result: 通过T-GEMs和速率正则化器，可以在减少计算成本的同时维持跨模态理解性能，实现计算效率和多模态理解之间的平衡。

Conclusion: 该研究为解决多模态编码器计算效率问题提供了一种有效方法，通过利用中间层语义内容和文本引导的提前退出机制，在保持性能的同时显著降低计算成本。

Abstract: Multimodal deep neural networks enhance deep comprehension by integrating diverse data modalities. Data from different modalities are typically projected into a shared latent space for similarity computation, but this process is resource intensive due to large image encoders and equal processing of test data during prediction. Early exit methods reduce computational load by utilizing intermediate layers, saving time and memory. However, developing such methods is challenging for multimodal data like image-text pairs. This study investigates the semantic content distributions present in intermediate layers of encoders such as CLIP, which can be derived from textual descriptions. We introduce Text-Guided Exit Modules (T-GEMs) and a rate-based regularizer to control encoder usage costs while maintaining cross-modal understanding performance.

</details>


### [482] [The Silent Brush: Evaluating Artistic Style Leakage in AI Art Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17500)
*Ninad Joshi,Ashutosh Ranjan,Vivek Srivastava,Shirish Karande*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出了"沉默画笔"现象，指文本到图像模型会从训练数据中学习艺术作品的风格特征，并在生成时无意中再现这些风格，即使提示词中未明确提及。作者开发了Art Arena评估协议来量化这种现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 文本到图像模型通常在大规模网络抓取数据集上训练，这些数据包含受版权保护的艺术作品和独特视觉风格，引发了所有权、归属权和受保护视觉表达无意重用的问题。现有评估方法主要关注近重复检索或成员推理，无法评估这种跨提示的无意风格再现现象。

Method: 首先制定了"沉默画笔"现象的评估原则，然后提出了Art Arena评估协议，该协议能够衡量：1)艺术作品在模型中的编码强度；2)不同艺术作品之间的交互方式；3)风格特征在生成输出中无明确提示时的再现频率。该协议设计为可泛化到各种文本到图像生成系统。

Result: 在Stable Diffusion v1.5、Stable Diffusion XL (SDXL)和SANA-1.5等广泛使用的文本到图像扩散模型上进行了评估。结果表明，"沉默画笔"现象源于不同艺术作品在模型中的表征强度差异和交互动态，导致在模型生成中出现不对称的风格混合。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了文本到图像模型中存在无意风格再现的问题，提出了系统化的评估框架Art Arena，为理解和解决模型学习受保护艺术作品风格特征的问题提供了工具。代码和评估资源已公开。

Abstract: Generative text-to-image models are typically trained on large-scale web-scraped datasets that include diverse visual content such as copyrighted and stylistically distinctive artworks, raising concerns about ownership, attribution, and the unintended reuse of protected visual expressions. A key issue is that models can learn stylistic patterns from this data and reproduce them in generated outputs without any explicit reference in the prompt. We refer to this phenomenon as The Silent Brush, where such learned styles reappear even when they are not requested. Existing evaluation methods mainly focus on near-duplicate retrieval or membership inference and do not account for this form of unintended stylistic resurfacing across prompts. To address these gaps, we first formulate guiding principles for evaluation of The Silent Brush. We then introduce Art Arena, an evaluation protocol that measures how strongly artworks are encoded, how they interact, and how frequently their stylistic traits reappear in generated outputs without explicit mention in prompts. We evaluate Art Arena on widely used text-to-image diffusion models, including Stable Diffusion v1.5, Stable Diffusion XL (SDXL), and SANA-1.5, and design it to generalize across text-to-image generative systems. Our results show that The Silent Brush arises from differences in representational strength and interaction dynamics between artworks, leading to asymmetric blending in model generations. Code and evaluation resources are available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ArtArena-EBE4.

</details>


### [483] [BESplit: Bias-Compensated Split Federated Learning with Evidential Aggregation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17508)
*Yuhan Xie,Chen Lyu,Jingrong Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BESplit框架通过证据聚合、偏差补偿协作和双教师蒸馏解决分裂联邦学习在非IID数据下的优化偏差和收敛不稳定问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分裂联邦学习在非IID数据分布下存在优化偏差和收敛不稳定问题，现有解决方案大多从传统联邦学习迁移，而分裂架构改变了客户端信息表示和协调方式，为偏差补偿提供了新机会

Method: 1. 证据聚合：基于证据不确定性对客户端贡献进行细粒度重加权；2. 偏差补偿协作：通过配对互补客户端来对齐分裂层表示；3. 双教师蒸馏：同步解耦的客户端和服务器模型知识，实现独立本地推理

Result: 在五个基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，BESplit在多种非IID设置下，在准确性、收敛稳定性和计算效率方面持续优于最先进方法

Conclusion: BESplit通过利用分裂联邦学习的固有结构来减轻非IID效应，为隐私保护的协作训练提供了有效的架构感知解决方案

Abstract: Split Federated Learning (SFL) enables privacy-preserving collaborative training by partitioning models between clients and a server. However, under non-IID data distributions, SFL often suffers from biased optimization and unstable convergence, while existing solutions largely adapt techniques from conventional federated learning. In this work, we observe that the split architecture of SFL inherently alters how client information is represented and coordinated, opening opportunities for bias compensation beyond parameter-level aggregation. Based on this insight, we propose BESplit, an architecture-aware framework that exploits the intrinsic structure of SFL to mitigate non-IID effects. First, to prevent biased local data from dominating global updates, we introduce Evidential Aggregation (EA) to perform fine-grained reweighting of client contributions based on evidential uncertainty. Second, to further reduce distributional skew, we develop Bias-Compensated Collaboration (BCC) to align split-layer representations by pairing complementary clients. Finally, Dual-Teacher Distillation (DTD) is incorporated to synchronize knowledge between decoupled client and server models, enabling independent local inference. Extensive experiments on five benchmark datasets demonstrate that BESplit consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in accuracy, convergence stability, and computational efficiency under diverse non-IID settings.

</details>


### [484] [Coordinate Heterogeneity Governs Binary Quantization: From InfoNCE to Recall](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17524)
*Wenxuan Xiao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文解决了二进制量化(BQ)在对比嵌入和其他嵌入上表现差异的难题，通过连接高斯结构和坐标异质性建立了完整的分析框架，为二进制量化系统提供了首个原理性设计指南。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 二进制量化在高维嵌入压缩中表现不一致：在对比嵌入上能达到有竞争力的召回率，但在其他嵌入上却失败。现有两种主要系统采用相反策略（随机旋转 vs 保持坐标轴），但没有统一理论解释何时适用哪种方法。需要解决这一谜题并为二进制量化系统提供理论指导。

Method: 将最近建立的InfoNCE训练表示的高斯结构与BQ质量分析的完整框架相连接。核心观点是坐标异质性（每个坐标方差的非均匀性）控制BQ性能的关键方面。推导了排序保真度的闭式表达式，证明了幅度比特携带的信息与异质性成正比，并展示了随机旋转恰好破坏了一个范式利用的信号，同时创建了另一个范式所需的各向同性。建立了双参数缩放定律来预测跨模型和维度的保真度。

Result: 在13个数据集和6个嵌入族上的实验验证了所有预测。该框架首次为二进制量化系统提供了原理性设计指南，解释了为什么不同策略在不同情况下有效，并提供了预测性能的数学基础。

Conclusion: 坐标异质性是理解二进制量化性能差异的关键因素。通过连接高斯表示结构和完整的分析框架，解决了BQ在不同嵌入类型上表现不一致的谜题，为二进制量化系统的设计提供了理论依据和实用指导。

Abstract: Binary quantization (BQ) compresses high-dimensional embeddings into one or two bits per coordinate, enabling nearest neighbor search at extreme speed. Yet a striking puzzle persists: BQ achieves competitive recall on contrastive embeddings but fails on others -- and two leading systems adopt diametrically opposite strategies (random rotation vs. preserving coordinate axes) without a common theory explaining when each is appropriate. We resolve this puzzle by connecting the Gaussian structure recently established for InfoNCE-trained representations to a complete analytical framework for BQ quality. The key insight is that coordinate heterogeneity -- the non-uniformity of per-coordinate variances -- governs the key aspects of BQ performance. We derive closed-form expressions for ranking fidelity, prove that the magnitude bit carries information proportional to heterogeneity, and show that random rotation destroys precisely the signal that one paradigm exploits while creating the isotropy that the other requires. A two-parameter scaling law predicts fidelity across models and dimensions. Experiments on 13 datasets and 6 embedding families validate all predictions and provide the first principled design guide for binary quantization systems.

</details>


### [485] [CasualSynth: Generating Structurally Sound Synthetic Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17528)
*Zehua Cheng,Wei Dai,Jiahao Sun,Thomas Lukasiewicz*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CausalSynth是一个将因果结构生成与语义实现解耦的框架，通过LLM生成既因果有效又语言丰富的合成数据，解决了LLM输出可能违反目标领域因果机制的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型虽然能生成逼真的合成数据，但无法保证其输出符合目标领域的因果机制。为了解决这一问题，需要开发能够确保因果有效性的合成数据生成框架。

Method: 框架分为三个阶段：1) SCM生成因果骨架；2) LLM作为约束实现器将骨架映射为高维观测；3) 迭代一致性验证模块检测结构违规并反馈针对性修正，形成闭环精炼过程。

Result: 在三个因果基准测试中，CausalSynth将条件独立性的假阳性率保持在α=0.05水平附近，使用70B参数LLM时实现率超过96%。框架还支持通过噪声保留和图割进行干预和反事实生成。

Conclusion: CausalSynth成功解决了LLM生成数据中的语义后门问题，通过解耦因果结构和语义实现，生成既因果有效又语言丰富的合成数据，为因果推理提供了可靠的数据生成工具。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) generate realistic synthetic data but offer no guarantee that their outputs respect the causal mechanisms governing the target domain. We introduce CausalSynth, a framework that decouples causal structure generation from semantic realization, yielding synthetic data that is both causally valid and linguistically rich. The framework operates in three phases. First, a Structural Causal Model (SCM) - a tuple of structural equations defined over a directed acyclic graph (DAG) generates causal skeletons, i.e., variable assignments that satisfy the Global Markov Property of the governing DAG, via ancestral sampling. Second, an LLM acts as a constrained \emph{realizer}, a conditional translator that maps each skeleton to a high-dimensional observation such as a clinical note or a transaction log. Third, an Iterative Consistency Verification module detects structural violations through deterministic extraction and feeds targeted corrections back to the LLM, forming a closed-loop refinement process. We identify the Semantic Backdoor problem the systematic tendency of LLMs to override imposed causal facts with pre-training priors -- and prove that our iterative mechanism reduces the resulting selection bias relative to standard rejection sampling. On three causal benchmarks (ASIA, ALARM, and MIMIC-Struct), CausalSynth preserved conditional independencies with false-positive rates near the nominal $α=0.05$ level and achieved realizability rates above 96% with 70B-parameter LLM backbones. The framework additionally supports principled interventional and counterfactual generation through noise retention and graph mutilation.

</details>


### [486] [Q-LocalAdam: Memory-Efficient Client-Side Adaptive Optimization for Edge Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17552)
*Vedant Waykole,Haroon R. Lone*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Q-LocalAdam：一种面向联邦学习的自适应优化器内存压缩方法，通过对动量和方差采用分布感知的8位量化（动量使用分块线性编码，方差使用对数空间编码），在保持模型参数全精度的情况下实现3.37倍优化器内存减少，且在不同数据异构程度下保持甚至提升模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘设备上的联邦学习面临非独立同分布数据和有限内存的挑战。自适应优化器如Adam在数据异构下能稳定训练，但需要存储全精度的动量和方差状态，通常使客户端内存开销增加三倍，限制了可部署模型大小和并发任务数量。

Method: 通过实证观察发现联邦Adam中动量和方差具有不同的统计特性：动量值对称且有界，方差跨越八个数量级且呈对数正态结构。基于这种不对称性，提出Q-LocalAdam，对动量采用分布感知的8位量化分块线性编码，对方差采用对数空间编码，同时保持模型参数为全精度。

Result: 在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100数据集上，在不同数据异构程度（α∈{0.1,0.5,1.0,IID}）下，Q-LocalAdam实现了3.37倍优化器内存减少，在中等异构下无精度损失，在极端异构下显著提升性能（如CIFAR-100上α=0.1时提升5.74个百分点）。多种子验证确认统计显著性（p<0.01）。相比之下，朴素均匀量化会退化到随机性能。

Conclusion: Q-LocalAdam通过分布感知的量化设计，在保持联邦协议不变的情况下，显著减少了自适应优化器的内存开销，使内存受限的边缘设备能够部署更大模型和运行更多并发工作负载。研究强调了分布感知设计对量化效果的重要性。

Abstract: Federated learning on edge devices must cope with non-IID client data and tight memory budgets. Adaptive optimizers like Adam stabilize training under data heterogeneity but require storing full-precision momentum and variance states, often tripling client memory overhead. This limits deployable model sizes and concurrent federated jobs on resource-constrained devices.
  We empirically observe that momentum and variance in federated Adam exhibit fundamentally different statistical properties: momentum values are symmetric and bounded, while variance spans eight orders of magnitude with log-normal structure. Motivated by this asymmetry, we propose \textbf{Q-LocalAdam}, which applies distribution-aware 8-bit quantization block-wise linear encoding for momentum and log-space encoding for variance while keeping model parameters in full precision.
  Across CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 under varying data heterogeneity ($α\in \{0.1, 0.5, 1.0, \text{IID}\}$), Q-LocalAdam achieves $3.37\times$ optimizer memory reduction with no accuracy loss under moderate heterogeneity and significant improvements under extreme heterogeneity (e.g., +5.74pp on CIFAR-100, $α=0.1$). Multi-seed validation confirms statistical significance ($p<0.01$). In contrast, naive uniform quantization degrades to random performance, demonstrating that distribution-aware design is essential. Q-LocalAdam enables larger models and more concurrent workloads on memory-constrained edge devices without modifying the federated protocol.

</details>


### [487] [PFlow-T: A Persistence-Driven Forward Process for Topology-Controlled Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17555)
*Snigdha Chandan Khilar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PFlow-T是一种基于持续同调的生成模型，用拓扑特征的破坏而非高斯噪声作为前向过程，能更有效地控制生成数据的Betti数等拓扑特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于拓扑感知的扩散模型存在架构不匹配问题：使用高斯噪声进行破坏，但通过条件侧通道恢复结构特征。需要一种将拓扑结构直接融入前向过程的模型。

Method: PFlow-T将前向过程完全基于持续同调，时间度量H1拓扑特征（如孔洞）的破坏而非高斯噪声注入。前向过程根据特征的持久性消除特征，反向网络直接反转这种结构化破坏，一步预测干净状态。

Result: 在MNIST数字0、1、8上的测试表明，PFlow-T在生成请求的Betti数和处理分布外任务方面显著优于基线模型。

Conclusion: PFlow-T是第一个使用持续同调作为前向过程的生成架构（目前限于低分辨率像素空间代理），为拓扑感知生成提供了新方向。

Abstract: Current topology aware diffusion models face an architectural mismatch by using Gaussian noise for corruption while recovering structural features through conditional side channels To fix this we introduce PFlow T a generative model that bases its forward process entirely on persistent homology In PFlow T time measures the destruction of H1 topological features like holes rather than Gaussian noise injection This forward process eliminates features based on their persistence The reverse network then directly inverts this structured corruption to predict the clean state in one step Tests on MNIST digits zero one and eight show PFlow T significantly outperforms a baseline model in generating requested Betti numbers and handling out of distribution tasks PFlow T is the first generative architecture using persistent homology for the forward process although we note it is currently limited to low resolution pixel space proxies

</details>


### [488] [Beyond Accuracy: Robustness, Interpretability and Expressiveness of EEG Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17562)
*Urban Širca,Maryam Alimardani,Stefanos Zafeiriou,Konstantinos Barmpas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究首次系统评估了EEG基础模型在鲁棒性、可解释性和表达能力三个维度的表现，发现现有模型在不同故障模式下各有优劣，模型关注正确的脑区但解码能力受干扰影响，且EEG-FMs具备足够的表征能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有EEG基础模型评估主要关注干净数据上的准确率，而对其鲁棒性、可解释性和表征质量缺乏系统研究。本研究旨在填补这些空白，为EEG-FMs的发展提供关键见解。

Method: 在8个数据集上对6个EEG-FMs与基线深度学习模型进行基准测试。采用三层分析：1) 鲁棒性测试（加性噪声、随机和区域通道丢失、区域特定噪声注入）；2) 可解释性分析（首次将Attention-Aware Layer-Wise Relevance Propagation应用于EEG-FMs）；3) 表达能力评估（块级探测分析）。

Result: 1) 没有单一模型在所有故障模式下都表现最优，最抗噪声的模型在通道丢失时最脆弱；2) 模型关注任务相关的脑区，符合已知神经生理学，但预测性能下降时归因图保持稳定；3) 后期块在微调中被重新利用，早期块已包含任务相关信息；4) 先前归因于预训练质量差的性能问题主要源于池化操作，EEG-FMs在保留令牌级嵌入时具备足够表征能力。

Conclusion: 这是对EEG基础模型鲁棒性、可解释性和表达能力的首次系统评估，揭示了现有模型在不同维度上的优缺点，为未来EEG-FMs的发展提供了重要指导。

Abstract: EEG foundation models (EEG-FMs) have been evaluated predominantly on clean, in-distribution accuracy, leaving their robustness, interpretability and representational quality largely unexamined. This study addresses these gaps by benchmarking six EEG-FMs against a baseline deep learning model across eight datasets. Beyond clean accuracy, we conduct three layers of analysis: (i) Robustness: we apply test-time perturbations including additive noise, random and region-based channel dropout and region-specific noise injection. Our analyses show that no single model dominates all failure modes. The most noise-robust model is among the most fragile under channel dropout and much of the dropout fragility disappears when channels are removed rather than zero-padded. (ii) Interpretability: we present the first application of Attention-Aware Layer-Wise Relevance Propagation (AttnLRP) to EEG-FMs and show that models broadly concentrate relevance on task-appropriate brain regions consistent with known neurophysiology. However, attribution maps remain spatially stable under perturbation while predictions degrade, suggesting that the models attend to the correct brain regions but decode corrupted content. (iii) Expressiveness: With block-wise probing we show that late blocks are repurposed during fine-tuning, while early blocks already hold task-related information. Furthermore, we demonstrate that the poor head-only performance previously attributed to low-quality pre-trained representations is largely explained by pooling and that EEG-FMs possess sufficient representational capacity when their token-level embeddings are preserved. Together, these findings provide the first systematic assessment of robustness, interpretability and expressiveness for EEG-FMs and highlight critical considerations for their development.

</details>


### [489] [Structured Neural Marked Point Processes for Interpretable Event Interaction Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17568)
*Zhitong Xu,Qiwei Yuan,Yinghao Chen,Shandian Zhe,Bin Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出结构化神经标记点过程（SNMPP），在保持高建模灵活性的同时，能够显式发现事件和类别间的结构化依赖关系，解决现有神经点过程模型黑箱化的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实应用中多类别事件流普遍存在，但现有神经点过程模型虽然表达能力强，却以黑箱方式编码事件交互，无法显式发现结构化依赖关系，限制了模型的可解释性。

Method: 构建乘积形式的神经影响核，包含事件类型间的符号交互网络和延迟感知单调时间网络。前者显式表征类别间影响拓扑（兴奋、抑制、中性），后者灵活捕捉多样化时间衰减模式和潜在影响延迟。

Result: 在合成和真实世界基准数据集上的广泛实验验证了该方法在发现结构化关系和提供强预测性能方面的有效性。

Conclusion: SNMPP模型在保持高建模灵活性的同时，实现了对事件和类别间结构化关系的显式发现，为多类别事件流分析提供了可解释且准确的解决方案。

Abstract: Multi-class event streams arise in numerous real-world applications, where uncovering structured, interpretable inter-event relationships, together with accurate prediction, remains a central challenge. Existing neural point process models are highly expressive but encode event interactions in a black-box manner, preventing explicit discovery of structured dependencies. In this paper, we propose a structured neural marked point process (SNMPP) that achieves high modeling flexibility while enabling explicit event-wise and class-wise relationship discovery from data. Our model constructs a product-form neural influence kernel composed of a signed interaction network over event types and a delay-aware monotonic temporal network. This design enables explicit characterization of inter-class influence topology -- including excitation, inhibition, and neutrality -- while flexibly capturing diverse temporal decay patterns and potential influence delays. For efficient learning, we develop a stratified Monte Carlo estimator for stochastic training. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmark datasets validate the ability of our approach to uncover structured relationships and deliver strong predictive performance.

</details>


### [490] [How Off-Policy Can GRPO Be? Mu-GRPO for Efficient LLM Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17570)
*Minghao Tian,Yunfei Xie,Chen Wei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Mu-GRPO是一种改进的RL训练框架，通过减少rollout-optimization切换开销，允许更大的rollout staleness，在保持性能的同时实现约2倍的训练速度提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的GRPO方法在低延迟、近策略训练模式下系统开销较大，研究者希望探索GRPO算法能够容忍多大程度的离策略训练，以降低系统开销并提高训练效率。

Method: 提出Mu-GRPO框架，将训练组织为少量（如4个）大型顺序生成-优化阶段，通过放松剪裁保留有用陈旧数据梯度，结合负优势否决机制移除不稳定更新，以稳定学习过程。

Result: 在5个语言模型和多个数学推理基准测试中，Mu-GRPO匹配或超越标准GRPO性能，同时实现约2倍的训练时间加速，显著改善了LLM强化学习的性能-效率权衡。

Conclusion: GRPO风格算法可以容忍比先前假设更大的rollout staleness，Mu-GRPO通过高staleness设计减少切换开销，在保持性能的同时大幅提升训练效率，为LLM强化学习提供了更好的性能-效率平衡。

Abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has been a key driver of recent progress in reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) for large language models, but it is typically trained in a low-staleness, near-on-policy regime that incurs substantial system overhead. We ask a simple question: How off-policy can GRPO be? We show that GRPO-style algorithms can tolerate substantially larger rollout staleness than previously assumed, and propose Mu-GRPO, an RL training framework that organizes training into a small number (e.g., four) of large sequential generation-optimization stages. This design induces high rollout staleness while greatly reducing rollout-optimization switching overhead. To stabilize learning under stale data, Mu-GRPO combines relaxed clipping, which preserves useful stale-rollout gradients, with negative-advantage veto, which removes destabilizing post-trigger suffix updates in negative-advantage responses. Across five language models and multiple math reasoning benchmarks, Mu-GRPO matches or exceeds the performance of standard GRPO while achieving around 2x speedup in wall-clock training time, establishing a substantially improved performance-efficiency trade-off for LLM reinforcement learning.

</details>


### [491] [UniAlign: A Model-Agnostic Framework for Robust Network Traffic Classification under Distribution Shifts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17575)
*Tongze Wang,Xiaohui Xie,Wenduo Wang,Chuyi Wang,Yong Cui*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: UniAlign是一个模型无关的框架，通过域对齐微调和稳定模型集成，提升深度学习网络流量分类模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性，无需特定架构或引入额外训练成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网络流量分类模型在真实环境中部署时，由于网络条件变化导致的分布偏移，性能会严重下降。现有增强鲁棒性的方法通常与特定模型架构或数据设置绑定，无法泛化到最先进的基于原始字节的NTC模型，或带来显著训练开销。

Method: UniAlign结合了域对齐微调（鼓励学习跨异构网络条件的域不变流量表示）和稳定模型集成（通过在平坦损失区域聚合检查点来增强推理鲁棒性）。该框架可无缝集成到现有监督NTC模型中，无需特定特征模态或引入非恒定额外训练成本。

Result: 在三个公共数据集（涵盖加密方案、数据收集设备和攻击行为等分布偏移）上评估，在两个代表性NTC模型上，相比标准训练，UniAlign将平均分类准确率提升2.51%，平均F1分数提升2.71%，优于最强基线（准确率高1.45%，F1分数高1.69%），且训练时间仅为所有NTC特定基线的12.4%--53.9%。

Conclusion: UniAlign是一个有效且高效的模型无关框架，能够显著提升网络流量分类模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性，同时保持较低的训练开销。

Abstract: Network traffic classification (NTC) models often suffer severe performance degradation when deployed in real-world environments due to distribution shifts caused by changing network conditions. Existing robustness-enhancing approaches are commonly coupled to specific model architectures or data settings, fail to generalize to state-of-the-art raw-byte-based NTC models, or incur significant training overhead. In this paper, we propose UniAlign, a novel model-agnostic framework that improves the robustness of deep learning-based NTC models under distribution shifts. UniAlign combines \emph{domain alignment fine-tuning}, which encourages the learning of domain-invariant traffic representations across heterogeneous network conditions, with \emph{stable model ensembling}, which enhances inference robustness by aggregating checkpoints within a flat loss region. The framework can be seamlessly integrated into existing supervised NTC models without requiring specific feature modalities or introducing non-constant additional training costs. We evaluate UniAlign on three public datasets covering diverse distribution shifts, including encryption schemes, data collection devices, and attack behaviors. Experimental results on two representative NTC models demonstrate that, compared with standard training, UniAlign improves average classification accuracy by 2.51\% and average F1 score by 2.71\%, outperforming the strongest baseline by 1.45\% in accuracy and 1.69\% in F1 score, while requiring only 12.4\%--53.9\% of the training time of all NTC-specific baselines.

</details>


### [492] [Scale-Equivariant Generative Forecasting: Weight-Tied Dilated Convolutions, Wavelet Scattering Inputs, and Spectral-Consistency Training for Self-Similar Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17582)
*Andrea Morandi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了尺度等变WaveNet（SE-WaveNet），一种通过跨层级共享卷积核权重来硬编码自相似性先验的深度生成模型，用于建模具有自相似特性的时间序列。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多自然和工程时间序列（如股票收益、气候异常、湍流速度等）具有自相似特性，但现有的深度生成序列模型（如WaveNet、Transformer等）的多尺度架构忽略了这种尺度不变性，导致参数效率低下且缺乏自相似性归纳偏置。

Method: 提出三个核心贡献：1) 定义一维因果网络的离散尺度等变性，证明跨层共享卷积核权重的扩张卷积堆栈具有尺度等变性；2) 构建SE-WaveNet架构，包括Daubechies-4小波输入、Hurst-FiLM块和谱一致性训练项；3) 使用条件归一化流作为输出头以保持等变性。

Result: 在30年标普500日对数收益数据上，SE-WaveNet在Allan-Variance诊断中表现出更好的尺度塌缩（中位数C* = 0.020），而基线WaveNet为≥0.06。在负对数似然、KS校准和尾部能量距离等指标上表现相当或更好，同时卷积参数减少L倍。

Conclusion: 通过硬编码自相似性归纳偏置，SE-WaveNet能够更有效地建模具有尺度不变性的时间序列，在保持或提升性能的同时显著减少参数数量，为金融时间序列建模提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: Many natural and engineered time series -- equity returns, climate anomalies, turbulent velocities, neural recordings, packet-level network traffic -- are approximately self-similar: their horizon-$T$ distribution is tied to the horizon-$1$ distribution by one scaling exponent $H$. Standard deep generative sequence models (transformers, dilated TCNs, the WaveNet family) ignore this. Their receptive fields are wide, but kernel parameters live independently at every dilation level, yielding a multi-scale architecture, not a scale-equivariant one. We make three contributions. First, we give a precise definition of discrete scale equivariance for 1D causal networks and prove that dyadic dilation commutes (up to boundary effects) with any dilated-convolution stack whose kernel weights are shared across levels. Tying the kernel shrinks the convolutional parameter budget by an $L$-fold factor (where $L$ is depth) and hard-wires self-similarity in as an inductive bias. Second, we wrap this Scale-Equivariant WaveNet (SE-WaveNet) backbone in three components that carry the same prior: a one-level Daubechies-4 wavelet input, a Hurst-FiLM block exposing the local scaling exponent, and a spectral-consistency training term targeting the $|f|^{-(2H+1)}$ power-law spectrum. The head is a conditional normalising flow, chosen to preserve equivariance. Third, on 30 years of S&P 500 daily log-returns, SE-WaveNet samples reproduce the empirical scaling-collapse diagnostic on the Allan-Variance top-25 universe (median $\mathcal{C}^\star = 0.020$), while a vanilla WaveNet at matched capacity does not ($\geq 0.06$). NLL, KS-calibration, and tail energy distance tie or beat the baseline, with $L\times$ fewer convolutional parameters.

</details>


### [493] [Form and Function: Machine Unlearning as a Problem of Misaligned States](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17590)
*Kennon Stewart*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文将在线L-BFGS的机器遗忘问题形式化为反事实状态对齐问题，提出了状态感知的评估指标，并证明遗忘不仅需要修正参数，还需要与可实现的反事实优化器状态对齐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器遗忘方法主要关注参数修正，但忽略了优化器状态（如L-BFGS的内存算子）的重要性。论文提出需要将遗忘问题视为反事实状态对齐问题，确保优化器状态与从未处理删除样本的情况一致。

Method: 将在线L-BFGS遗忘形式化为反事实状态对齐问题；提出状态感知指标（参数误差、内存算子误差、组合状态误差、更新方向误差）；在凸性假设下推导反事实状态偏差的递归边界；评估内存修正和参数修正等干预策略。

Result: 评估显示仅修正参数或内存都不足以实现有效的遗忘，需要与可实现的反事实优化器状态对齐。反事实状态偏差的递归边界为理论分析提供了基础。

Conclusion: 在线L-BFGS的遗忘不仅是参数修正问题，还需要优化器状态与反事实状态对齐。状态感知指标和反事实对齐框架为优化器遗忘提供了新的理论基础和评估方法。

Abstract: We formulate machine unlearning for online L-BFGS as a counterfactual state-alignment problem. Given an actual event stream and a deletion-edited counterfactual stream, the target of unlearning is the optimizer state that would have arisen had the deleted samples never been processed. We introduce state-aware metrics that separately measure parameter error, memory-operator error, combined state error, and update-direction error. The memory metric compares the inverse-Hessian actions induced by the o-L-BFGS memory, rather than treating curvature pairs as of finite influence. Under convexity assumptions, we derive a recursive bound on counterfactual state deviation. We then evaluate a state-aware benchmark of deletion interventions, including memory-only and parameter-only corrections, against an counterfactual oracle model. These results show that unlearning for online L-BFGS is not merely a parameter-correction problem: it requires alignment with a realizable counterfactual optimizer state.

</details>


### [494] [Venom: A PyTorch Generative Modeling Toolkit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17605)
*Liang Yan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: V ENOM是一个教育性PyTorch工具包，将多种生成模型范式统一实现，专注于教学和原型开发而非大规模性能工程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成模型领域碎片化严重，各种范式（扩散模型、VAE、GAN等）通常独立实现，使初学者难以在单一代码库中比较训练目标、推理过程和采样算法。

Method: 开发了V ENOM工具包，采用统一的MNIST-first接口实现多种生成模型家族，强调广度、可读性、可重现入口点和一致的训练/采样API。

Result: 工具包包含扩散模型、流匹配、VAE、归一化流、GAN、能量模型等，提供独立训练/采样脚本、分类器/无分类器引导示例、双语教程和模型家族组织。

Conclusion: V ENOM为教学、原型开发和轻量级基准测试提供了统一框架，帮助用户理解不同生成模型范式之间的异同。

Abstract: Modern generative modeling has grown into a broad collection of related but often separately implemented paradigms, including denoising diffusion models, score-based stochastic differential equations, flow matching, variational autoencoders, normalizing flows, adversarial models, and energy-based models. For newcomers, this fragmentation makes it difficult to compare training objectives, inference procedures, sampling algorithms, and conditioning mechanisms within a single coherent codebase. We introduce V ENOM, an educational PyTorch toolkit that implements representative generative modeling families under a unified, MNIST-first interface. V ENOM emphasizes breadth, readability, reproducible entry points, and consistent training and sampling APIs rather than large-scale performance engineering. The package currently includes diffusion and score-based models, flow matching and one-step generators, variational autoencoders, normalizing flows, generative adversarial networks, and energy-based models. It provides separate training and sampling scripts, classifier and classifier-free guidance examples, bilingual tutorial notebooks, and a model-family organization that supports teaching, prototyping, and lightweight benchmarking.

</details>


### [495] [The Neural Tangent Kernel for Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17606)
*Jonathan Plenk,Sergio Calvo-Ordonez,Alvaro Cartea,Yarin Gal,Mark van der Wilk,Kamil Ciosek*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文将神经正切核(NTK)理论扩展到分类任务，证明了在参数正则化或非退化目标条件下，宽神经网络在交叉熵损失下仍保持恒定NTK，处于"懒惰训练"状态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统NTK理论主要局限于回归损失，而分类损失（如交叉熵）由于非线性输出变换被认为会破坏NTK的恒定性，导致理论失效。本文旨在将NTK理论扩展到分类任务，建立分类训练的理论基础。

Method: 通过识别宽神经网络在分类任务中保持"懒惰训练"状态的条件：1) 使用参数空间正则化确保NTK恒定；2) 在无正则化时，要求目标非退化（所有类别具有严格正概率）。在这些条件下，训练过程可由线性化模型良好近似。

Result: 证明了在参数正则化或非退化目标条件下，宽神经网络在交叉熵损失训练期间NTK保持近似恒定，训练过程可由线性化模型准确描述，并给出了基于NTK的显式解表征。

Conclusion: 成功将NTK理论扩展到分类任务，建立了分类训练的理论框架，分析了训练预测器的分布，并将模型不确定性与贝叶斯方法联系起来，为分类任务的神经网络理论分析提供了新工具。

Abstract: In wide neural networks, the Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) remains approximately constant during training, providing a powerful theoretical tool for studying training dynamics, generalization, and connections to kernel methods. However, this theory is largely restricted to regression losses. It was previously thought that training on a classification loss, or more generally losses involving nonlinear output transformations, breaks this property, leading to divergent logits and a breakdown of the linearization. In this paper, we extend NTK theory to classification by identifying conditions under which wide neural networks remain in the lazy training regime. We show that parameter-space regularization ensures a constant NTK during training for cross-entropy loss, while in the absence of regularization the regime is recovered when targets are non-degenerate, i.e. when all classes have strictly positive probability. Under these conditions, training is well-approximated by the linearized model, yielding an explicit characterization of the solution in terms of the NTK. We further analyze the distribution of trained predictors induced by random initialization and relate this notion of model uncertainty to Bayesian methods.

</details>


### [496] [Adaptive Generate-Rank-Verify: Inference-Time Search with Costly Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17609)
*Shaddin Dughmi,Mahdi Haghifam,Yusuf Hakan Kalayci*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种生成式主动搜索框架，用于解决在推理时结合廉价奖励信号和昂贵验证器的语言模型管道优化问题，通过自适应算法ADAP实现近似最优的验证成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多语言模型推理管道结合了廉价奖励信号和昂贵验证器（如数学推理中的精确答案检查或代码生成中的隐藏测试执行）。现有方法在验证成本优化方面存在不足，需要一种能自适应调整生成和验证策略的框架。

Method: 提出了生成式主动搜索框架，将问题形式化为成本敏感的首正搜索问题。提出了ADAP算法——一种分层自适应生成-排序-验证算法，逐步增加采样响应数量和顶级验证次数。在单调性假设（更高奖励分数更可能通过验证）下，该算法能实现近似最优的验证成本。

Result: 理论分析表明ADAP算法的期望成本在常数因子内接近分布感知最优解。实验验证了在数学推理和竞争编程任务上，ADAP相比固定非自适应策略和难度自适应基线具有显著优势。

Conclusion: 生成式主动搜索为语言模型推理管道中的验证成本优化提供了有效的理论框架和实用算法，通过自适应生成和验证策略在保证质量的同时显著降低验证成本。

Abstract: Many inference-time language-model pipelines combine a cheap reward signal with an expensive verifier, such as exact answer checking in mathematical reasoning or hidden-test execution in code generation.
  We formalize this setting using a learning-theoretic lens as generative active search: a cost-sensitive first-positive search problem in which a policy adaptively samples candidates from an unknown distribution, observes cheap scores, and pays for verifier labels until it finds a positive example. For a fixed prompt, the generator and reward model induce two unknown objects: a distribution over reward scores and a score-conditioned success function. When these quantities are known, we characterize the distribution-aware optimal policy using a dynamic programming approach. In the realistic and practical setting where both the score distribution and success function are unknown, we propose ADAP, a shellwise adaptive generate-rank-verify algorithm that progressively increases the number of sampled responses and top-ranked verifications. Under the monotonicity assumption that higher reward scores are no less likely to pass verification, we show that ADAP achieves expected cost within a constant factor of the distribution-aware optimum. We complement this result with learning-theoretic lower bounds, based on a centered star number, showing that structural assumptions on the score--label relationship are necessary. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and competitive programming validate the predicted advantage over both fixed non-adaptive policies and difficulty-adaptive baselines.

</details>


### [497] [Verifier-Guided Code Translation via Meta-Step Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17626)
*Tianyang Zhou,Somesh Jha,Mihai Christodorescu,Kirill Levchenko,Varun Chandrasekaran*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DTV（解码时验证）是一种在代码翻译任务中，通过结构边界检查和回滚机制，在解码过程中实时验证生成的代码前缀的有效性，从而提高翻译成功率的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通常在生成完成后才进行验证，这效率低下，因为早期错误会破坏自回归上下文且很少被后续纠正。代码翻译任务具有确定性验证器（如编译器、类型检查器），可以实时验证生成的部分代码，这为在解码过程中进行验证提供了机会。

Method: DTV将结构边界作为元步骤，在解码过程中交替进行生成和验证。它使用状态机控制器强制执行有效前缀，通过结构边界检查和结构感知回滚来防止错误传播，同时减少浪费的tokens。

Result: 在C-to-Rust和JavaScript-to-TypeScript翻译任务中，使用Qwen3-4B作为主要生成器，在相同token预算下，DTV将通过率从72.3%提升到82.0%（C-to-Rust）和从33.3%提升到46.0%（JavaScript-to-TypeScript），同时每个案例使用更少的tokens。在Gemma-4-E4B上也观察到类似趋势。

Conclusion: DTV在解码过程中引导验证器进行验证，是在代码翻译任务中有效利用推理时计算的方法，相比后验验证或基于采样的扩展，在通过率-成本权衡方面表现更优。

Abstract: Test-time scaling is an important mechanism for improving large language models, especially on tasks with deterministic verifiers. Code translation is a canonical example: the source program constrains valid outputs, while compilers, type check- ers, and behavioral checks provide exact pass/fail feedback. Existing approaches typically apply these verifiers only after generation, which is inefficient because early errors corrupt the autoregressive context and are rarely corrected later. We introduce Decoding Time Verification (DTV), a framework that treats structural boundaries as meta steps for verifier-guided decoding. DTV interleaves generation with verifier calls under a state-machine controller that enforces valid prefixes, using structural-boundary checks and structure-aware rollback to prevent error propagation while reducing wasted tokens. We evaluate DTV on C-to-Rust and JavaScript-to-TypeScript translation. Using Qwen3-4B as the primary generator under matched token budgets, DTV improves pass rates from 72.3% to 82.0% on C-to-Rust and from 33.3% to 46.0% on JavaScript-to-TypeScript relative to matched self-refinement baselines, while using fewer tokens per case; the same trend largely transfers to Gemma-4-E4B. In the evaluated cost-matched grid, DTV achieves a more favorable pass-rate-cost tradeoff than post-hoc verification or sampling-based scaling. These results show that verifier-guided decoding is an effective use of inference-time compute for code translation.

</details>


### [498] [TabKDE: Simple and Scalable Tabular Data Generation with Kernel Density Estimates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17642)
*Meysam Alishahi,Yan Zheng,Junpeng Wang,Chin-Chia Michael Yeh,Jeff M. Phillips*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于核密度估计和Copula变换的表格数据生成方法，无需训练时间，计算效率高


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表格数据生成方法通常使用计算昂贵的深度学习技术（如VAE、扩散模型），需要大量训练时间，限制了可扩展性和实际应用

Method: 使用Copula变换处理不同类型的数据，结合核密度估计建模分布，通过coreset存储模型，大幅减少存储需求

Result: 在保持与现有方法相近的准确性和防泄漏性能的同时，几乎无需训练时间，可在普通笔记本电脑上处理比现有方法大几个数量级的数据集

Conclusion: 该方法为表格数据生成提供了一种高效、可扩展的解决方案，特别适合大规模数据集，且首次实现了将生成模型存储为原始数据的coreset

Abstract: Tabular data generation considers a large table with multiple columns -- each column comprised of numerical, categorical, or sometimes ordinal values. The goal is to produce new rows for the table that replicate the distribution of rows from the original data -- without just copying those initial rows. The last 4 years have seen enormous progress on this problem, mostly using computational expensive methods that employ one-hot encoding, VAEs, and diffusion.
  This paper describes a new approach to the problem of tabular data generation. By employing copula transformations and modeling the distribution as a kernel density estimate we can nearly match the accuracy and leakage-avoidance achievements of the previous methods, but with almost no training time. Our method is very scalable, and can be run on data sets orders of magnitude larger than prior state-of-the-art on a simple laptop. Moreover, because we employ kernel density estimates, we can store the model as a coreset of the original data -- we believe the first for generative modeling -- and as a result, require significantly less space as well. Our code is available here: \url{https://github.com/tabkde/tabkde-main}

</details>


### [499] [Counterfactual Explanations Under Concept Drift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17651)
*Marcin Kostrzewa,Jerzy Stefanowski,Maciej Zięba*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个用于数据流环境中维护反事实解释有效性的轻量级更新方案，解决了传统反事实解释在概念漂移下会逐渐失效的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大多数反事实解释方法假设静态框架，但在数据流等演化环境中，模型会不断更新，导致之前生成的有效反事实解释可能随着概念漂移而失效，包括鲁棒性反事实解释也无法应对持续漂移。

Method: 提出了一种轻量级、模型无关的更新方案，通过局部采样来估计有效性和合理性方向，同时保持与原始实例的接近性，从而修复现有的反事实解释。

Result: 在合成漂移数据流上的实验表明，初始创建的反事实解释会迅速失去有效性，而经过维护的反事实解释能够以比重复再生更低的成本保持有效性和局部合理性。

Conclusion: 反事实解释维护是在演化数据环境中被忽视的重要问题，提出的轻量级更新方案能够有效应对概念漂移，保持解释的有效性。

Abstract: Counterfactual explanations (CFEs) provide actionable recourse, but most methods assume a static framework with fixed data and a trained classifier. This assumption breaks in evolving data environments, such as data streams, where online models are repeatedly updated under concept drift. We identify CFE maintenance in this setting as a previously overlooked problem: explanations that are valid when generated may silently become invalid as the model evolves, including robust CFEs, which are not designed for continuous drift. We propose a lightweight, model-agnostic update scheme that repairs existing CFEs using local sampling to estimate validity and plausibility directions while preserving proximity to the original instance. Experiments on synthetic drifting streams show that initially created CFEs rapidly lose validity, whereas maintained CFEs preserve validity and local plausibility at a lower cost than repeated regeneration.

</details>


### [500] [LLMForge: Multi-Backend Hardware-Aware Neural Architecture Search with Infinite-Head Attention for Edge Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17653)
*Xinting Jiang,Junyi Luo,Ruichen Qi,Kauna Lei,Ben Laurie,Gregory Kielian,Mehdi Saligane*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LLMForge 是一个硬件感知的神经架构搜索框架，通过三个可组合组件为边缘设备上的 Transformer 语言模型进行架构搜索，针对不同硬件基板优化内存带宽、能耗和延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘设备上的小参数 Transformer 语言模型部署面临内存带宽、能量和热预算限制，需要针对不同硬件基板的成本瓶颈进行架构优化。

Method: 1) Infinite-Head Attention (IHA) 解耦查询头数、KV组数以及每个头的查询/键/值维度，扩展注意力配置空间；2) Forge-Former 编码器作为代理模型评估架构候选；3) Forge-DSE 基于 NSGA-II 的设计空间探索引擎，结合多后端硬件成本模型。

Result: 在四种不同硬件基板上，搜索收敛到明显不同的架构形状，跟踪各基板的成本瓶颈。在多芯片环基板上，获得三个 300M 规模的 Pareto 前沿变体：准确变体验证损失最低（2.798），能耗优化变体降低每 token 能耗 40%，延迟优化变体降低 TTFT 和 TPOT 43%。

Conclusion: LLMForge 框架能够针对不同硬件基板的特定成本瓶颈进行有效的架构搜索，在准确率、能耗和延迟方面实现显著优化，为边缘设备上的语言模型部署提供硬件感知的解决方案。

Abstract: Sub-billion-parameter Transformer language models are increasingly deployed on edge devices, where the privacy, latency, and operating-cost advantages of on-device inference are constrained by tight memory-bandwidth, energy, and thermal budgets that make architectural choice and accelerator-specific cost central to efficient inference. We present LLMForge, a hardware-aware neural architecture search (NAS) framework whose three composable contributions together make edge-LM architecture search hardware-conditioned, since different substrates impose different hardware cost bottlenecks. Infinite-Head Attention (IHA) decouples the number of query heads, KV groups, and per-head query/key and value dimensions, expanding the feasible per-layer attention configuration space by approximately 400x over grouped-query attention within our search-space ranges. Forge-Former, an encoder-based surrogate for ranking architectural candidates, outperforms MLP and random-forest baselines. Forge-DSE, an NSGA-II-based design-space-exploration engine, pairs Forge-Former with a multi-backend hardware cost model spanning GPUs, systolic accelerators, and ring-dataflow edge accelerators. Across four different hardware substrates, the searches converge to visibly different architectures whose shapes track each substrate's cost bottleneck. On the multi-chip ring substrate, our co-search returns three 300M-scale deployment-aware variants on the Pareto front. Each is re-trained on FineWeb-Edu-10BT under matched recipe against SmolLM2-360M and Qwen-0.5B architecture baselines. The accurate variant has the lowest validation loss 2.798 and competitive benchmark performance with fewer parameters, the energy-optimized variant lowers energy per token by 40%, and the latency-optimized variant lowers TTFT and TPOT by 43%.

</details>


### [501] [When a Zero-Shooter Cheats: Improving Age Estimation via Activation Steering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17658)
*Erik Imgrund,Pia Hanfeld,Klim Kireev,Konrad Rieck*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究发现，基于视觉语言模型（VLM）的零样本年龄估计存在"身份捷径"问题：模型倾向于识别图像中的人物身份，然后从记忆的知识中推断其年龄，而不是从视觉特征估计年龄。这导致对非名人误判为名人时产生严重错误，并在以名人图像为主的流行基准测试中表现出虚假的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了保护未成年人免受有害在线内容和互动的影响，需要自动年龄估计技术。虽然视觉语言模型在年龄估计任务上取得了最先进的性能，但研究发现其零样本特性导致了一个意外的副作用——"身份捷径"现象，这影响了年龄估计的准确性和可靠性。

Method: 提出了一种激活引导方法，通过干预VLM的隐藏状态来抑制身份捷径。该方法旨在改善对记忆身份和未见身份图像的年龄估计准确性。

Result: 提出的方法显著提高了年龄估计的准确性，在流行基准测试中将平均绝对误差降低了高达25%，同时改善了对记忆身份和未见身份图像的年龄估计性能。

Conclusion: VLM零样本年龄估计中的身份捷径问题需要关注，提出的激活引导方法能有效缓解这一问题，提高年龄估计的准确性和鲁棒性，对在线年龄验证系统的实际应用具有重要意义。

Abstract: Different age-related regulations have been proposed to protect minors from harmful content and interactions online. Automated age estimation is central to enforcing such regulations, and vision-language models (VLMs) achieve state-of-the-art performance on this task. However, we find that the zero-shot nature of VLM-based age estimation produces an unexpected side effect we call the identity shortcut: Instead of estimating age from visual features, VLMs tend to identify the depicted person and infer their age from memorized knowledge. This phenomenon leads to substantially incorrect predictions when non-celebrities are misidentified as celebrities. It also produces deceptively high robustness to noise and adversarial perturbations on celebrity images, which dominate popular benchmarks. To mitigate this, we propose an activation steering method that suppresses the shortcut by intervening on the hidden states of the VLM. This method improves age estimation accuracy for both memorized and unseen identities, reducing mean absolute error by up to 25% across popular benchmarks.

</details>


### [502] [Bug or Feature$^2$: Weight Drift, Activation Sparsity, and Spikes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17659)
*Egor Shvetsov,Aleksandr Serkov,Shokorov Viacheslav,Redko Dmitry,Vladislav Goloshchapov,Evgeny Burnaev*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究发现标准损失函数与正偏置激活函数相互作用会导致负权重漂移，这在优化过程中是固有的而非数据依赖的。这种漂移产生高达90%的激活稀疏性，并在约70%稀疏性以上出现准确率断崖。通过ReLU²和GELU²等改进方法可以在保持稀疏性的同时提高性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代神经架构设计通过增量经验选择趋同，但其训练动态机制仍不完全清楚。作者发现标准损失函数与正偏置激活函数相互作用会导致负权重漂移，这影响了训练动态和模型性能。

Method: 理论证明在MSE或交叉熵损失下，正预激活的梯度在初始化时非负，导致下游权重向负值漂移。通过实验验证该现象在不同架构（MLP、ResNet、ViT、GPT-nano、MP-SENe）和激活函数（ReLU、GELU、SiLU）中的普遍性。分析稀疏性-准确率权衡，并提出ReLU²、GELU²和剪裁改进方法。

Result: 负权重漂移是优化固有的现象，与ReLU结合可产生高达90%的激活稀疏性。在79种配置中发现稀疏性超过约70%时出现准确率断崖。剪裁ReLU²优于未剪裁版本，GELU²在GPT-nano上获得最低验证损失。

Conclusion: 负权重漂移是标准损失函数与正偏置激活函数相互作用的固有特征，影响训练动态和模型稀疏性。通过适当修改激活函数（如剪裁ReLU²和GELU²）可以在保持稀疏性优势的同时提高性能，为神经架构设计提供新见解。

Abstract: The design of modern neural architectures has converged through incremental empirical choices, yet the mechanisms governing their training dynamics remain only partially understood. We identify and analyze a negative weight drift induced by the interaction between standard losses and positively biased activation functions. We prove that under MSE or cross-entropy loss, the gradient with respect to positive pre-activations is non-negative in expectation at initialization, driving downstream weights toward negative values during early training. The drift is intrinsic to optimization rather than data, and persists across architectures (MLP, ResNet, ViT, GPT-nano, MP-SENe) and asymmetric activation functions (ReLU, GELU, SiLU). Coupled with ReLU, weight drift produces activation sparsity reaching up to 90\% in GPT-nano. We characterize the sparsity-accuracy tradeoff across 79 configurations and identify a sharp accuracy cliff above $\sim$70\% activation sparsity. While ReLU$^2$ achieves a good sparsity--accuracy ratio in GPT-nano, it pathologically amplifies identified activation spikes in intermediate transformer layers. Clipping resolves this while preserving the representational benefits of squaring: clipped ReLU$^2$ outperforms its unclipped version, and GELU$^2$ achieves the lowest validation loss on GPT-nano. Code is available at https://github.com/On-Point-RND/BugOrFeature.

</details>


### [503] [PEIRA: Learning Predictive Encoders through Inter-View Regressor Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17671)
*Michael Arbel,Basile Terver,Jean Ponce*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文分析了基于自蒸馏的非对比自监督学习方法（如SimSiam、BYOL等）的理论缺陷，提出了PEIRA方法，通过显式优化线性回归器迹来学习表示，证明了其稳定平衡点对应于非平凡全局最小化器，并在实验中验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前流行的非对比自监督学习方法（如SimSiam、BYOL、I-JEPA、DINO）虽然有效，但缺乏明确定义的优化目标，理论理解不足。论文旨在为这类方法提供理论分析框架，并设计具有明确目标函数的方法。

Method: 1) 分析JEPA变体使用正则化线性回归器预测数据两个视图表示的动力稳定性；2) 提出PEIRA方法，通过显式优化线性回归器迹作为目标函数，确保稳定平衡点对应非平凡全局最小化器；3) 实验在ImageNet-1K和CIFAR-10上与VICReg、LeJEPA基准比较。

Result: 理论分析表明：非崩溃稳定平衡点对应领先的非线性典型相关子空间，崩溃平衡点也可能是稳定吸引子。PEIRA方法仅有的稳定平衡点是非平凡全局最小化器，能恢复相同的典型相关子空间，正则化选择有效维度。实验显示PEIRA与VICReg和LeJEPA基线竞争力相当。

Conclusion: 论文为基于自蒸馏的非对比自监督学习提供了理论分析框架，证明了其稳定平衡点与典型相关分析的联系，并提出了具有明确目标函数的PEIRA方法，在理论和实验上均验证了有效性。

Abstract: Non-contrastive self-supervised learning (SSL) is an effective framework for predictive representation learning, but popular (and in practice effective) methods such as SimSiam, BYOL, I-JEPA or DINO, which rely on a form of self-distillation to train a teacher-student network, remain poorly understood as they typically do not minimize a well-defined objective. We analyze the dynamics of a variant of the Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA) using a regularized linear regressor to predict the learned representations of two views of the data from one another, and fully characterize its stability: non-collapsed stable equilibria align with leading nonlinear canonical correlation subspaces, while collapsed equilibria may also be stable attractors. Motivated by this result, we introduce PEIRA, a non-contrastive SSL method with an explicit objective defined through the trace of the optimal linear regressor. We show that its only stable equilibria are nontrivial global minimizers and recover the same canonical correlation subspaces, with regularization selecting the effective dimension. Experiments on ImageNet-1K and CIFAR-10 show PEIRA is competitive with VICReg and LeJEPA baselines, and qualitative empirical results support the theory.

</details>


### [504] [Exact Convex Reformulations of Linear Neural Networks via Completely Positive Lifting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17692)
*Karthik Prakhya,Alp Yurtsever*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种深度线性神经网络平方损失训练问题的精确凸重构方法，通过提升空间和广义完全正锥将非凸问题转化为凸优化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度线性神经网络的训练问题本质上是非凸的，传统方法难以保证找到全局最优解。本文旨在通过精确的凸重构方法，为这一非凸问题提供一个理论框架，从而更好地理解线性神经网络训练的本质。

Method: 将多层参数化简化为双线性因子分解，提升为秩约束的半定规划，通过互补条件表达秩约束，最后应用完全正提升技术，在广义完全正锥上得到线性神经网络训练的精确凸表示。

Result: 得到了深度线性神经网络训练问题的精确凸重构，该重构与原非凸问题具有相同的最优值，提升维度仅依赖于输入输出维度，与网络深度和数据点数量无关，瓶颈宽度仅通过标量约束体现。

Conclusion: 该工作为线性神经网络训练提供了精确的锥表示，揭示了线性因子分解诱导的非凸性本质，并将线性神经网络训练与完全正规划联系起来，尽管所得公式在计算上通常难以处理，但为理论分析提供了重要框架。

Abstract: We show that the training problem of a deep linear neural network under the squared loss admits an exact convex reformulation in a lifted space over a generalized completely positive cone. The reformulation has the same optimal value as the original nonconvex problem and is linear in the lifted variables, with all nonconvexity encoded in the cone constraint. Its ambient lifted dimension depends only on the input and output dimensions, independent of the network depth and the number of data points, and the bottleneck width enters only through scalar constraints. The construction proceeds by reducing the multilayer parameterization to a bilinear factorization, lifting it to a rank-constrained semidefinite program, expressing the rank constraint via a complementarity condition, and applying a completely positive lifting. While the resulting formulation is computationally intractable in general, it gives an exact conic representation of the nonconvexity induced by linear factorization and connects linear neural network training with copositive programming.

</details>


### [505] [Fine-tuning Pocket-Aware Diffusion Models via Denoising Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17693)
*Yuan Xue,Daniel Kudenko,Megha Khosla*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DEPPA：一种基于扩散模型和强化学习的结构优化分子优化方法，通过RL微调预训练口袋感知扩散模型，实现对多属性（结合亲和力、类药性、可合成性、多样性）的优化控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于结构的药物设计方法主要拟合训练分布，难以同时满足实际药物发现所需的多种属性要求。结构分子优化需要更精细的多属性控制。

Method: 将预训练口袋感知扩散模型的反向去噪过程建模为多步马尔可夫决策过程，通过强化学习微调，使用粗粒度去噪调度器提高优化效率。

Result: 在CrossDocked2020基准测试中，DEPPA在结合亲和力（Vina Score -8.5 kcal/mol）、类药性和多样性方面优于基线方法，在可合成性方面表现具有竞争力。

Conclusion: DEPPA通过结合扩散模型和强化学习，实现了有效的多属性分子优化，为基于结构的药物设计提供了新方法。

Abstract: Structure-based drug design has been accelerated by pocket-aware 3D generative models, yet most methods primarily fit the training distribution and may fall short of satisfying multiple properties required in real-world therapeutic drug discovery. Recently, increasing attention has focused on structure-based molecule optimization (SBMO), which targets fine-grained control over multiple specified molecular properties. In this paper, we present DEPPA, a novel SBMO approach building upon Denoising Diffusion Policy Optimization for fine-tuning a pre-trained pocket-aware diffusion model via reinforcement learning. DEPPA enables optimization over multiple properties, including binding affinity, drug-likeness, synthesizability and diversity. We formulate the reverse denoising process of the pretrained pocket-aware diffusion model as a multi-step Markov Decision Process, where the desired properties that serve as reward signals are evaluated on the final generated ligand molecules. DEPPA incorporates a coarse denoising scheduler during the RL fine-tuning to achieve efficient and effective molecule optimization. Experimental results on the CrossDocked2020 benchmark demonstrate that DEPPA outperforms baselines in binding affinity (Vina Score -8.5 kcal/mol), drug-likeness and diversity while exhibiting competitive performance in synthesizability. The source code is available at https://github.com/xy9485/DePPA .

</details>


### [506] [Agent Bazaar: Enabling Economic Alignment in Multi-Agent Marketplaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17698)
*Seth Karten,Cameron Crow,Chi Jin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个多智能体模拟框架Agent Bazaar，用于评估大型语言模型作为自主经济代理时的系统性风险，包括价格波动放大和市场欺骗等问题，并通过强化学习训练提升经济对齐能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大型语言模型作为自主经济代理部署到市场，它们的集体行为可能放大市场波动和掩盖大规模欺骗，带来超越单个代理能力失败的系统性风险，需要评估经济对齐能力。

Method: 提出了Agent Bazaar多智能体模拟框架，识别了两种失败模式：B2C市场的算法不稳定性和C2C市场的Sybil欺骗。通过REINFORCE++强化学习结合自适应课程训练智能体，并提出了经济对齐评分（EAS）作为评估指标。

Result: 研究发现现有模型大多无法自我调节，失败严重程度与模型规模无关。通过强化学习训练的9B模型在所有评估的前沿和开源模型中表现最佳，经济对齐能力可以通过针对性训练提升。

Conclusion: 经济对齐能力与通用能力正交，可以通过有针对性的强化学习直接训练。需要开发经济对齐的安全机制来确保市场稳定和完整性。

Abstract: The deployment of Large Language Models (LLMs) as autonomous economic agents introduces systemic risks that extend beyond individual capability failures. As agents transition to directly interacting with marketplaces, their collective behavior can amplify volatility and mask deception at scale. We introduce the Agent Bazaar, a multi-agent simulation framework for evaluating Economic Alignment, the capacity of agentic systems to preserve market stability and integrity. We identify two failure modes: (1) Algorithmic Instability in a B2C market ("The Crash"), where firms amplify price volatility until the market collapses, and (2) Sybil Deception in a C2C market ("The Lemon Market"), where a single deceptive agent controlling multiple coordinated seller identities floods the market with fraudulent listings, eroding trust and consumer welfare. We evaluate frontier and open-weight models across both scenarios and find that models largely fail to self-regulate, with failure severity varying by model rather than by size.
