  The key findings of our study are as follows: (1) DE provides stronger predictive robustness under domain shift than MCD, an advantage that becomes clear primarily under external shift. (2) Recalibrated GNLL-based methods yield the best uncertainty calibration (e.g., GNLL+DE+CP for systolic blood pressure (SBP), GNLL+DE+TS for diastolic blood pressure (DBP)), while MSE-based uncertainty requires recalibration to become practically useful. (3) Across settings, CP and TS offer the most consistent gains, with IR remaining competitive in several cases.
  Overall, our results identify DE-based methods as most robust for predictive performance under domain shift, GNLL as strongest for native UQ, and recalibration as essential for making MSE-based uncertainty practical. These findings highlight the need to jointly assess predictive accuracy and calibration on external data for trustworthy cuffless BP estimation

</details>


### [544] [LogRouter: Adaptive Two-Level LLM Routing for Log Question Answering in Big Data Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18015)
*Mert Coskuner,Merve Zeybel,Melik Mert Dolan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LogRouter是一个用于生产日志分析的系统，在资源受限环境中通过智能路由机制，结合多种查询路径（直接响应、关键词搜索、模板查询、语义检索）和LLM选择，显著降低延迟同时保持回答质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在自托管、资源受限的生产环境中，需要对海量日志流进行自然语言访问，但将所有查询都通过大型语言模型处理成本过高。需要一种既能提供自然语言查询能力，又能在成本和性能之间取得平衡的解决方案。

Method: LogRouter系统包含：1) PySpark-based Drain3日志摄取管道；2) GPU加速的嵌入；3) Apache Druid和PostgreSQL with pgvector的双索引存储；4) 两级成本感知路由器，将查询分发到四个执行路径：直接响应、Druid关键词搜索、模板查询+SQL生成、pgvector语义检索；5) Level-2路由器选择14B或32B类生成器；6) 专用coder LLM处理文本到SQL生成。

Result: 在四个LogHub数据集（70个问题）上的评估显示：路由器平均准确率达到88.4%（Linux上94.7%）；完整流水线平均ROUGE-1为0.373，BERTScore为0.879，RAGAS Faithfulness为0.779，端到端延迟18.6秒。在离线比较中，路由系统比Fixed-32B基线延迟降低55%（46.3秒 vs 102.1秒），Answer Correctness仅下降5.8分，并在所有数据集上超过Fixed-14B基线的RAGAS Faithfulness。

Conclusion: 成本感知调度是一种实用的生产日志QA机制：路由机制能够以不到一半的延迟恢复always-32B配置的大部分质量，且L1关键词词汇表无需学习分类器就能以高精度做出路由决策。

Abstract: Production log analytics in self-hosted, resource-constrained environments requires natural-language access to massive log streams without the cost of routing every query through a large language model. We present LogRouter, an end-to-end log question-answering system deployed on TUBITAK BILGEM's national big data platform that combines a PySpark-based Drain3 ingestion pipeline, GPU-accelerated embeddings, and dual-index storage in Apache Druid and PostgreSQL with pgvector. A two-level cost-aware router dispatches each query along one of four execution paths: direct response, Druid keyword search, template lookup with SQL generation, and pgvector semantic retrieval, while a Level-2 router selects either a 14B-class or 32B-class generator for the semantic path. A dedicated coder LLM handles text-to-SQL generation. We evaluate the system on four LogHub datasets (Linux, Apache, Windows, and Mac; 70 questions in total) under both an online full-pipeline configuration and an offline configuration that isolates the generator. The router reaches 88.4% mean accuracy across datasets and 94.7% on Linux, while the full pipeline attains a mean ROUGE-1 of 0.373, BERTScore of 0.879, RAGAS Faithfulness of 0.779, and an end-to-end latency of 18.6 s. In an apples-to-apples offline comparison, the routed system reduces mean latency by 55% versus a Fixed-32B baseline (46.3 s vs. 102.1 s) while preserving Answer Correctness within 5.8 points and exceeding a Fixed-14B baseline on RAGAS Faithfulness across every dataset. Cost-aware dispatching is therefore a practical mechanism for production log QA: routing recovers most of the quality of an always-32B configuration at less than half the latency, and the L1 keyword vocabulary makes that routing decision with high precision without a learned classifier.

</details>


### [545] [Federated Learning by Utility-Constrained Stochastic Aggregation for Improving Rational Participation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18020)
*M Yashwanth,Arunabh Singh,Ashok Nayak,Sai Kiran Bulusu,Anirban Chakraborty*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FedUCA：通过效用约束随机聚合提升理性参与度的联邦学习框架，解决客户端因统计异构而退出的问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统联邦学习假设客户端被动配合服务器，但现实中客户端是理性主体，可能因本地模型效用不足而退出联盟，导致全局模型性能下降甚至崩溃。特别是在统计异构显著的环境中，客户端可能因协作收益未达本地效用阈值而退出。

Method: FedUCA（联邦学习效用约束随机聚合）框架将服务器角色形式化为优化器，通过维持客户端参与度来最大化全局模型性能。采用效用约束的随机聚合策略，优先考虑参与可行性。

Result: 在标准数据集上的广泛实验表明，FedUCA通过优先考虑参与可行性，显著提高了客户端保留率，从而实现了更优的全局模型性能。

Conclusion: FedUCA框架通过形式化服务器优化角色和效用约束聚合，有效解决了理性客户端参与问题，提高了联邦学习在真实跨组织环境中的稳定性和性能。

Abstract: Federated Learning (FL) algorithms implicitly assume that clients passively comply with server-side orchestration by sharing local model updates upon server request. However, this overlooks an important aspect in real-world cross-silo environments: clients are often rational agents who may prioritize their utilities such as local model performance over that of the global model. In settings with significant statistical heterogeneity, rational clients may opt out of the federation if the perceived benefits of collaboration fail to meet their local utility thresholds. Such attrition degrades the global model performance and can lead to the collapse of the federated training process. In this work, we introduce FedUCA, (Federated Learning by Utility-Constrained Stochastic Aggregation for Improving Rational Participation), a framework that formalizes the server's role as an optimizer seeking to maximize global model performance by sustaining client participation. We substantiate our framework through extensive experiments on standard datasets demonstrating that by prioritizing participation feasibility, FedUCA achieves significantly higher client retention and, consequently, a superior global model performance.

</details>


### [546] [Unveiling Memorization-Generalization Coexistence: A Case Study on Arithmetic Tasks with Label Noise](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18022)
*Linyu Liu,Pinyan Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 过参数化模型在记忆噪声标签的同时仍能良好泛化，本文通过模运算任务研究其机制，发现大模型在适当配置下泛化更好，噪声标签被更快记忆，泛化结构被噪声拟合需求抑制，但可通过频域方法提取。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究过参数化模型同时记忆噪声标签和良好泛化的共存机制，理解这两种看似矛盾行为如何在同一模型中实现。

Method: 使用模运算任务和重噪声标签，在两层神经网络上进行大量实验，分析模型大小、优化配置的影响，提出任务无关的网络划分方法和频域提取方法。

Result: 大模型在适当配置下泛化更好，噪声标签比干净数据被更快记忆，模型内部形成泛化结构但输出被噪声拟合需求抑制，即使80%噪声下也能通过频域方法实现近乎完美的测试准确率。

Conclusion: 过参数化模型内部存在泛化结构但被噪声标签抑制，频域方法能有效提取该结构，但网络划分方法效果有限，表明泛化结构分布在多个神经元中，需要新工具来提取过参数化网络中的可泛化知识。

Abstract: Highly over-parameterized models can simultaneously memorize noisy labels and generalize well, yet how these behaviors coexist remains poorly understood. In this work, we investigate the underlying mechanisms of this coexistence using modular arithmetic tasks under heavy label noise. Through extensive experiments on two-layer neural networks, we find that larger models tend to generalize better under appropriate optimization and model configurations, while noisy labels are memorized faster than clean data. Over-parameterized models internally form a generalization structure, but its expression in the output is suppressed by the need to fit noisy labels. Remarkably, even with 80\% label noise, near-perfect test accuracy can be achieved by extracting this internal structure using frequency-based methods. We further propose a task-agnostic method to partition networks into generalization and memorization components. Although this subnetwork improves generalization, it is limited compared with frequency-based extraction, indicating that the generalization structure is distributed across neurons and motivating the development of new tools to retrieve generalizable knowledge from over-parameterized networks.

</details>


### [547] [Interaction-Breaking Adversarial Learning Framework for Robust Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18024)
*Sunwoo Lee,Mingu Kang,Yonghyeon Jo,Seungyul Han*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出IBAL框架，通过信息论视角构建攻击来破坏多智能体交互，并训练智能体在扰动下保持鲁棒性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有鲁棒多智能体强化学习方法主要关注价值导向攻击，但忽视了交互结构本身被破坏的情况。当外部扰动中断智能体间交互时，学习到的协调策略会变得脆弱。

Method: 提出交互破坏对抗学习(IBAL)框架：1)从信息论视角构建攻击，通过扰动智能体的观测和动作来阻碍协调；2)训练智能体在此类干扰下可靠执行任务。

Result: 经验验证表明，该方法在多种攻击设置下比现有鲁棒MARL基线具有更好的鲁棒性，即使在智能体缺失场景下也能获得更强的性能。

Conclusion: IBAL框架通过对抗性训练提升多智能体系统在交互结构被破坏时的鲁棒性，填补了现有方法在应对交互破坏攻击方面的空白。

Abstract: Cooperation is central to multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), yet learned coordination can be fragile when external perturbations disrupt inter-agent interactions. Prior robust MARL methods have primarily considered value-oriented attacks, leaving a gap in robustness when interaction structures themselves are corrupted. In this paper, we propose an interaction-breaking adversarial learning (IBAL) framework that takes an information-theoretic view to construct attacks that impede coordination by perturbing agents' observations and actions, and trains agents to perform reliably under such disruptions. Empirically, our approach improves robustness over existing robust MARL baselines across diverse attack settings and yields stronger performance even under agent-missing scenarios.

</details>


### [548] [FedSDR: Federated Self-Distillation with Rectification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18028)
*Ziheng Ren,Zhanming Shen,Hao Wang,Ning Liu,You Song*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出FedSDR框架，通过联邦自蒸馏与双流机制解决大语言模型联邦微调中的数据异构问题，在提升性能的同时减少幻觉和冗余。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦学习防御方法忽视了数据分布不匹配的根本原因，导致大语言模型联邦微调面临严重的统计异构问题。

Method: 首先建立联邦自蒸馏（FedSD）作为基础策略，将客户端表示投影到平滑的"模型理解空间"。然后提出FedSDR框架，包含双流机制：本地LoRA-S分支通过蒸馏数据隐式吸收异构性，并行全局LoRA-R分支基于原始数据确保事实正确性，仅聚合LoRA-R分支获得全局对齐的可靠模型。

Result: FedSDR在广泛实验中验证了其优越性能，相比传统算法表现更佳，同时解决了自蒸馏可能带来的幻觉和冗余增加问题。

Conclusion: FedSDR是一个强化框架，通过联邦自蒸馏与双流校正机制，有效解决联邦学习中数据异构问题，获得全局对齐且可靠的模型。

Abstract: Federated fine-tuning of Large Language Models faces severe statistical heterogeneity. However, existing model-level defenses often overlook the root cause: intrinsic data distribution mismatches. In this work, we first establish Federated Self-Distillation (FedSD) as a fundamental and potent strategy. By projecting client representations into a smoothed ``model-understanding space,'' FedSD alone serves as a universal booster, demonstrating superior performance over conventional algorithms. Despite its success, we identify a subtle trade-off termed the Rewrite Paradox -- unconstrained self-distillation can inadvertently increase hallucinations and redundancy. To refine this paradigm, we further propose FedSDR (Federated Self-Distillation with Rectification), the ultimate reinforced framework. It augments FedSD with a dual-stream mechanism: a local LoRA-S (Smoothing) branch to implicitly absorb heterogeneity via distilled data, and a parallel global LoRA-R (Rectification) branch anchored to raw data to enforce factual correctness. By selectively aggregating only LoRA-R, FedSDR yields a globally aligned and faithful model. Extensive experiments verify its superior performance.

</details>


### [549] [Protection Is (Nearly) All You Need: Structural Protection Dominates Scoring in Globally Capped KV Eviction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18053)
*Gabriel Garcia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了KV缓存逐出策略在共享全局解码时间限制下的表现，发现所有策略都存在提示边界漏洞，但通过保留10%缓存边界保护可以显著恢复性能，保护机制比评分策略更重要。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在共享全局解码时间限制下不同KV缓存逐出策略的性能，特别关注这些策略在提示边界处的脆弱性，以及如何通过结构保护来提升长上下文处理能力。

Method: 评估七种缓存逐出策略（LRU、H2O、SnapKV、StreamingLLM、Ada-KV、QUEST、Random），在六个纯Transformer模型上进行测试。提出边界保护方法（保留10%缓存），使用注意力质量分析（Qwen2.5-3B模型）来理解边界令牌的重要性，并在多个长上下文基准（LongBench、NIAH-32K）上进行验证。

Result: 无保护时所有策略在提示边界处崩溃（F1≤0.064）；保留10%缓存边界保护可恢复69-90%的参考性能（C=2048 vs C=256）。注意力分析显示位置0的sink token持有约75%的前缀注意力质量。边界保护后，简化评分变体与LRU等效（Δ=0.02）；在K=8时注意力策略优于LRU 0.011-0.021 F1。完整Ada-KV/QUEST在Mistral-7B和Phi-3.5上提供额外0.03-0.04 F1提升。

Conclusion: 边界保护机制至关重要，评分策略差异在边界受保护后成为次要因素。每个头的分配能带来适度增益，但保护机制主导性能提升。在64K长度下，保护有帮助但恢复有限，只有在模型本身支持强64K检索能力时才能实现接近全缓存性能。

Abstract: We study KV cache eviction under a shared globally capped decode-time harness. Seven policies (LRU, H2O, SnapKV, StreamingLLM, Ada-KV, QUEST, Random) share a prompt-boundary vulnerability: without structural protection, they collapse to near-zero quality on six pure-transformer models (F1$\leq$0.064). Reserving 10\% of cache at each boundary recovers 69--90\% of the $C{=}2{,}048$ reference-ceiling quality on seven LongBench models at $C{=}256$ (13\% retention); a ten-model panel spans 68--98\%. An attention-mass pilot (Qwen2.5-3B, $N{=}30$) suggests why: the position-0 sink holds ${\sim}75\%$ of prefix mass, while other boundary tokens sit near ${\sim}0.41{\times}$ uniform expectation, so attention scorers retain the sink but still drop structurally critical tokens. With protection, simplified score-isolation variants are TOST-equivalent to LRU at $K{=}32$ ($Δ{=}0.02$); at $K{=}8$, attention policies pairwise converge yet beat LRU by 0.011--0.021 F1 across $C{=}256$ and $C{=}512$. Faithful Ada-KV/QUEST add ${\sim}0.03$--$0.04$ F1 on Mistral-7B and Phi-3.5 beyond simplified variants. A NIAH-32K regime-transfer pilot on Qwen3-4B (decode vs.\ prefill, $C{\in}\{512,2048\}$) shows near-identical protection lifts (ratio 0.99--1.00). At 64K, protection helps but recovery is modest; faithful per-head scoring matches full-cache ceiling on Gemma-3-4B at 6.3\% retention only when the model already supports strong 64K retrieval without eviction. Overall: protection dominates; scoring differences are secondary once boundaries are guarded; per-head allocation gives a further modest gain.

</details>


### [550] [FLAG: Foundation model representation with Latent diffusion Alignment via Graph for spatial gene expression prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18055)
*Qi Si,Penglei Wang,Yushuai Wu,Yifeng Jiao,Xuyang Liu,Xin Guo,Yuan Qi,Yuan Cheng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FLAG是一个基于扩散的框架，用于从常规H&E染色图像预测空间基因表达，通过建模结构化分布来保留基因协调和空间分布等生物学结构，解决了基因维度诅咒问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前模型将空间基因表达预测视为孤立的点任务，忽略了基因协调和空间分布等关键生物学结构。需要一种能够保留这些关系的结构化方法。

Method: FLAG是一个扩散基的框架，通过空间图编码器保持拓扑一致性，并利用基因基础模型（GFM）对齐确保生成过程中的基因-基因保真度，从而解决高维空间中的基因维度诅咒问题。

Result: FLAG在传统准确性（PCC/MSE）方面具有竞争力，同时在捕获基因-基因和基因-空间关系方面显著提高了结构保真度。实验证明了其优越性能。

Conclusion: FLAG通过结构化分布建模成功解决了空间基因表达预测中的基因维度诅咒问题，提供了更好的结构保真度，并为该领域引入了新的评估指标。

Abstract: Predicting spatial gene expression from routine H\&E enables large-scale molecular profiling, yet current models treat this as isolated pointwise tasks, thereby overlooking essential biological structures like gene coordination and spatial distribution. To preserve these relationships, we introduce \textbf{FLAG}, a diffusion-based framework that redefines this task as structured distribution modeling. At the same time, we identify the critical \textbf{Gene Dimension Curse}, where joint modeling gene expression and their spatial interactions fail in high-dimensional spaces, and FLAG solves this challenge by integrating a spatial graph encoder for topological consistency and utilizing Gene Foundation Model (GFM) alignment for gene-gene fidelity in the generation process. To rigorously assess model performance, we propose a set of novel structural evaluation metrics, including Gene Structural Correlation (\textbf{GSC}) and Spatial Structural Correlation (\textbf{SSC}). Our experiments demonstrate that FLAG is highly competitive in traditional accuracy (PCC/MSE) while achieving significantly enhanced structural fidelity in capturing both gene-gene and gene-spatial relationships. The code is available at https://github.com/darkflash03/FLAG.

</details>


### [551] [Improving Spatio-Temporal Residual Error Propagation by Mitigating Over-Squashing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18068)
*Seyed Mohamad Moghadas,Esther Rodrigo Bonet,Bruno Cornelis,Adrian Munteanu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Teger是一个结构化不确定性模块，通过空间曲率感知的图重连机制解决时空误差传播问题，提高多变量时间序列预测的可靠性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决循环模型中残差误差传播的基本问题，即小的预测不准确性随时间累积并降低长期性能。现有方法通常假设误差时间独立且忽略观测网络的空间相关性，需要准确建模残差的相关结构以实现可靠的不确定性量化。

Method: 提出Teger模块，包含空间曲率感知的图重连机制，通过离散Forman曲率识别信息瓶颈边并显式加强。该组件集成到低秩加对角协方差头中，通过Woodbury恒等式保持可处理的推理。Teger是主干无关的，只需要任何自回归编码器产生的潜在状态。

Result: 在LSTM、Transformer和xLSTM主干上，在四个真实世界时空数据集上评估，显示在连续排名概率得分(CRPS)上有一致的改进。提供了理论分析，连接曲率感知重连与(i)过挤压缓解，(ii)改进谱连接性，(iii)减少有效阻力，(iv)改进协方差校准界限。

Conclusion: Teger克服了误差相关自回归预测的空间和时间限制，通过结构化不确定性模块改进了多变量时间序列预测的可靠性，具有理论保证和实验验证的有效性。

Abstract: Residual error propagation remains a fundamental problem in recurrent models, where small prediction inaccuracies compound over time and degrade long-horizon performance. Accurately modeling the correlation structure of such residuals is critical for reliable uncertainty quantification in probabilistic multivariate timeseries forecasting. While recent time-series deep models efficiently parametrize time-varying contemporaneous correlations, they often assume temporal independence of errors and neglect spatial correlation across the observed network. In this paper, we introduce Teger, a structured uncertainty module that overcomes the spa- tial and temporal limitations of error-correlated autoregressive forecasting. Teger proposes a spatial curvature-aware graph rewiring mechanism explicitly strengthening information-bottleneck edges identified by discrete Forman curvature. The component is integrated into a low-rank-plus-diagonal covariance head, preserving tractable inference via the Woodbury identity. Teger is backbone-agnostic, requiring only the latent state produced by any autoregressive encoder. We provide theoretical evidence of Teger, and experimentally evaluate it on LSTM, Transformer, and xLSTM backbones across four real-world spatio-temporal datasets, showing consistent improvement in Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS). We further provide a formal theoretical analysis connecting curvature-aware rewiring to (i) oversquashing alleviation, (ii) improved spectral connectivity, (iii) reduced effective resistance, and (iv) improved covariance calibration bounds

</details>


### [552] [Equilibrium Selection in Multi-Agent Policy Gradients via Opponent-Aware Basin Entry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18078)
*Yevhen Shcherbinin,Arina Redina,Maxim Kalpin,Vlad Kochetov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究多智能体策略梯度方法中的均衡选择问题，提出通过同伴学习修正来提高进入目标稳定均衡集吸引域的概率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体策略梯度方法虽然能局部收敛到稳定纳什均衡，但无法控制具体收敛到哪个均衡。论文旨在解决如何引导算法进入特定目标均衡集（如合作性均衡）的问题。

Method: 分析有限展开Meta-MAPG方法，将其更新分解为普通策略梯度加自身学习和同伴学习修正。识别同伴学习修正是主要均衡选择机制，在满足局部对齐条件下，提出先使用同伴修正进入目标吸引域，然后退火恢复普通策略梯度动态。

Result: 理论分析表明同伴学习修正能提高进入目标稳定纳什均衡集吸引域的概率。实验在Stag Hunt、重复囚徒困境和初步神经策略协调环境中验证了这一观点，显示同伴感知更新能增加进入合作性吸引域的概率。

Conclusion: 同伴学习修正是多智能体强化学习中有效的均衡选择机制，通过先引导进入目标吸引域再退火恢复普通梯度动态，既能实现均衡选择又能保持局部收敛保证。

Abstract: Multi-agent policy-gradient methods have been shown to converge locally near stable Nash equilibria. Local convergence, however, does not determine which equilibrium is reached. We study this question through basin-entry probability with respect to a target set of equilibria selected by an external criterion, such as payoff dominance. For finite-unroll Meta-MAPG, we show that the update decomposes into ordinary policy gradient plus own-learning and peer-learning corrections, with controlled sampling noise and finite-unroll bias. We identify the peer-learning correction as the main equilibrium-selection mechanism: under a local alignment condition, the probability of entering the certified attraction region of the target stable-Nash set increases, relative to ordinary policy gradient. Because persistent correction may shift zero-update points of the original game, annealing the correction after entering the basin recovers ordinary policy-gradient dynamics and inherits local stable-Nash convergence guarantees. Experiments in Stag Hunt, iterated Prisoner's Dilemma, and preliminary neural-policy coordination environments support this basin-entry view, showing increased entry into cooperative basins under peer-aware updates.

</details>


### [553] [The Expressive Power of Low Precision Softmax Transformers with (Summarized) Chain-of-Thought](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18079)
*Moritz Brösamle,Stephan Eckstein*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文分析了标准Transformer解码器在软注意力机制和有限精度下的表达能力，证明其能够模拟图灵机，且模型大小随空间边界对数增长而非时间边界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Transformer表达能力研究通常依赖硬注意力、高精度等非实际架构，本文旨在弥合理论与实践的差距，分析实际使用的标准Transformer解码器（软注意力、激活值和注意力权重舍入）的表达能力。

Method: 通过构建具有三元激活和良好分离注意力分数的硬注意力Transformer来模拟图灵机，然后将其转换为具有实际参数规模和激活精度的软注意力Transformer。同时分析总结了CoT范式的高效模拟能力。

Result: 证明标准Transformer解码器在软注意力、有限精度下能够模拟图灵机，模型深度和宽度随上下文长度对数增长。总结了CoT范式能更高效模拟图灵机，模型大小随空间边界对数增长。在数独推理任务上的实验验证了与可学习性的更好对齐。

Conclusion: 本文为实际使用的Transformer架构提供了更贴近实践的表达能力分析，证明了其在有限精度下仍具有强大的计算表达能力，为理解Transformer的实际能力提供了理论依据。

Abstract: Existing expressivity results for transformers typically rely on hardmax attention, high precision, and other architectural modifications that disconnect them from the models used in practice. We bridge this gap by analyzing standard transformer decoders with softmax attention and rounding of activations and attention weights, while allowing depth and width to grow logarithmically with the context length. As an intermediate step, we construct hardmax transformers with ternary activations and well-separated attention scores that simulate Turing machines using Chain-of-Thought (CoT). This lets us convert the constructions to equivalent softmax transformers without the unrealistic parameter magnitudes or activation precision that prior approaches would require. Using the same technique, we analyze a recently proposed summarized CoT paradigm and show that it simulates Turing machines more efficiently, with model size scaling logarithmically in a space bound rather than a time bound. We empirically test predictions made by our results on a Sudoku reasoning task and find better alignment with learnability than for prior high-precision results. Our code is available at https://github.com/moritzbroe/transformer-expressivity.

</details>


### [554] [pyforce-1.0.0: Python Framework for data-driven model Order Reduction of multi-physiCs problEms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18082)
*Stefano Riva,Yantao Luo,Carolina Introini,Antonio Cammi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: pyforce是一个Python包，实现了数据驱动的降阶建模技术，主要用于核工程领域的多物理场问题，是ROSE项目的一部分。新版本1.0.0改用pyvista作为后端，支持VTK格式，提高了易用性和兼容性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发pyforce的动机是为核反应堆应用中的多物理场模型提供降阶建模技术，以降低模型复杂性、优化传感器位置，并通过集成实际测量数据来改善对物理系统的理解。

Method: pyforce实现了基于数据驱动的降阶建模算法。新版本1.0.0完全重新编写，使用pyvista作为后端进行网格导入、积分计算和结果可视化，函数存储为numpy数组，提高了易用性。该包支持任何能够导出VTK格式结果的软件求解器。

Result: pyforce 1.0.0版本成功实现了从dolfinx到pyvista后端的迁移，提高了包的可访问性和兼容性。现在可以与任何支持VTK格式输出的求解器配合使用，同时保持了降阶建模、传感器优化和测量数据集成等功能。

Conclusion: pyforce作为一个用于核工程多物理场问题的数据驱动降阶建模工具包，通过版本1.0.0的重大重构，显著提高了易用性和兼容性，使其能够更广泛地应用于各种支持VTK格式的求解器环境。

Abstract: pyforce is a Python package implementing Data-Driven Reduced Order Modelling techniques for applications to multi-physics problems, mainly set in the Nuclear Engineering world. The package is part of the ROSE (Reduced Order modelling with data-driven techniques for multi-phySics problEms): mathematical algorithms aimed at reducing the complexity of multi-physics models (for nuclear reactors applications), at searching for optimal sensor positions and at integrating real measures to improve the knowledge on the physical systems. With respect to the previous original implementation based on dolfinx package (v0.6.0), version 1.0.0 of pyforce has been completely re-written using pyvista as backend for mesh importing, computing integrals, and visualisation of results; in addition, functions are stored as numpy arrays, improving the ease of use of the package. This choice allows to use pyforce with any software solver able to export results in VTK format.

</details>


### [555] [Foundation Models for Credit Risk Prediction: A Game Changer?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18147)
*Bart Baesens,Andreas Goethals,Stefan Lessmann,Simon De Vos,Cristián Bravo,David Martens,Victor Medina-Olivares,Christophe Mues,Maria Oskarsdóttir,Seppe vanden Broucke,Tim Verdonck,Wouter Verbeke*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文对表格基础模型在信用风险预测中的表现进行了基准测试，发现这些模型在PD和LGD建模任务中表现最佳，尤其在小数据集场景下优势明显。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 信用风险预测模型对金融决策至关重要，但传统方法面临小数据集、类别不平衡等挑战。随着AI技术发展，特别是大语言模型的突破，表格数据基础模型刚刚兴起，作者认为这些模型可能特别适用于SME贷款等小数据场景。

Method: 对近期提出的表格基础模型进行了广泛的基准测试，与包括传统和先进机器学习技术在内的多种方法进行比较。测试涵盖PD（违约概率）和LGD（违约损失率）两个核心任务，使用多种数据集、性能指标和实验条件。

Result: 表格基础模型在所有数据集和任务中表现最佳，特别是在数据集规模减小时，预测性能提升显著。这些模型是"开箱即用"测试的，无需超参数调优，确保了易用性和计算成本控制。

Conclusion: 表格基础模型在信用风险预测中表现出色，尤其在小数据场景下优势明显，为解决低违约组合和类别不平衡等长期挑战提供了有前景的新方法。

Abstract: Predictive models play a pivotal role in credit risk management, guiding critical decisions through accurate estimation of default probabilities and losses. Extensive research has introduced new modeling techniques, complemented by large-scale benchmarking studies consolidating the state-of-the-art. Today, quasi-standards such as gradient-boosting models paired with SHAP explainers have emerged, yet continuous improvement of risk models remains a top priority. Concurrently, rapid advancements in AI, most notably large language models, have disrupted predictive modeling paradigms. Foundation models, pretrained on extensive datasets from diverse domains, have demonstrated remarkable performance by leveraging prior knowledge. While prevalent in natural language processing and computer vision, foundation models for tabular data have only recently emerged. We conjecture that pretraining on out-of-domain data is particularly beneficial in small-data settings, such as SME lending or specialized corporate portfolios, and may help address longstanding challenges including low default portfolios and class imbalance. This paper benchmarks recently proposed tabular foundation models against a broad set of competitors, including established and advanced machine learning techniques, across two core tasks: PD and LGD modeling. Our evaluation encompasses various datasets, performance indicators, and experimental conditions. We find that tabular foundation models generally perform best across datasets and tasks. Moreover, they offer significant improvement in predictive performance as dataset size shrinks. These results are remarkable given that the models are tested out-of-the-box, without hyperparameter tuning, ensuring ease of use and mitigating computational costs.

</details>


### [556] [Elastic-dLLM: Position Preserving Context Compression and Augmentation of Diffusion LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18165)
*Junyi Wu,Tianchen Zhao,Shaoqiu Zhang,Linfeng Zhang,Guohao Dai,Yu Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种针对去噪语言模型(dLLMs)的优化方法，通过分析[MASK]标记的计算冗余，设计位置保持压缩和终端感知增强技术，以加速解码并提升生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: dLLMs通过并行解码[MASK]标记块来生成文本，但这种方法存在计算冗余：大量计算花费在重复处理上下文和具有相同特征表示的多个[MASK]标记上。作者观察到这种冗余，并希望优化dLLMs的解码效率。

Method: 1. 系统分析[MASK]标记的冗余性及其在提供结构信息方面的关键作用；2. 提出位置保持的[MASK]标记压缩技术，减少冗余计算；3. 提出终端感知增强，为块dLLMs在上下文中添加受保护的终端[MASK]标记以提升生成质量。

Result: 该方法能够加速dLLMs的解码过程，并为全序列dLLMs（如LLaDA-8B-Instruct和LLaDA-1.5）在有限输入长度约束下提供类似上下文折叠的长上下文扩展。对于块dLLMs（如LLaDA2.0-mini），能以可忽略的开销增强上下文，提升生成质量。

Conclusion: 通过重新审视dLLMs中[MASK]标记的冗余问题，论文提出的压缩和增强技术有效优化了计算效率，为dLLMs的实际应用提供了实用的加速和扩展方案。

Abstract: Unlike autoregressive models, which generate one token at a time, dLLMs denoise a chunk of [MASK] tokens jointly and sample one or more tokens per step; despite enabling parallel decoding, this process incurs substantial computational cost due to the large chunk size of masked tokens. We observe that much of this cost is spent on repeatedly processing the preceding context and many [MASK] tokens with the same feature representations, indicating considerable computational redundancy. In this work, we revisit dLLM's redundancy from the perspective of [MASK] tokens. Through systematic analysis, we verify the redundancy of [MASK] tokens while revealing their critical role in providing structural information. Guided by these findings, we propose position-preserving [MASK] token compression and terminal-aware augmentation. By compressing redundant [MASK] computation, this approach accelerates decoding and further provides a natural extension toward context-folding-like long-context scaling under limited input-length constraints for full-sequence dLLMs such as LLaDA-8B-Instruct and LLaDA-1.5. Moreover, for block dLLMs such as LLaDA2.0-mini, it augments the context with a protected terminal [MASK] token to enhance generation quality with negligible overhead.

</details>


### [557] [Ringmaster LMO: Asynchronous Linear Minimization Oracle Momentum Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18174)
*Abdurakhmon Sadiev,Artavazd Maranjyan,Ivan Ilin,Peter Richtárik*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Ringmaster LMO：一种用于无约束随机非凸优化的异步LMO动量方法，通过延迟阈值机制处理异构分布式系统中的工作节点速度差异问题，在保持收敛性的同时实现最优时间复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Muon等基于线性最小化预言机（LMO）的方法通常采用同步训练方式，这在异构分布式系统中存在问题，因为工作节点计算梯度速度不同，同步训练必须等待最慢的节点。需要一种异步LMO方法来提高训练效率。

Method: 提出Ringmaster LMO方法，基于Ringmaster ASGD的延迟阈值思想，将过时梯度丢弃机制扩展到一般LMO更新。开发了具有递减步长和自适应延迟阈值的参数无关变体，并在广义(L0, L1)-光滑性下建立收敛保证。

Result: 在异构工作节点计算时间下，将迭代保证转化为时间复杂度界限。在经典欧几里得光滑设置中，这些界限恢复了Ringmaster ASGD的最优时间复杂度。在随机二次问题和NanoChat语言模型预训练上的实验表明，该方法优于强同步和异步基线方法。

Conclusion: Ringmaster LMO是一种有效的异步LMO动量方法，能够处理分布式训练中的异构性问题，在保持收敛性的同时提供更好的训练效率，特别是在系统异构性增加时优势更加明显。

Abstract: Muon has recently emerged as a strong alternative to AdamW for training neural networks, with encouraging large-scale pretraining results and growing evidence that matrix-structured updates can be faster in practice. Yet Muon, and more generally Linear Minimization Oracle (LMO) based methods, are typically used synchronously. This is problematic in heterogeneous distributed systems, where workers complete gradient computations at different speeds and synchronous training must repeatedly wait for slower workers. In this work, we introduce Ringmaster LMO, an asynchronous LMO-based momentum method for unconstrained stochastic nonconvex optimization. Our method builds on the delay-thresholding idea of Ringmaster ASGD. For SGD-type methods, Ringmaster ASGD achieves optimal time complexity by discarding overly stale gradients. Ringmaster LMO extends this mechanism to general LMO-based updates. We establish convergence guarantees under generalized $(L_0, L_1)$-smoothness and further develop a parameter-agnostic variant with decreasing stepsizes and adaptive delay thresholds. Finally, we translate our iteration guarantees into time complexity bounds under heterogeneous worker computation times. In the classical Euclidean smooth setting, these bounds recover the optimal time complexity of Ringmaster ASGD. Experiments on stochastic quadratic problems and NanoChat language-model pretraining show that the advantages of Ringmaster LMO grow with system heterogeneity and that the method outperforms strong synchronous and asynchronous baselines.

</details>


### [558] [UTOPYA: A Multimodal Deep Learning Framework for Physics-Informed Anomaly Detection and Time-Series Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18188)
*Robson W. S. Pessoa,Julien Amblard,Alessandra Russo,Idelfonso B. R. Nogueira*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: UTOPYA是一个15.2M参数的多模态框架，用于批处理蒸馏中的异常检测、时间序列预测和阶段分类，通过FiLM条件跨模态注意力和门控融合整合八种数据模态，在物理约束正则化和课程学习下，在119个实验数据集上显著优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 批处理中的异常检测面临瞬态动态、故障标签稀缺和单模态传感器数据的限制，需要开发能够整合多模态信息并考虑物理约束的方法。

Method: UTOPYA采用FiLM条件跨模态注意力和门控融合整合八种数据模态，引入物理约束正则化（时间平滑性和热力学单调性），并采用课程学习按物理难度递增顺序训练。

Result: 在119个实验的多模态批处理蒸馏数据集上，UTOPYA窗口级测试AUROC达到0.832，实验级多信号评分AUROC达到0.874，显著优于四种基线方法。多模态消融实验显示FiLM条件静态上下文是关键因素，将实验级AUROC从0.729提升到0.874。

Conclusion: UTOPYA通过多模态融合和物理约束正则化有效解决了批处理异常检测的挑战，但研究发现一些广泛采用的平滑正则化技术与异常检测存在根本性冲突，为多模态过程监测部署提供了实践指导。

Abstract: Anomaly detection in batch processes is hindered by transient dynamics, scarce fault labels, and reliance on single-modality sensor data. This work introduces UTOPYA (Unified Temporal Observation for Physics-Informed Anomaly Detection and Time-Series Prediction), a 15.2M-parameter multimodal framework that jointly addresses anomaly detection, time-series prediction, and phase classification in batch distillation by fusing eight data modalities through Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM) conditioned cross-modal attention and gated fusion. A physics-informed regularisation scheme introduced in this work enforces temporal smoothness and thermodynamic monotonicity, while curriculum learning introduces training samples in order of physical difficulty. On the 119-experiment multimodal batch distillation dataset of Arweiler et al. (2026), UTOPYA achieves a window-level test AUROC of 0.832 and 0.874 under multi-signal experiment-level scoring, substantially outperforming four external baselines (PCA, autoencoder, Isolation Forest, and LSTM autoencoder) evaluated under identical conditions (+0.147 window-level AUROC over the best baseline). A multimodal ablation over 15~architectural configurations shows that static context via FiLM conditioning is the key enabler, lifting experiment-level multi-signal AUROC by +0.145 over the unimodal baseline (0.729 to 0.874). Separately, a training ablation across 14 design choices reveals that several widely-adopted techniques, including instance normalisation, Mixup, ensembling, test-time augmentation, and stochastic weight averaging, fail to improve or actively degrade generalisation in this data-scarce setting. These negative results expose a fundamental tension between smoothing-based regularisation and anomaly detection, providing practical guidance for multimodal process monitoring deployment.

</details>


### [559] [Dual-Rate Diffusion: Accelerating diffusion models with an interleaved heavy-light network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18190)
*Grigory Bartosh,David Ruhe,Emiel Hoogeboom,Jonathan Heek,Thomas Mensink,Tim Salimans*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Dual-Rate Diffusion 通过交替使用重型上下文编码器和轻量去噪模型来加速扩散模型采样，在保持生成质量的同时将计算成本降低2-4倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型虽然生成性能优异，但在推理阶段需要反复评估大型神经网络，导致计算成本高昂。作者希望在不牺牲生成质量的前提下加速采样过程。

Method: 提出双速率扩散方法，交替执行重型高容量上下文编码器和轻量高效去噪模型。上下文编码器稀疏评估以提取高维特征，这些特征被轻量去噪模型在每一步中有效重用以高效细化样本。

Result: 在ImageNet基准测试中，Dual-Rate Diffusion 在保持标准基线性能的同时，将计算成本降低了2-4倍。该方法还兼容蒸馏技术（如矩匹配蒸馏），能够在少步生成中实现进一步的效率提升。

Conclusion: Dual-Rate Diffusion 通过智能地分配计算资源，在重型上下文编码器和轻量去噪模型之间实现高效协同工作，为扩散模型提供了一种有效的加速方法，同时保持生成质量。

Abstract: Diffusion models achieve state-of-the-art generative performance but suffer from high computational costs during inference due to the repeated evaluation of a heavy neural network. In this work, we propose Dual-Rate Diffusion, a method to accelerate sampling by interleaving the execution of a heavy high-capacity context encoder and a light efficient denoising model. The context encoder is evaluated sparsely to extract high-dimensional features, which are effectively reused by the light denoising model at every step to refine the sample efficiently. This approach significantly accelerates inference without compromising sample quality. On ImageNet benchmarks, Dual-Rate Diffusion matches the performance of standard baselines while reducing computational cost by a factor of $2$-$4$. Furthermore, we demonstrate that our method is compatible with distillation techniques, such as Moment Matching Distillation, enabling further efficiency gains in few-step generation.

</details>


### [560] [Concise and Logically Consistent Conformal Sets for Neuro-Symbolic Concept-Based Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18202)
*Samuele Bortolotti,Emanuele Marconato,Andrea Pugnana,Andrea Passerini,Stefano Teso*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: COCOCO是一个基于Conformal Prediction的框架，用于增强神经符号概念模型（NeSy-CBMs）的可靠性，通过联合校准概念和标签预测，提供分布无关的覆盖保证，同时满足一致性、覆盖性和简洁性三个要求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经符号概念模型在关键应用中虽然结合了神经网络和符号推理，但其预测可能过于自信，使利益相关者难以判断何时可以信任模型的决策。需要一种方法来提供可靠的置信度估计。

Method: 提出了COCOCO框架：1）将Conformal Prediction（CP）与NeSy-CBMs结合；2）联合校准概念和标签预测；3）通过单一演绎-溯因修正步骤协调概念和标签；4）支持用户指定的规模预算。

Result: 在8个数据集上的实验表明，COCOCO相比现有方法和自然基线，在性能和集合大小方面表现更优，满足所有三个要求（一致性、覆盖性、简洁性），并保持分布无关的覆盖保证。

Conclusion: COCOCO成功解决了NeSy-CBMs中的过度自信问题，提供了一个可靠的后处理框架，增强了模型在关键应用中的可信度，同时保持了对不完善知识的鲁棒性。

Abstract: Neuro-Symbolic Concept-based Models (NeSy-CBMs) are a family of architectures that integrate neural networks with symbolic reasoning for enhanced reliability in high-stakes applications. They work by first extracting high-level concepts from the input and then inferring a task label from these compatibly with given logical constraints. Yet, their label and concept predictions can be overconfident, making it difficult for stakeholders to gauge when the model's decisions can be trusted. We address this issue by integrating ideas from Conformal Prediction (CP), a framework providing rigorous, distribution-free coverage guarantees. We formalize three desiderata -- consistency, coverage, and conciseness -- that any conformal method for NeSy-CBMs should satisfy, and show that existing approaches fall short of at least one. We then introduce COCOCO, a post-hoc framework that conformalizes concepts and labels jointly and reconciles them via a single deduction-abduction revision step. COCOCO satisfies all three desiderata, retains distribution-free coverage, is robust to imperfect knowledge and supports user-specified size budgets. Our experiments on 8 data sets highlight how COCOCO compares favorably against competitors and natural baselines in terms of performance and set size.

</details>


### [561] [A Simplex Witness Certificate for Constant Collapse in Variational Autoencoders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18224)
*Zegu Zhang,Jianhua Peng,Jian Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究将VAE中的精确常数坍塌（编码器均值与输入无关）转化为可设计、可监控、可认证的问题，通过固定单纯形见证头实现教师-学生对齐损失，提供可计算基线来检测和防止这种失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 变分自编码器（VAE）训练中常出现编码器均值与输入无关的精确常数坍塌失败模式。当前这种问题只能在训练后被发现，缺乏设计阶段的预防和训练中的监控机制。研究旨在将这种训练病理转化为可设计、可监控、可认证的问题。

Method: 保持先验为标准高斯分布，给定固定教师后验，在潜在均值上附加固定单纯形见证头。构建教师-学生对齐损失，其精确常数预测器基线等于教师信息。通过单纯形见证的闭式逆，将任何全支持教师后验表示为潜在空间中的中心化对数几率嵌入，得到显式潜在能量成本。使用可计算视图间隙处理教师目标来自不同视图的情况。

Result: 对齐损失低于基线时，潜在均值不可能发生输入无关的常数坍塌。单纯形见证具有闭式逆，能够显式表示教师后验的潜在能量成本，解释何时能使对齐损失变小。将精确常数坍塌从训练后发现的病理转化为设计阶段可预防、训练中可监控、训练后可认证的问题。

Conclusion: 通过固定单纯形见证头和教师-学生对齐损失框架，成功将VAE中的精确常数坍塌失败模式转化为可设计、可监控、可认证的问题，为VAE训练提供了理论保证和实用工具来防止这种常见病理。

Abstract: This note studies exact constant collapse in variational autoencoders, where the encoder mean becomes independent of the input. The goal is to make this specific failure mode pre-designable, monitorable during training, and certifiable after training. The prior is kept as the standard Gaussian. Given a fixed teacher posterior, we attach to the latent mean a fixed simplex witness head. The resulting teacher-student alignment loss has an exact constant-predictor baseline equal to the teacher information. If the alignment loss is below this baseline, the latent mean cannot be input-independent constant collapsed.
  The simplex witness also has a closed-form inverse. Any full-support teacher posterior can be represented by embedding its centered log-odds into the latent space. This gives an explicit latent energy cost and explains when the alignment loss can be made small. A computable view gap handles the case where teacher targets are computed from a different view. Thus exact constant collapse is converted from an after-the-fact training pathology into a design-and-certificate problem.

</details>


### [562] [Are Sparse Autoencoder Benchmarks Reliable?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18229)
*David Chanin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SAEBench中的稀疏自编码器（SAE）评估指标存在严重问题：TPP和SCR在多个测试中失败，不应使用；其他指标也存在较高噪声和较低区分度；sae-probes是最可靠的指标但仍需改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏自编码器（SAEs）是大型语言模型可解释性的核心工具，其架构进展依赖于能够可靠区分SAE性能的基准测试。本研究旨在审计SAEBench（事实上的标准SAE评估套件）中的质量指标。

Method: 通过三个互补视角审计SAE质量指标：1）固定SAE上的重播噪声分析；2）合成SAE上的真实相关性分析；3）训练轨迹的区分度分析。

Result: 1）TPP和SCR在多个测试中失败，不应用于SAE评估；2）其他指标显示出比预期更高的重播噪声和更低的区分度；3）sae-probes（k-稀疏探测的变体）是最可靠的指标，但仍难以区分同一SAE架构的变体。

Conclusion: 当前SAE评估基准存在严重缺陷，领域需要更好的SAE基准测试。sae-probes是目前最可靠的指标，但整个评估体系仍需改进。

Abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) are a core interpretability tool for large language models, and progress on SAE architectures depends on benchmarks that reliably distinguish better SAEs from worse ones. We audit the SAE quality metrics in SAEBench, the de-facto standard SAE evaluation suite, through three complementary lenses: reseed noise on a fixed SAE, ground-truth correlation on synthetic SAEs, and discriminability across training trajectories. We find that two of these metrics, Targeted Probe Perturbation (TPP) and Spurious Correlation Removal (SCR), fail multiple lenses at their canonical settings and should not be used to evaluate SAEs. The other metrics show higher reseed noise and lower discriminability than the field assumes. The sae-probes variant of $k$-sparse probing is the most reliable metric we tested, but even sae-probes struggles to separate variants of the same SAE architecture. Our results show the field needs better SAE benchmarks.

</details>


### [563] [Attacking the First-Principle: A Black-Box, Query-Free Targeted Mimicry Attack on Binary Function Classifiers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18231)
*Gabriel Sauger,Jean-Yves Marion,Sazzadur Rahaman,Victor Matrat,Vincent Tourneur,Muaz Ali*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Kelpie是一个针对二进制函数分类器的黑盒零查询模拟攻击框架，能够通过保持恶意功能不变的代码变换来逃避检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习为基础的二进制函数分类器在软件安全中至关重要，但它们容易受到对抗攻击的威胁。现有攻击方法通常需要查询目标分类器，而Kelpie旨在开发更强大的黑盒零查询模拟攻击。

Method: Kelpie利用代码变换技术，这些变换保持恶意负载的功能不变，但能使其被误分类为指定类别。该方法不依赖查询目标分类器来优化攻击，而是在黑盒零查询设置下工作。

Result: Kelpie成功对六种代表不同模型架构的最先进二进制函数分类器执行了模拟攻击，无需直接与它们交互。通过将键盘记录器和擦除器隐藏在看似良性的函数中的实际演示验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 这是首个在黑盒零查询环境下展示模拟攻击的工作，对现有基于机器学习的二进制函数分类器的可靠性和安全性提出了重要质疑。

Abstract: Binary function classifiers play a crucial role in maintaining the security and integrity of software systems by detecting malicious code and unauthorized modifications. However, machine learning-based classifiers are vulnerable to adversarial attacks that can evade detection. In this study, we present Kelpie, a novel framework for executing mimicry attacks, a stronger type of targeted evasion attacks, on binary function classifiers in a black-box, zero-query setting. Unlike previous approaches that rely on querying the target classifier to refine untargeted evasion attacks, Kelpie leverages code transformations that preserve the functionality of malicious payloads while causing them to be misclassified as we want. Through extensive experimentation, we demonstrate that Kelpie can successfully execute mimicry attacks against six state-of-the-art binary function classifiers representing different model architectures without requiring direct interaction with them. We further validate our approach with a practical demonstration, involving a keylogger and a wiper concealed within benign-looking functions embedded in an application. This work, to our best knowledge, is the first to demonstrate such a mimicry attack in a black-box, zero-query context, raising important questions about the reliability and security of existing machine learning-based binary function classifiers.

</details>


### [564] [Privacy Preserving Reinforcement Learning with One-Sided Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18246)
*Lin William Cong,Guangyan Gan,Hanzhang Qin,Zhenzhen Yan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: POOL是一种针对多维连续状态和动作空间、具有单侧反馈的隐私保护强化学习算法，在保持高学习效率的同时提供强隐私保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在多维连续状态和动作空间的强化学习中，单侧反馈设置（智能体只能获得部分状态观察，且每次只能获得状态-动作空间子集的奖励信息）带来了学习效率和隐私保护的双重挑战。

Method: 提出POOL算法，这是一种新颖的隐私保护强化学习算法，专门针对具有单侧反馈的多维连续环境设计。

Result: 对POOL进行了全面的理论分析，推导出与已知非隐私RL下界匹配的样本复杂度界限（与隐私参数E_rho、时间范围H和最优性差距参数α相关）。

Conclusion: 研究表明可以在保持高学习效率的同时实施强隐私保证，这标志着在具有单侧反馈的多维环境中实现实用、隐私感知的RL迈出了重要一步。

Abstract: We study reinforcement learning (RL) in multi-dimensional continuous state and action spaces with one-sided feedback, where the agent receives partial observations of the state and obtains reward information for only a subset of the state-action space at each time step. This setting introduces substantial challenges in both learning efficiency and privacy preservation. To address these challenges, we propose POOL, a novel privacy-preserving RL algorithm. We conduct a comprehensive theoretical analysis of POOL, deriving a sample complexity bound that matches the known lower bounds for non-private RL. Here, E_rho denotes the privacy parameter, H is the time horizon, and alpha is the optimality-gap parameter. Our findings show that it is possible to enforce strong privacy guarantees while maintaining high learning efficiency, marking a significant step toward practical, privacy-aware RL in multi-dimensional environments with one-sided feedback.

</details>


### [565] [Temporal Task Diversity: Inductive Biases Under Non-Stationarity in Synthetic Sequence Modelling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18281)
*Afiq Abdillah Effiezal Aswadi,Oliver Britton,Ross Baker,Matthew Farrugia-Roberts*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了训练过程中数据分布随时间变化（非平稳性）对深度学习归纳偏好的影响，发现在上下文线性回归序列建模中，任务分布在时间上的多样性会增强模型对泛化而非记忆的偏好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前深度学习研究通常假设神经网络从固定数据分布中学习，但许多实际重要学习问题的数据分布在训练过程中会发生变化。研究者希望了解这种非平稳性如何影响深度学习对具有不同结构、泛化和安全特性的模型的归纳偏好。

Method: 采用上下文线性回归序列建模作为测试平台，通过小规模transformer模型，研究任务分布在训练时间上的多样性（时间多样性）对模型归纳偏好的影响。

Result: 研究发现，训练过程中任务分布在时间上的多样性会导致模型对泛化的偏好增强，相对于记忆的偏好减弱。这与固定任务分布下观察到的不同泛化模式形成对比。

Conclusion: 训练数据分布的时间多样性是影响深度学习归纳偏好的重要因素，能够促进模型向泛化而非记忆的方向发展，这对理解深度学习在实际非平稳环境中的行为具有重要意义。

Abstract: Modern deep learning science often assumes that neural networks learn from a fixed data distribution. However, many practically important learning problems involve data distributions that change throughout training. How does such non-stationarity impact the inductive biases of deep learning towards models with different structural, generalisation, and safety properties? A fruitful testbed for studying inductive bias is in-context linear regression sequence modelling, where small transformers display strikingly different generalisation patterns depending on the diversity of the (fixed) training task distribution. In this paper, we explore the effect of diversifying the task distribution across training time, finding that such temporal diversity leads to an increased bias towards generalisation over memorisation.

</details>


### [566] [Alignment Dynamics in LLM Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18309)
*Yuhan Huang,Huanran Chen,Yinpeng Dong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个统一框架来解释大语言模型对齐的脆弱性，将对齐动态分解为回弹力和驱动力两个竞争成分，并预测了排练启动效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管大语言模型通过监督微调和人类反馈强化学习实现了强对齐，但这种对齐在后续微调中往往很脆弱。现有解释要么归因于梯度几何，要么描述为模型输出的分布偏移，缺乏将参数空间学习动态与函数空间对齐行为统一起来的理论框架。

Method: 引入可处理的对齐分数，推导其在微调过程中的闭式更新，建立统一的对齐动态框架。将对齐更新分解为回弹力（由当前对齐状态和模型分布窄度共同决定）和驱动力（由训练分布与对齐/非对齐完成的后验分布对齐程度决定）。

Result: 在安全对齐、突发错位和情感设置中验证了预测：1）先前对齐可被后续微调逆转；2）更窄的后验结构会加强这种逆转；3）排练启动效应——先前对齐留下潜在后验印记，在重新暴露时放大有效驱动力，导致更快的重新对齐。安全对齐的受控实验证实了回弹强度对后验窄度的依赖关系。

Conclusion: 该研究提供了一个统一的动态视角，解释了大语言模型微调过程中对齐如何被破坏和重新激活，将参数空间学习动态与函数空间对齐行为联系起来，为理解对齐脆弱性提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Although Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve strong alignment through supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning from human feedback, the alignment is often fragile under subsequent fine-tuning. Existing explanations either attribute alignment fragility to gradient geometry or characterize it as a distributional shift in model outputs, yet few provide a unified account that bridges parameter-space learning dynamics with function-space alignment behavior during fine-tuning. In this work, we introduce a tractable alignment score and derive its closed-form update during fine-tuning, yielding a unified framework for alignment dynamics. Our analysis decomposes alignment updates into two competing components: a \textbf{\color{red!60!black} Rebound Force}, governed jointly by the current alignment state and the narrowness of model distribution, and a \textbf{\color{green!60!black} Driving Force}, determined by how the training distribution aligns with outcome-conditioned posteriors over aligned and non-aligned completions. This decomposition explains why prior alignment can be reversed by later fine-tuning and why narrower posterior structure strengthens such reversal. Moreover, our framework predicts a \textbf{Rehearsal Priming Effect}: prior alignment leaves a latent posterior imprint that amplifies the effective Driving Force upon re-exposure, leading to faster re-alignment. We validate these predictions across safety alignment, emergent misalignment, and sentiment settings, demonstrating consistent alignment reversal and accelerated re-alignment under re-exposure. In addition, controlled experiments in safety alignment confirm the predicted dependence of rebound strength on posterior narrowness. Together, these results provide a unified dynamical perspective on how alignment is disrupted and reactivated during LLM fine-tuning.

</details>


### [567] [Dynamic Elliptical Graph Factor Models via Riemannian Optimization with Geodesic Temporal Regularization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18316)
*Chuansen Peng,Xiaojing Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出DEGFM算法，通过Grassmann流形上的动态估计，结合因子模型解决时变图结构推断问题，在保持时间连贯性和尊重Riemannian几何的同时实现高维小样本下的可靠估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从高维节点观测中推断时变图结构是神经科学、金融、气候学等领域的基础问题。面临两个内在挑战：保持潜在图在连续观测窗口中的时间连贯性，以及尊重对称正定流形（精度矩阵自然所在空间）的内在Riemannian几何结构。

Method: 提出DEGFM算法，将时变精度矩阵序列建模为由潜在椭圆图因子模型控制的低秩加对角结构。通过Grassmann流形上的Riemannian测地线惩罚来强制时间连贯性，确保估计的图轨迹相对于内在几何而非环境欧几里得空间是平滑的。开发高效的Riemannian梯度下降算法来解决Grassmann流形值序列的非凸优化问题。

Result: 在合成基准和真实世界数据集上的广泛实验表明，DEGFM在所有评估指标上始终优于最先进的基线方法，证实了所提出框架的实际有效性。

Conclusion: DEGFM通过联合处理时间连贯性和Riemannian几何结构，为高维小样本下的时变图结构推断提供了有效的解决方案，在多个应用领域具有实际价值。

Abstract: Inferring time-varying graph structures from high-dimensional nodal observations is a fundamental problem arising in neuroscience, finance, climatology, and beyond. Two intrinsic challenges govern this problem: maintaining the \emph{temporal coherence} of the latent graph across successive observation windows, and respecting the \emph{intrinsic Riemannian geometry} of the symmetric positive definite manifold on which precision matrices naturally reside, a curved space whose geodesic structure departs fundamentally from that of the ambient Euclidean space. In this paper we propose dynamic estimation on the Grassmann manifold with a factor model (\textsc{Degfm}), a novel algorithm that jointly addresses both challenges. We model the time-varying precision matrix sequence as a low-rank-plus-diagonal structure governed by a latent elliptical graph factor model, which drastically reduces the effective parameter count and enables reliable estimation in the challenging small-sample regime. Temporal coherence is enforced through a Riemannian geodesic penalty defined on the Grassmann manifold, ensuring that the estimated graph trajectory is smooth with respect to the intrinsic geometry rather than the ambient Euclidean space. To solve the resulting non-convex optimization problem over Grassmann-manifold-valued sequences subject to the LRaD constraint, we derive an efficient Riemannian gradient descent algorithm that respects the manifold structure at every iterate and rigorously establish its convergence to a stationary point. Extensive experiments on both synthetic benchmarks and real-world datasets demonstrate that \textsc{Degfm} consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across all evaluation metrics, confirming the practical effectiveness of the proposed framework.

</details>


### [568] [The Symmetries of Three-Layer ReLU Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18319)
*Johanna Marie Gegenfurtner,Moritz Grillo,Guido Montúfar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文为深度ReLU网络参数对称性分析建立了一个理论框架，重点研究了三层瓶颈架构，获得了参数纤维的完整描述和功能等价性判定算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究深度ReLU网络中的参数对称性，理解不同参数配置如何产生相同的函数输出，这对网络训练、优化和理论分析具有重要意义。

Method: 开发了一个分析深度ReLU网络参数对称性的理论框架，重点研究三层瓶颈架构，通过半代数描述参数纤维，并设计多项式时间算法判定功能等价性。

Result: 获得了三层瓶颈架构通用参数纤维的完整特征描述，提供了这些纤维的显式半代数描述，并提出了功能等价性判定的多项式时间算法。发现对称性包括离散和连续变换，取决于深层是否隐藏或保留先前层的几何结构。

Conclusion: 深度ReLU网络存在丰富的参数对称性，包括离散和连续变换，其中一些对称性诱导梯度流中的局部守恒定律。这些对称性的理解对网络训练和理论分析有重要价值。

Abstract: We develop a framework for analyzing parameter symmetries in deep ReLU networks and obtain a complete characterization of the generic parameter fibers for three-layer bottleneck architectures. Our approach provides explicit semi-algebraic descriptions of these fibers and yields a polynomial time algorithm for deciding functional equivalence of two parameters. The symmetries include discrete and continuous transformations arising from layer composition, and depend on whether deeper layers hide or preserve geometric structure from preceding layers. Finally, we show that some of these symmetries induce local conservation laws along gradient flow, while others do not.

</details>


### [569] [ISEP: Implicit Support Expansion for Offline Reinforcement Learning via Stochastic Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18320)
*Yifei Chen,Shaoqin Zhu,Xiaoqiang Ji*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ISEP通过随机策略优化实现隐式支持扩展，利用在分布内数据和策略样本之间插值的价值函数来隐式扩展可行动作支持，通过随机动作选择策略避免模式坍塌


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线强化学习方法通常施加严格约束以确保安全性，但这种刚性往往阻碍了在行为策略直接支持之外发现最优行为。为了解决这个问题，需要一种能够隐式扩展动作支持的方法。

Method: ISEP通过利用在分布内数据和策略样本之间插值的价值函数来隐式扩展可行动作支持，这种机制"稠密化"高奖励区域，为策略改进创建可导航路径。为了避免模式坍塌和无效动作，ISEP采用随机动作选择策略，在保守克隆和乐观扩展信号之间随机交替优化策略。ISEP-FM使用带分类器自由引导的条件流匹配来有效捕捉插值价值信号。

Result: 该方法理论上保证有界的价值误差，并能够有效避免在优化扩展支持时产生的多模态景观导致的模式坍塌问题。

Conclusion: ISEP通过隐式支持扩展和随机策略优化，提供了一种在保持安全性的同时扩展离线强化学习动作支持的有效框架，能够发现行为策略支持之外的最优行为。

Abstract: Offline reinforcement learning methods typically enforce strict constraints to ensure safety; yet this rigidity often prevents the discovery of optimal behaviors outside the immediate support of the behavior policy. To address this, we propose Implicit Support Expansion via stochastic Policy optimization (ISEP), which leverages a value function interpolated between in-distribution data and policy samples to implicitly expand the feasible action support. This mechanism "densifies" high-reward regions, creating a navigable path for policy improvement while theoretically guaranteeing bounded value error. However, optimizing against this expanded support creates a multimodal landscape where standard deterministic averaging leads to mode collapse and invalid actions. ISEP mitigates this via a stochastic action selection strategy, optimizing the policy by stochastically alternating between conservative cloning and optimistic expansion signals. We instantiate this framework as ISEP-FM using Conditional Flow Matching utilizing classifier-free guidance to effectively capture the interpolated value signal.

</details>


### [570] [Prune, Update and Trim: Robust Structured Pruning for Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18331)
*Diego Coello de Portugal Mecke,Tom Hanika,Lars Schmidth-Thieme*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Putri是一种新的后训练剪枝方法，通过更新未剪枝权重、顺序剪枝FFN层和移除单个注意力头而非整个注意力层，在极端稀疏率下仍能保持LLM性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM推理成本高昂，特别是在长上下文推理或资源受限设备上。现有后训练剪枝方法通过移除模型参数来降低需求，但需要改进以在极端稀疏率下保持性能。

Method: 提出Putri方法：1)更新未剪枝的FFN权重以补偿剪枝误差；2)顺序剪枝FFN层，考虑先前层的更新；3)移除单个注意力头而非整个注意力层，并扩展支持分组查询注意力。这是一种结构化剪枝方法。

Result: 在多个模型、不同稀疏率和数据集上的剪枝实验验证了Putri的通用性。特别地，与先前方法不同，Putri能够在极端稀疏率下剪枝LLMs，并保持SOTA性能。

Conclusion: Putri是一种简单而有效的后训练剪枝方法，通过三项关键改进，在极端稀疏率下仍能保持LLM性能，为资源受限环境下的LLM部署提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have experienced significant growth and development in recent years. However, performing inference on LLMs remains costly, especially for long-context inference or in resource-constrained devices. This motivates the development of new post-training pruning (PTP) methods. These methods reduce LLMs' requirements by removing a substantial part of the model's parameters. The discarded weights are selected depending on their impact on the models performance. Current PTP methods prune the models by removing the less informative hidden nodes from the FFN layers, and the least important attention layers. We propose Putri, a PTP method that introduces three changes to the State- of-the-art. First, we update the un-pruned weights of the FFN to compensate for the introduced pruning error. Second, the FFN layers are pruned sequentially, taking into account the updates done to the previous layers. Third, instead of removing full attention layers, we remove individual attention-heads. We extend this method such that it can also address Grouped-Query Attention. In summary, Putri is a structure pruning method which remains simple while showing SOTA performance. Pruning experiments on multiple models with a wide variety of sparsity ranges and on different datasets, validate the generality of Putri. Notably, we demonstrate that, unlike previous methods, Putri can prune LLMs on extreme sparsity ratios. The code is available at: https://github.com/Coello-dev/Putri.

</details>


### [571] [Decoupled Conformal Optimisation: Efficient Prediction Sets via Independent Tuning and Calibration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18354)
*Fanyi Wu,Lihua Niu,Samuel Kaski,Michele Caprio*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DCO（解耦保形优化）提出了一种训练-调优-校准的三阶段设计原则，通过独立的数据分割分别优化预测集的效率和校准保形分位数，在保证有限样本边际覆盖率的同时减少预测集大小。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统贝叶斯保形优化方法通常使用相同的数据既搜索高效预测集又验证覆盖率，这种耦合设计对于高概率风险控制是自然的，但对于标准有限样本边际保形覆盖率目标来说并非必要。

Method: 提出解耦保形优化（DCO）方法，采用训练-调优-校准三阶段：1）训练阶段学习基础模型；2）调优阶段使用独立调优集进行效率导向的结构选择；3）校准阶段使用全新校准集确定最终保形分位数。

Result: 在ImageNet-A、CIFAR-100、Diabetes、California Housing和Concrete等分类和回归基准测试中，DCO能紧密跟踪目标覆盖率水平，同时显著减少平均预测集大小或区间宽度。例如在ImageNet-A上，平均集大小从26.52降至25.26，95%分位数集大小从58.95降至53.73。

Conclusion: DCO提供了与PAC风格方法不同的有限样本保证：边际保形覆盖率而非高概率风险控制。在耦合风险边界的一致性假设下，两种方法收敛到相同总体阈值，但DCO在保持覆盖率的同时实现了更高效的预测集。

Abstract: Bayesian conformal optimisation methods often use the same held-out data both to search for efficient prediction sets and to certify coverage or risk. This coupling is natural for high-probability risk-control guarantees, but it is not necessary when the target is standard finite-sample marginal conformal coverage. We propose Decoupled Conformal Optimisation (DCO), a train-tune-calibrate design principle that uses an independent tuning split for efficiency-oriented structural selection and a fresh calibration split for the final conformal quantile. Conditional on the tuned structure, standard split-conformal exchangeability yields finite-sample marginal coverage for any candidate class, without a confidence parameter or multiple-testing correction. DCO therefore targets a different finite-sample guarantee from PAC-style methods: marginal conformal coverage rather than high-probability risk control. Under consistency assumptions on the coupled risk bound, the two approaches nevertheless converge to the same population threshold. Across classification and regression benchmarks, including ImageNet-A, CIFAR-100, Diabetes, California Housing, and Concrete, DCO tracks the nominal coverage level closely while often reducing average prediction-set size or interval width relative to PAC-style calibration. On ImageNet-A, for example, the average set size decreases from $26.52$ to $25.26$ and the 95th-percentile set size from $58.95$ to $53.73$; on Diabetes, the average interval width decreases from $2.098$ to $1.914$.

</details>


### [572] [Proximal basin hopping: global optimization with guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18364)
*Guillaume Lauga,Cesare Molinari,Samuel Vaiter*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Proximal Basin Hopping理论框架，结合近端优化和局部最小化，构建实用算法以高概率收敛到全局最小化器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全局优化是挑战性问题，许多算法经验上成功但缺乏理论支持，需要新的理论框架来保证收敛性。

Method: 提出Proximal Basin Hopping理论框架，结合近端优化和局部最小化，构建实用算法，使用有限样本时以高概率收敛到全局最小化器。

Result: 在标准合成困难函数和深度学习缩放定律拟合等实际问题上，Proximal Basin Hopping优于有理论支持的知名算法，且维度越高性能优势越明显。

Conclusion: Proximal Basin Hopping提供了有效的全局优化理论框架和实用算法，在高维问题上表现尤其突出。

Abstract: Global optimization is a challenging problem, with plenty of algorithms displaying empirical success, but scarce theoretical backing. In this work, we propose a new theoretical framework called Proximal Basin Hopping (PBH), carefully tailored to combine proximal optimization and local minimization. We use it to construct a practical algorithm that converges to the global minimizer with high probability, when using a finite amount of samples. Proximal Basin Hopping outperforms well known algorithms with theoretical backing on standard synthetic hard functions, and real problems such as fitting scaling laws for deep learning. Furthermore, the higher the dimension, the better the performance gap.

</details>


### [573] [Beyond Inference-Time Search: Reinforcement Learning Synthesizes Reusable Solvers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18374)
*Soheyl Massoudi,Gabriel Apaza,Milad Habibi,Mark Fuge*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究提出用强化学习训练代码LLM，使其能够为特定优化问题族生成可重用的求解器，而不是为每个实例单独推理。在Synergistic Dependency Selection问题上，该方法比基础模型采样提升显著，生成成本降低91倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大语言模型通常将组合优化视为推理时过程，为每个问题实例单独进行采样、搜索或重复提示。本研究探索是否可以通过强化学习将部分推理成本转移到代码LLM的权重中，使模型能够为整个问题族合成可重用的求解器。

Method: 使用Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct模型，采用Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)进行微调，结合可行性门控奖励和轻量级结构化脚手架。在Synergistic Dependency Selection问题上进行训练，这是一个受控的约束二次背包问题变体。

Result: 训练后的策略在99.8%的可行SDS输出中收敛到约束感知的模拟退火模板，与全局虚拟最佳求解器的差距从28.7%缩小到5.0%。生成成本比基础模型的Best-of-64评估降低91倍。一个固定的求解器在测试集上重用仍然保持高度竞争力。

Conclusion: 强化学习可以成功训练代码LLM为特定优化问题族生成高效、可重用的求解器，显著降低推理成本。但该方法对奖励标准化和领域特定设计选择敏感，标准稳定化技术反而会降低性能，软可行性门控失败。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) typically approach combinatorial optimization as an inference-time procedure, solving each instance separately through sampling, search, or repeated prompting. We ask whether reinforcement learning can instead shift part of this reasoning cost into the weights of a code LLM, so that the model synthesizes a reusable solver for an entire problem family. We study this question on Synergistic Dependency Selection (SDS), a controlled variant of constrained Quadratic Knapsack designed to expose a specific failure mode: local signals and strict feasibility constraints make greedy heuristics attractive but unreliable. Under identical scaffolding, Best-of-64 base-model sampling saturates at an approximately 28.7% gap to the global Virtual Best Solver (VBS); code audits show that the base model often retrieves Simulated Annealing templates but misimplements the Metropolis acceptance rule. We fine-tune Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) using a feasibility-gated reward and light structural scaffolding. The resulting policy converges to a constraint-aware Simulated Annealing template in 99.8% of feasible SDS outputs, achieves a 5.0% gap to that VBS, and is 91 times cheaper in post-generation execution/search cost than cumulative Best-of-64 evaluation. A compile-once check shows that one best frozen solver per seed remains highly competitive when reused unchanged across the SDS test set, while an additional-domain evaluation on Job Shop Scheduling provides narrower but positive evidence that the scaffold transfers beyond SDS. Negative ablations reveal the limits of this recipe: standard stabilizers degrade performance, a soft feasibility gate fails, and results remain sensitive to reward normalization and domain-specific design choices.

</details>


### [574] [Beyond Square Roots: Explicit Memory-Efficient Factorization for Multi-Epoch Private Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18379)
*Nikita P. Kalinin,Aki Rehn,Joel Daniel Andersson,Antti Honkela,Christoph H. Lampert*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出γ-BIFR方法，统一了DP-λCGD和BISR两种带限逆分解方法，在低带宽、低内存条件下显著提升差分隐私模型训练的效用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有带限逆分解方法存在权衡问题：DP-λCGD内存效率高但效用提升有限，BISR在大带宽下渐近最优但在低带宽下表现不佳，需要一种统一方法在低带宽、低内存条件下提升性能。

Method: 提出γ-BIFR方法，作为DP-λCGD和BISR的统一泛化，通过调整参数γ控制分解形式，平衡内存使用和噪声相关性窗口大小。

Result: 在低内存、低带宽条件下，γ-BIFR显著改善RMSE、放大RMSE和私有训练性能，并为多轮训练中的多次参与误差提供更严格的理论保证。

Conclusion: γ-BIFR提供了一种灵活的带限逆分解框架，在内存效率和训练效用之间实现更好平衡，特别适用于资源受限的差分隐私训练场景。

Abstract: Correlated-noise mechanisms are among the most promising approaches for improving the utility of differentially private model training, but rigorous guarantees require explicit, analyzable factorizations, and practical deployment requires memory efficiency. Recent works have developed banded inverse factorizations, which address both requirements by exploiting a banded structure in the correlation matrix. The bandwidth controls the size of the noise buffer used to correlate noise across iterations, and thus governs the tradeoff between utility and memory cost. Existing factorizations highlight this tradeoff: DP-$λ$CGD achieves high memory efficiency by using only a one-step noise buffer, but this limits its utility gains, while the banded inverse square root (BISR) factorization exploits larger correlation windows and is asymptotically optimal for large bandwidths but performs poorly at low bandwidths. We propose $γ$-BIFR, a unified generalization of both factorizations. In the low-memory, low-bandwidth regime, $γ$-BIFR significantly improves RMSE, amplified RMSE, and private training performance, while yielding tighter theoretical guarantees for multi-participation error in multi-epoch training.

</details>


### [575] [Generating Physically Consistent Molecules with Energy-Based Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18381)
*Christoph Griesbacher,Lea Bogensperger,Andreas Habring,Thomas Pock*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EBMol是一种基于能量的3D分子生成模型，通过流匹配启发的目标学习原子加性标量势能，避免了显式模拟训练，在QM9和GEOM-Drugs上实现SOTA性能，并能用于质量评估和可控生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分子平衡态服从玻尔兹曼分布，基于能量的物理建模具有物理基础，但传统能量模型难以从数据中学习且采样困难。扩散和流匹配模型通过学习噪声与数据间的时间条件得分或输运场来规避这些困难，但失去了能量归纳偏置。EBMol旨在恢复这种归纳偏置，同时保持训练目标的易处理性。

Method: 1) 学习原子加性标量势能，无需训练时显式模拟；2) 采用流匹配启发的恢复场匹配目标来近似能量景观；3) 使用镜像朗之万算法进行采样，统一更新原子位置和类型；4) 结合并行回火实现推理时计算扩展。

Result: EBMol是首个在QM9和GEOM-Drugs数据集上达到最先进性能的3D分子生成能量模型。学习到的能量景观可作为质量度量对构型进行排序和过滤，并通过势能组合和零样本连接器设计实现形状引导采样和可控生成，无需重新训练。

Conclusion: EBMol成功将能量归纳偏置重新引入分子生成，同时保持了训练和采样的可行性。该方法不仅实现了SOTA性能，还展示了能量景观在质量评估和可控生成方面的应用潜力，为基于物理的分子建模提供了新方向。

Abstract: Molecules in equilibrium follow a Boltzmann distribution, making the underlying energy landscape a physically grounded modeling objective. However, such landscapes are difficult to learn from data and, once learned, hard to sample from. Diffusion and flow-matching models sidestep these difficulties by learning a time-conditional score or transport field between noise and data, losing the energy inductive bias in exchange for a more tractable training objective. We introduce EBMol, an energy-based model (EBM) that restores this inductive bias by learning an atom-additive scalar potential without explicit simulation during training. Our method employs a flow-inspired Restoring Field Matching objective to approximate the energy landscape. We adopt the Mirror-Langevin algorithm for sampling, enabling unified updates of atomic positions and types, and incorporate parallel tempering for inference-time compute scaling. EBMol is the first EBM for 3D molecular generation to achieve state-of-the-art performance on QM9 and GEOM-Drugs. Moreover, we show that the learned energy landscape serves as a principled quality metric for ranking and filtering configurations, and demonstrate controllable generation without retraining through shape-steered sampling via potential composition and zero-shot linker design.

</details>


### [576] [TabH2O: A Unified Foundation Model for Tabular Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18383)
*Pascal Pfeiffer,Dmitry Gordeev,Mathias Müller,Laura Fink,Joan Salvà Soler,Mark Landry,Branden Murray,Marcos V. Conde,Sri Satish Ambati*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TabH2O是一个用于表格数据的基础模型，通过上下文学习在单次前向传递中完成分类和回归任务，在TALENT基准测试中表现优于多个传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一个统一的表格数据基础模型，能够同时处理分类和回归任务，避免为不同任务训练单独模型，降低预训练成本并提高效率。

Method: 基于TabICL架构改进，包括：(1)统一训练的dual-head架构处理分类和回归；(2)单阶段预训练，通过有界可缩放softmax、阶段间归一化、可学习残差缩放、logit软限制等技术提升稳定性；(3)噪声感知预训练，在合成数据集中加入显式噪声维度以增强模型对无关特征的鲁棒性。

Result: 在TALENT基准测试（300个数据集）上，TabH2O v1（2920万参数）平均排名2.55（共6个方法），优于调优的CatBoost（4.07）、H2O AutoML（4.18）和LightGBM（5.08），与TabPFN v2.6（2.74）相当，略逊于TabICL v2（2.12），在81%的分类和回归测试数据集上进入前三名。

Conclusion: TabH2O是一个有效的表格数据基础模型，通过统一架构、稳定性改进和噪声感知训练，在分类和回归任务上实现了竞争性性能，为表格数据建模提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: We present TabH2O, a foundation model for tabular data that performs classification and regression in a single forward pass via in-context learning. TabH2O builds on the TabICL architecture with several key modifications: (1) unified training, a single model handles both classification and regression via a dual-head architecture, eliminating the need for separate models and reducing total pretraining cost; (2) single-stage pretraining, training stability improvements (bounded scalable softmax, inter-stage normalization, learnable residual scaling, logit soft-capping) eliminate the need for multi-stage curriculum learning, enabling training with full-length sequences from the start; and (3) noise-aware pretraining, synthetic datasets include explicit noise dimensions to teach the model robustness to irrelevant features. We evaluate TabH2O v1 (29.2M parameters) on the TALENT benchmark (300 datasets), where it achieves an average rank of 2.55 out of 6 evaluated methods, outperforming tuned CatBoost (4.07), H2O AutoML (4.18), and LightGBM (5.08), competitive with TabPFN v2.6 (2.74), and behind TabICL v2 (2.12), while placing in the top-3 on 81% of the testing datasets across classification and regression tasks.

</details>


### [577] [Graph Hierarchical Recurrence for Long-Range Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18387)
*Stefano Carotti,Marco Pacini,Alessio Gravina,Davide Bacciu,Bruno Lepri,Sebastiano Bontorin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GHR是一种新的图神经网络框架，通过在输入图和池化得到的层次抽象上联合操作，解决了现有图模型在捕捉图远距离区域相关性方面的局限性，特别是在超出训练范围的泛化任务中表现优异，同时参数效率极高。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图神经网络（GNNs）和图变换器（GTs）在捕捉图远距离区域相关性方面存在根本性限制，特别是在测试实例涉及比训练中观察到的更长距离交互的超出范围泛化任务中，这种局限性更加明显。

Method: 提出图层次循环（GHR）框架，该框架在输入图和通过池化获得的层次抽象上联合操作。GHR设计简单，但能有效处理图的长距离依赖关系。

Result: 在广泛的远距离基准测试中，GHR始终优于现有图模型，同时使用的参数仅为当前最先进模型的1%。GHR在长距离依赖性、超出范围泛化和参数效率方面都表现出显著优势。

Conclusion: GHR为图学习提供了一个补充方向，表明单纯增加模型容量可能不足以实现良好的泛化能力。该框架展示了在保持高参数效率的同时，显著提升图模型处理长距离依赖和超出范围泛化能力的可能性。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) and Graph Transformers (GTs) are now a fundamental paradigm for graph learning, combining the representation-learning capabilities of deep models with the sample efficiency induced by their inductive biases. Despite their effectiveness, a large body of work has shown that these models still face fundamental limitations in tasks that require capturing correlations between distant regions of a graph. To address this issue, we introduce Graph Hierarchical Recurrence (GHR), a novel framework that operates jointly on the input graph and on a hierarchical abstraction obtained through pooling. We also show that the limitations of existing models are even more pronounced in out-of-range generalization, where test instances involve interactions over distances longer than those observed during training. By contrast, despite its simple design, GHR provides three key advantages: strong performance on long-range dependencies, improved out-of-range generalization, and high parameter efficiency. To corroborate these claims, we show that across a broad set of long-range benchmarks, GHR consistently outperforms existing graph models while using as little as 1% of the parameters of current state-of-the-art models. These results suggest a complementary direction to the current trend of scaling architectures to obtain graph foundation models, indicating that increased model capacity alone may not be sufficient for generalization.

</details>


### [578] [Spherical Harmonic Optimal Transport: Application to Climate Models Comparisons](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18389)
*Pierre Houédry,Iskander Legheraba,Léo Buecher,Nicolas Courty*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于热核的快速Sinkhorn算法，用于在流形上计算最优传输距离，特别针对2-球面进行了优化，实现了O(n)内存和O(n^{3/2})时间复杂度的迭代计算，并应用于全球气候模型评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 最优传输理论提供了强大的测度比较框架，但其计算成本过高限制了实际应用。在流形上，基于热核的卷积算法可以缓解计算成本，但理论性质尚未充分探索。

Method: 建立热核成本在平衡和非平衡情况下随时间趋于零时收敛到最优传输成本的理论。针对2-球面，确保Sinkhorn散度保持经典最优传输差异的几何和分析性质，并利用球面的调和结构推导快速Sinkhorn算法。

Result: 算法仅需O(n)内存和O(n^{3/2})时间每迭代，支持完全密集的GPU友好操作。在合成数据上验证了计算效率，并展示了在全球气候模型评估中的潜在应用，提供空间和季节性能洞察。

Conclusion: 该方法成功地将热核成本与最优传输成本联系起来，为流形上的快速最优传输计算提供了理论保证和高效算法，特别在2-球面上实现了显著的计算优化，为实际应用如气候模型评估开辟了新途径。

Abstract: Optimal transport provides a powerful framework for comparing measures while respecting the geometry of their support, but comes with an expensive computational cost, hindering its potential application to real world use cases. On manifolds, convolutional algorithms based on the heat kernel have been proposed to alleviate this cost, but their theoretical properties remain largely unexplored. We establish that the heat kernel cost converges to the optimal transport cost as time vanishes in the balanced and unbalanced cases. In the specific case of the 2-sphere $\mathbb{S}^2$, we ensure that the associated Sinkhorn divergences retains the desirable geometric and analytic properties of classical optimal transport discrepancies. Moreover, we leverage the harmonic structure of the sphere to derive a fast Sinkhorn algorithm, requiring only $\mathcal{O}(n)$ memory and $\mathcal{O}(n^{3/2})$ time per iteration, with fully dense GPU-friendly operations. We validate its computational efficiency on synthetic data, and discuss its potential use in the evaluation of global climate models, providing both spatial and seasonal insights into models performances.

</details>


### [579] [Generative Adversarial Learning from Deterministic Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18425)
*Joris C. Kühl,Hanno Gottschalk*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文解释了物理AI在非i.i.d.数据（特别是混沌动力系统）上的经验成功，通过分析生成对抗学习(GAL)模型，证明可以从单一确定性时间序列学习混沌系统的不变分布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物理AI方法在非i.i.d.数据（特别是混沌动力系统如湍流数据）上表现成功，但传统统计学习理论基于i.i.d.假设。需要解释这些经验成功背后的理论原理。

Method: 使用无限维生成对抗学习(GAL)模型，分析从单一确定性演化时间序列学习混沌系统不变分布的可能性。理论证明包括收敛性和收敛速率分析。

Result: 证明可以从单一确定性时间序列学习足够混沌系统的invariant分布，并给出基于Jensen-Shannon散度的收敛速率。为GANs在非i.i.d.数据上的成功提供了理论解释。

Conclusion: 物理AI方法在混沌动力系统数据上的成功可以通过生成对抗学习理论解释，即使数据不满足传统i.i.d.假设，仍能有效学习系统的invariant分布。

Abstract: Physical AI is being successfully applied to data which does not follow the traditional paradigm of independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) samples. In fact, physical AI is often trained on data which is not random at all, and is instead derived from chaotic dynamical systems like turbulence.
  We aim to explain the empirical success of these methods using the example of generative adversarial networks (GANs), whose statistical learning theory under the i.i.d. assumption is generally well understood. We prove that it is possible, using an infinite-dimensional model of generative adversarial learning (GAL), to learn the invariant distribution of a sufficiently chaotic dynamical system from a single deterministically evolving time series of its states or measurements thereof, and give explicit rates for the convergence to the solution in terms of the Jensen-Shannon divergence.

</details>


### [580] [Text2CAD-Bench: A Benchmark for LLM-based Text-to-Parametric CAD Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18430)
*Liang Wang,Heng Meng,Zekai Xiang,Jin Liu,Pingyi Zhou,Litao Chen,Yongqiang Tang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Text2CAD-Bench是首个系统评估文本到CAD生成任务的基准，包含600个人工标注的示例，涵盖几何复杂度四个层次和两种提示风格，发现当前模型在基础几何上表现尚可但在复杂拓扑和高级特征上显著退化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本到CAD生成基准主要关注基本图元和平移拉伸序列，缺乏真实世界应用所需的高级特征，且仅覆盖传统机械零件。需要建立系统评估几何复杂度和应用多样性的基准。

Method: 构建Text2CAD-Bench基准，包含600个人工标注示例，分为四个复杂度层次：L1-L2覆盖基础几何和标准特征，L3引入复杂拓扑和自由曲面，L4扩展到机械零件以外的真实世界领域。每个示例提供两种提示风格：模仿非专业用户的几何描述，以及符合专家惯例的程序序列。

Result: 评估主流通用LLM和领域特定模型，发现当前模型在基础几何上表现合理，但在复杂拓扑和高级特征上性能显著下降。基准揭示了现有方法的局限性。

Conclusion: Text2CAD-Bench是首个系统评估文本到CAD生成的基准，填补了现有基准的空白，旨在推动文本到CAD研究的发展。基准已公开发布以促进该领域进步。

Abstract: Text-to-CAD generation aims to create parametric CAD models from natural language, enabling rapid prototyping and intuitive design workflows. However, existing benchmarks focus on basic primitives and simple sketch-extrude sequences, lacking advanced features essential for real-world applications and covering only traditional mechanical parts. We introduce Text2CAD-Bench, the first benchmark systematically evaluating text-to-CAD across geometric complexity and application diversity. Our benchmark comprises 600 human-curated examples spanning four levels: L1-L2 cover fundamental geometry with standard features, L3 introduces complex topology and freeform surfaces, and L4 extends to real-world domains beyond mechanical parts. Each example pairs dual-style prompts -- geometric descriptions mimicking non-expert users, and procedural sequences aligned with expert-level conventions. Evaluating mainstream general LLMs and domain-specific models, we find that current models perform reasonably on basic geometry but degrade substantially on complex topology and advanced features. We release our benchmark to drive progress in text-to-CAD research.

</details>


### [581] [Heterogeneous Tasks Offloading in Vehicular Edge Computing: A Federated Meta Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18437)
*Yaorong Huang,Jingtao Luo,Xuechao Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FedMAGS框架，利用图注意力网络捕捉DAG依赖关系，Seq2Seq策略生成卸载决策，联邦元学习实现分布式MEC服务器快速适应，解决VEC中异构任务卸载问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 车联网边缘计算中，真实车辆工作负载通常建模为具有复杂依赖结构的异构有向无环图任务，联合卸载和资源分配极具挑战性。此外，分布式MEC部署在协作训练基于学习的策略时引发隐私担忧。

Method: 提出联邦元深度强化学习框架FedMAGS，结合图注意力网络捕捉DAG依赖关系，Seq2Seq策略生成结构化卸载决策，联邦元学习使分布式MEC服务器无需共享原始数据即可快速适应。

Result: 大量仿真表明FedMAGS相比现有先进基准方法，实现了更快的收敛速度、更低的执行延迟和更好的可扩展性。联邦设计在保护数据隐私的同时减少了通信开销。

Conclusion: FedMAGS框架适用于动态和大规模车联网边缘计算环境，通过结合GAT、Seq2Seq和联邦元学习，有效解决了异构任务卸载问题，同时保护了数据隐私。

Abstract: Vehicular edge computing (VEC) enables latency-sensitive vehicular applications by offloading computation-intensive tasks to nearby edge servers. However, real-world vehicular workloads are typically modeled as heterogeneous directed acyclic graph (DAG) tasks with complex dependency structures, making joint offloading and resource allocation highly challenging. Moreover, distributed MEC deployment raises privacy concerns when collaboratively training learning-based policies.
  In this paper, we propose a Federated Meta Deep Reinforcement Learning framework with GAT-Seq2Seq modeling (FedMAGS) for heterogeneous task offloading in VEC systems. The proposed approach leverages Graph Attention Networks to capture DAG dependencies, a Seq2Seq-based policy to generate structured offloading decisions, and federated meta-learning to enable fast adaptation across distributed MEC servers without sharing raw data.
  Extensive simulations demonstrate that FedMAGS achieves faster convergence, lower execution delay, and better scalability compared with state-of-the-art baselines. In addition, the federated design preserves data privacy while reducing communication overhead, making the framework well suited for dynamic and large-scale VEC environments.

</details>


### [582] [Modelling Customer Trajectories with Reinforcement Learning for Practical Retail Insights](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18449)
*Ken Ming Lee,Paul Barde,Maxime C. Cohen,Derek Nowrouzezahrai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于最大熵强化学习的代理建模框架，用于预测零售店顾客轨迹，相比传统启发式方法能更准确地模拟顾客行为，为商店布局优化提供实用方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 零售店顾客轨迹数据对于优化商店布局至关重要，但实际数据收集成本高且不可行。传统启发式方法（如TSP和PNN）虽然廉价，但准确度不足，与真实顾客轨迹平均偏差达28%。需要一种既能保持实用性又能提高准确性的替代方案。

Method: 提出基于代理的建模框架，将顾客轨迹预测构建为最大熵强化学习问题。该方法平衡奖励最大化与随机性，更好地模拟有限理性顾客的行为。

Result: 使用便利店真实轨迹数据验证，RL生成轨迹比TSP和PNN更贴近顾客实际行为，能更准确估计冲动购买率和货架流量密度。只有RL预测能得出与实际轨迹数据一致的冲动商品重新定位决策，实现可比利润增长。
